Built with Alectryon, running Coq+SerAPI v8.20.0+0.20.0. Bubbles () indicate interactive fragments: hover for details, tap to reveal contents. Use Ctrl+↑ Ctrl+↓ to navigate, Ctrl+🖱️ to focus. On Mac, use ⌘ instead of Ctrl.
(*****************************************************************************************

 Whiskering laws for enriched profunctors

 In this file we establish laws related to whisker operations for enriched profunctors.
 These laws are necessary to show that we have a Verity double bicategory of enriched
 profunctors. The proofs boil down to boring calculations.

 Contents
 1. Up whiskering and composition
 2. Down whiskering and composition
 3. Up whiskering and identities
 4. Swapping whiskering
 5. Composition of squares and whiskering

 *****************************************************************************************)

Notation "_ ≠ _" was already used in scope nat_scope.
[notation-overridden,parsing,default]

Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Core.Prelude.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.EnrichedCats.BenabouCosmos.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.EnrichedCats.Enrichment.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.EnrichedCats.EnrichmentFunctor.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.EnrichedCats.EnrichmentTransformation.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.EnrichedCats.Profunctors.Profunctor.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.EnrichedCats.Profunctors.StandardProfunctors.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.EnrichedCats.Profunctors.ProfunctorTransformations.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.EnrichedCats.Profunctors.Invertible.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.EnrichedCats.Profunctors.ProfunctorSquares.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.EnrichedCats.Profunctors.Coend.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.EnrichedCats.Profunctors.Composition.CompositionProf.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.EnrichedCats.Profunctors.Composition.SquareComp.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.EnrichedCats.Profunctors.Composition.Unitors.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.EnrichedCats.Profunctors.Composition.Associators.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.EnrichedCats.Profunctors.Composition.Whiskering.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Monoidal.Categories.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Monoidal.Structure.Symmetric.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Monoidal.Structure.Closed.

Local Open Scope cat.
Local Open Scope moncat.

Import MonoidalNotations.

Opaque sym_mon_braiding.

(** * 1. Up whiskering and composition *)

V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
F₁, F₂, F₃: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF₁: functor_enrichment F₁ E₁ E₂
EF₂: functor_enrichment F₂ E₁ E₂
EF₃: functor_enrichment F₃ E₁ E₂
G: C₃ ⟶ C₄
EG: functor_enrichment G E₃ E₄
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₃
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₄
τ₁: F₁ ⟹ F₂
Hτ₁: nat_trans_enrichment τ₁ EF₁ EF₂
τ₂: F₂ ⟹ F₃
Hτ₂: nat_trans_enrichment τ₂ EF₂ EF₃
θ: enriched_profunctor_square EF₁ EG P Q
uwhisker_enriched_profunctor_square
  (comp_trans_enrichment Hτ₁ Hτ₂) θ =
uwhisker_enriched_profunctor_square Hτ₂
  (uwhisker_enriched_profunctor_square Hτ₁ θ)


V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
F₁, F₂, F₃: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF₁: functor_enrichment F₁ E₁ E₂
EF₂: functor_enrichment F₂ E₁ E₂
EF₃: functor_enrichment F₃ E₁ E₂
G: C₃ ⟶ C₄
EG: functor_enrichment G E₃ E₄
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₃
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₄
τ₁: F₁ ⟹ F₂
Hτ₁: nat_trans_enrichment τ₁ EF₁ EF₂
τ₂: F₂ ⟹ F₃
Hτ₂: nat_trans_enrichment τ₂ EF₂ EF₃
θ: enriched_profunctor_square EF₁ EG P Q
uwhisker_enriched_profunctor_square
  (comp_trans_enrichment Hτ₁ Hτ₂) θ =
uwhisker_enriched_profunctor_square Hτ₂
  (uwhisker_enriched_profunctor_square Hτ₁ θ)

  
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
F₁, F₂, F₃: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF₁: functor_enrichment F₁ E₁ E₂
EF₂: functor_enrichment F₂ E₁ E₂
EF₃: functor_enrichment F₃ E₁ E₂
G: C₃ ⟶ C₄
EG: functor_enrichment G E₃ E₄
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₃
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₄
τ₁: F₁ ⟹ F₂
Hτ₁: nat_trans_enrichment τ₁ EF₁ EF₂
τ₂: F₂ ⟹ F₃
Hτ₂: nat_trans_enrichment τ₂ EF₂ EF₃
θ: enriched_profunctor_square EF₁ EG P Q
z: C₃
x: C₁
θ z x · mon_linvunitor (Q (G z) (F₁ x))
· enriched_from_arr E₂ (τ₁ x · τ₂ x)
  #⊗ identity (Q (G z) (F₁ x))
· rmap_e Q (G z) (F₁ x) (F₃ x) =
θ z x · mon_linvunitor (Q (G z) (F₁ x))
· enriched_from_arr E₂ (τ₁ x)
  #⊗ identity (Q (G z) (F₁ x))
· rmap_e Q (G z) (F₁ x) (F₂ x)
· mon_linvunitor (Q (G z) (F₂ x))
· enriched_from_arr E₂ (τ₂ x)
  #⊗ identity (Q (G z) (F₂ x))
· rmap_e Q (G z) (F₂ x) (F₃ x)

  
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
F₁, F₂, F₃: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF₁: functor_enrichment F₁ E₁ E₂
EF₂: functor_enrichment F₂ E₁ E₂
EF₃: functor_enrichment F₃ E₁ E₂
G: C₃ ⟶ C₄
EG: functor_enrichment G E₃ E₄
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₃
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₄
τ₁: F₁ ⟹ F₂
Hτ₁: nat_trans_enrichment τ₁ EF₁ EF₂
τ₂: F₂ ⟹ F₃
Hτ₂: nat_trans_enrichment τ₂ EF₂ EF₃
θ: enriched_profunctor_square EF₁ EG P Q
z: C₃
x: C₁
θ z x
· (mon_linvunitor (Q (G z) (F₁ x))
   · (enriched_from_arr E₂ (τ₁ x · τ₂ x)
      #⊗ identity (Q (G z) (F₁ x))
      · rmap_e Q (G z) (F₁ x) (F₃ x))) =
θ z x
· (mon_linvunitor (Q (G z) (F₁ x))
   · (enriched_from_arr E₂ (τ₁ x)
      #⊗ identity (Q (G z) (F₁ x))
      · (rmap_e Q (G z) (F₁ x) (F₂ x)
         · (mon_linvunitor (Q (G z) (F₂ x))
            · (enriched_from_arr E₂ (τ₂ x)
               #⊗ identity (Q (G z) (F₂ x))
               · rmap_e Q (G z) (F₂ x) (F₃ x))))))

  
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
F₁, F₂, F₃: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF₁: functor_enrichment F₁ E₁ E₂
EF₂: functor_enrichment F₂ E₁ E₂
EF₃: functor_enrichment F₃ E₁ E₂
G: C₃ ⟶ C₄
EG: functor_enrichment G E₃ E₄
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₃
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₄
τ₁: F₁ ⟹ F₂
Hτ₁: nat_trans_enrichment τ₁ EF₁ EF₂
τ₂: F₂ ⟹ F₃
Hτ₂: nat_trans_enrichment τ₂ EF₂ EF₃
θ: enriched_profunctor_square EF₁ EG P Q
z: C₃
x: C₁
enriched_from_arr E₂ (τ₁ x · τ₂ x)
#⊗ identity (Q (G z) (F₁ x))
· rmap_e Q (G z) (F₁ x) (F₃ x) =
enriched_from_arr E₂ (τ₁ x)
#⊗ identity (Q (G z) (F₁ x))
· (rmap_e Q (G z) (F₁ x) (F₂ x)
   · (mon_linvunitor (Q (G z) (F₂ x))
      · (enriched_from_arr E₂ (τ₂ x)
         #⊗ identity (Q (G z) (F₂ x))
         · rmap_e Q (G z) (F₂ x) (F₃ x))))

  
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
F₁, F₂, F₃: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF₁: functor_enrichment F₁ E₁ E₂
EF₂: functor_enrichment F₂ E₁ E₂
EF₃: functor_enrichment F₃ E₁ E₂
G: C₃ ⟶ C₄
EG: functor_enrichment G E₃ E₄
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₃
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₄
τ₁: F₁ ⟹ F₂
Hτ₁: nat_trans_enrichment τ₁ EF₁ EF₂
τ₂: F₂ ⟹ F₃
Hτ₂: nat_trans_enrichment τ₂ EF₂ EF₃
θ: enriched_profunctor_square EF₁ EG P Q
z: C₃
x: C₁
(mon_linvunitor I_{ V}
 · enriched_from_arr E₂ (τ₂ x)
   #⊗ enriched_from_arr E₂ (τ₁ x)
 · enriched_comp E₂ (F₁ x) (F₂ x) (F₃ x))
#⊗ identity (Q (G z) (F₁ x))
· rmap_e Q (G z) (F₁ x) (F₃ x) =
enriched_from_arr E₂ (τ₁ x)
#⊗ identity (Q (G z) (F₁ x))
· (rmap_e Q (G z) (F₁ x) (F₂ x)
   · (mon_linvunitor (Q (G z) (F₂ x))
      · (enriched_from_arr E₂ (τ₂ x)
         #⊗ identity (Q (G z) (F₂ x))
         · rmap_e Q (G z) (F₂ x) (F₃ x))))

C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
F₁, F₂, F₃: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF₁: functor_enrichment F₁ E₁ E₂
EF₂: functor_enrichment F₂ E₁ E₂
EF₃: functor_enrichment F₃ E₁ E₂
G: C₃ ⟶ C₄
EG: functor_enrichment G E₃ E₄
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₃
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₄

Hτ₁: nat_trans_enrichment τ₁ EF₁ EF₂
τ₂: F₂ ⟹ F₃
Hτ₂: nat_trans_enrichment τ₂ EF₂ EF₃
θ: enriched_profunctor_square EF₁ EG P Q
z: C₃
x: C₁
(mon_linvunitor I_{ V}
 · enriched_from_arr E₂ (τ₂ x)
   #⊗ enriched_from_arr E₂ (τ₁ x)
 · enriched_comp E₂ (F₁ x) (F₂ x) (F₃ x))
#⊗ identity (Q (G z) (F₁ x))
· rmap_e Q (G z) (F₁ x) (F₃ x) = ?b
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
F₁, F₂, F₃: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF₁: functor_enrichment F₁ E₁ E₂
EF₂: functor_enrichment F₂ E₁ E₂
EF₃: functor_enrichment F₃ E₁ E₂
G: C₃ ⟶ C₄
EG: functor_enrichment G E₃ E₄
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₃
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₄
τ₁: F₁ ⟹ F₂
Hτ₁: nat_trans_enrichment τ₁ EF₁ EF₂
τ₂: F₂ ⟹ F₃
Hτ₂: nat_trans_enrichment τ₂ EF₂ EF₃
θ: enriched_profunctor_square EF₁ EG P Q
z: C₃
x: C₁
?b =
enriched_from_arr E₂ (τ₁ x)
#⊗ identity (Q (G z) (F₁ x))
· (rmap_e Q (G z) (F₁ x) (F₂ x)
   · (mon_linvunitor (Q (G z) (F₂ x))
      · (enriched_from_arr E₂ (τ₂ x)
         #⊗ identity (Q (G z) (F₂ x))
         · rmap_e Q (G z) (F₂ x) (F₃ x))))

· rmap_e Q (G z) (F₁ x) (F₃ x) = ?b

    
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V

τ₂: F₂ ⟹ F₃

θ: enriched_profunctor_square EF₁ EG P Q
z: C₃

mon_linvunitor I_{ V}
· enriched_from_arr E₂ (τ₂ x)
  #⊗ enriched_from_arr E₂ (τ₁ x) = ?y'

    
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V

EF₁: functor_enrichment F₁ E₁ E₂
EF₂: functor_enrichment F₂ E₁ E₂

Hτ₁: nat_trans_enrichment τ₁ EF₁ EF₂
τ₂: F₂ ⟹ F₃
Hτ₂: nat_trans_enrichment τ₂ EF₂ EF₃
θ: enriched_profunctor_square EF₁ EG P Q
z: C₃
x: C₁
mon_linvunitor I_{ V}
· (identity I_{ V} #⊗ enriched_from_arr E₂ (τ₁ x)
   · enriched_from_arr E₂ (τ₂ x)
     #⊗ identity (E₂ ⦃ F₁ x, F₂ x ⦄)) = ?y'

θ: enriched_profunctor_square EF₁ EG P Q

mon_linvunitor I_{ V}
· identity I_{ V} #⊗ enriched_from_arr E₂ (τ₁ x)
· enriched_from_arr E₂ (τ₂ x)
  #⊗ identity (E₂ ⦃ F₁ x, F₂ x ⦄) = ?y'

C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
F₁, F₂, F₃: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF₁: functor_enrichment F₁ E₁ E₂
EF₂: functor_enrichment F₂ E₁ E₂

G: C₃ ⟶ C₄
EG: functor_enrichment G E₃ E₄
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₃
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₄

Hτ₁: nat_trans_enrichment τ₁ EF₁ EF₂
τ₂: F₂ ⟹ F₃
Hτ₂: nat_trans_enrichment τ₂ EF₂ EF₃
θ: enriched_profunctor_square EF₁ EG P Q
z: C₃
x: C₁
enriched_from_arr E₂ (τ₁ x)
· mon_linvunitor (E₂ ⦃ F₁ x, F₂ x ⦄)
· enriched_from_arr E₂ (τ₂ x)
  #⊗ identity (E₂ ⦃ F₁ x, F₂ x ⦄) = ?y'

    apply idpath.
  
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
F₁, F₂, F₃: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF₁: functor_enrichment F₁ E₁ E₂
EF₂: functor_enrichment F₂ E₁ E₂
EF₃: functor_enrichment F₃ E₁ E₂
G: C₃ ⟶ C₄
EG: functor_enrichment G E₃ E₄
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₃
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₄
τ₁: F₁ ⟹ F₂
Hτ₁: nat_trans_enrichment τ₁ EF₁ EF₂
τ₂: F₂ ⟹ F₃
Hτ₂: nat_trans_enrichment τ₂ EF₂ EF₃
θ: enriched_profunctor_square EF₁ EG P Q
z: C₃
x: C₁
(enriched_from_arr E₂ (τ₁ x)
 · mon_linvunitor (E₂ ⦃ F₁ x, F₂ x ⦄)
 · enriched_from_arr E₂ (τ₂ x)
   #⊗ identity (E₂ ⦃ F₁ x, F₂ x ⦄)
 · enriched_comp E₂ (F₁ x) (F₂ x) (F₃ x))
#⊗ identity (Q (G z) (F₁ x))
· rmap_e Q (G z) (F₁ x) (F₃ x) =
enriched_from_arr E₂ (τ₁ x)
#⊗ identity (Q (G z) (F₁ x))
· (rmap_e Q (G z) (F₁ x) (F₂ x)
   · (mon_linvunitor (Q (G z) (F₂ x))
      · (enriched_from_arr E₂ (τ₂ x)
         #⊗ identity (Q (G z) (F₂ x))
         · rmap_e Q (G z) (F₂ x) (F₃ x))))

  
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
F₁, F₂, F₃: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF₁: functor_enrichment F₁ E₁ E₂
EF₂: functor_enrichment F₂ E₁ E₂
EF₃: functor_enrichment F₃ E₁ E₂
G: C₃ ⟶ C₄
EG: functor_enrichment G E₃ E₄
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₃
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₄
τ₁: F₁ ⟹ F₂
Hτ₁: nat_trans_enrichment τ₁ EF₁ EF₂
τ₂: F₂ ⟹ F₃
Hτ₂: nat_trans_enrichment τ₂ EF₂ EF₃
θ: enriched_profunctor_square EF₁ EG P Q
z: C₃
x: C₁
enriched_from_arr E₂ (τ₁ x)
#⊗ identity (Q (G z) (F₁ x))
· mon_linvunitor (E₂ ⦃ F₁ x, F₂ x ⦄)
  #⊗ identity (Q (G z) (F₁ x))
· (enriched_from_arr E₂ (τ₂ x)
   #⊗ identity (E₂ ⦃ F₁ x, F₂ x ⦄))
  #⊗ identity (Q (G z) (F₁ x))
· enriched_comp E₂ (F₁ x) (F₂ x) (F₃ x)
  #⊗ identity (Q (G z) (F₁ x))
· rmap_e Q (G z) (F₁ x) (F₃ x) =
enriched_from_arr E₂ (τ₁ x)
#⊗ identity (Q (G z) (F₁ x))
· (rmap_e Q (G z) (F₁ x) (F₂ x)
   · (mon_linvunitor (Q (G z) (F₂ x))
      · (enriched_from_arr E₂ (τ₂ x)
         #⊗ identity (Q (G z) (F₂ x))
         · rmap_e Q (G z) (F₂ x) (F₃ x))))

  
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
F₁, F₂, F₃: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF₁: functor_enrichment F₁ E₁ E₂
EF₂: functor_enrichment F₂ E₁ E₂
EF₃: functor_enrichment F₃ E₁ E₂
G: C₃ ⟶ C₄
EG: functor_enrichment G E₃ E₄
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₃
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₄
τ₁: F₁ ⟹ F₂
Hτ₁: nat_trans_enrichment τ₁ EF₁ EF₂
τ₂: F₂ ⟹ F₃
Hτ₂: nat_trans_enrichment τ₂ EF₂ EF₃
θ: enriched_profunctor_square EF₁ EG P Q
z: C₃
x: C₁
enriched_from_arr E₂ (τ₁ x)
#⊗ identity (Q (G z) (F₁ x))
· (mon_linvunitor (E₂ ⦃ F₁ x, F₂ x ⦄)
   #⊗ identity (Q (G z) (F₁ x))
   · ((enriched_from_arr E₂ (τ₂ x)
       #⊗ identity (E₂ ⦃ F₁ x, F₂ x ⦄))
      #⊗ identity (Q (G z) (F₁ x))
      · (enriched_comp E₂ (F₁ x) (F₂ x) (F₃ x)
         #⊗ identity (Q (G z) (F₁ x))
         · rmap_e Q (G z) (F₁ x) (F₃ x)))) =
enriched_from_arr E₂ (τ₁ x)
#⊗ identity (Q (G z) (F₁ x))
· (rmap_e Q (G z) (F₁ x) (F₂ x)
   · (mon_linvunitor (Q (G z) (F₂ x))
      · (enriched_from_arr E₂ (τ₂ x)
         #⊗ identity (Q (G z) (F₂ x))
         · rmap_e Q (G z) (F₂ x) (F₃ x))))

  
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
F₁, F₂, F₃: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF₁: functor_enrichment F₁ E₁ E₂
EF₂: functor_enrichment F₂ E₁ E₂
EF₃: functor_enrichment F₃ E₁ E₂
G: C₃ ⟶ C₄
EG: functor_enrichment G E₃ E₄
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₃
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₄
τ₁: F₁ ⟹ F₂
Hτ₁: nat_trans_enrichment τ₁ EF₁ EF₂
τ₂: F₂ ⟹ F₃
Hτ₂: nat_trans_enrichment τ₂ EF₂ EF₃
θ: enriched_profunctor_square EF₁ EG P Q
z: C₃
x: C₁
mon_linvunitor (E₂ ⦃ F₁ x, F₂ x ⦄)
#⊗ identity (Q (G z) (F₁ x))
· ((enriched_from_arr E₂ (τ₂ x)
    #⊗ identity (E₂ ⦃ F₁ x, F₂ x ⦄))
   #⊗ identity (Q (G z) (F₁ x))
   · (enriched_comp E₂ (F₁ x) (F₂ x) (F₃ x)
      #⊗ identity (Q (G z) (F₁ x))
      · rmap_e Q (G z) (F₁ x) (F₃ x))) =
rmap_e Q (G z) (F₁ x) (F₂ x)
· (mon_linvunitor (Q (G z) (F₂ x))
   · (enriched_from_arr E₂ (τ₂ x)
      #⊗ identity (Q (G z) (F₂ x))
      · rmap_e Q (G z) (F₂ x) (F₃ x)))

  
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
F₁, F₂, F₃: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF₁: functor_enrichment F₁ E₁ E₂
EF₂: functor_enrichment F₂ E₁ E₂
EF₃: functor_enrichment F₃ E₁ E₂
G: C₃ ⟶ C₄
EG: functor_enrichment G E₃ E₄
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₃
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₄
τ₁: F₁ ⟹ F₂
Hτ₁: nat_trans_enrichment τ₁ EF₁ EF₂
τ₂: F₂ ⟹ F₃
Hτ₂: nat_trans_enrichment τ₂ EF₂ EF₃
θ: enriched_profunctor_square EF₁ EG P Q
z: C₃
x: C₁
mon_linvunitor (E₂ ⦃ F₁ x, F₂ x ⦄)
#⊗ identity (Q (G z) (F₁ x))
· ((enriched_from_arr E₂ (τ₂ x)
    #⊗ identity (E₂ ⦃ F₁ x, F₂ x ⦄))
   #⊗ identity (Q (G z) (F₁ x))
   · (mon_lassociator (E₂ ⦃ F₂ x, F₃ x ⦄)
        (E₂ ⦃ F₁ x, F₂ x ⦄) (Q (G z) (F₁ x))
      · identity (E₂ ⦃ F₂ x, F₃ x ⦄)
        #⊗ rmap_e Q (G z) (F₁ x) (F₂ x)
      · rmap_e Q (G z) (F₂ x) (F₃ x))) =
rmap_e Q (G z) (F₁ x) (F₂ x)
· (mon_linvunitor (Q (G z) (F₂ x))
   · (enriched_from_arr E₂ (τ₂ x)
      #⊗ identity (Q (G z) (F₂ x))
      · rmap_e Q (G z) (F₂ x) (F₃ x)))

  
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
F₁, F₂, F₃: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF₁: functor_enrichment F₁ E₁ E₂
EF₂: functor_enrichment F₂ E₁ E₂
EF₃: functor_enrichment F₃ E₁ E₂
G: C₃ ⟶ C₄
EG: functor_enrichment G E₃ E₄
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₃
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₄
τ₁: F₁ ⟹ F₂
Hτ₁: nat_trans_enrichment τ₁ EF₁ EF₂
τ₂: F₂ ⟹ F₃
Hτ₂: nat_trans_enrichment τ₂ EF₂ EF₃
θ: enriched_profunctor_square EF₁ EG P Q
z: C₃
x: C₁
mon_linvunitor (E₂ ⦃ F₁ x, F₂ x ⦄)
#⊗ identity (Q (G z) (F₁ x))
· (enriched_from_arr E₂ (τ₂ x)
   #⊗ identity (E₂ ⦃ F₁ x, F₂ x ⦄))
  #⊗ identity (Q (G z) (F₁ x))
· mon_lassociator (E₂ ⦃ F₂ x, F₃ x ⦄)
    (E₂ ⦃ F₁ x, F₂ x ⦄) (Q (G z) (F₁ x))
· identity (E₂ ⦃ F₂ x, F₃ x ⦄)
  #⊗ rmap_e Q (G z) (F₁ x) (F₂ x)
· rmap_e Q (G z) (F₂ x) (F₃ x) =
rmap_e Q (G z) (F₁ x) (F₂ x)
· mon_linvunitor (Q (G z) (F₂ x))
· enriched_from_arr E₂ (τ₂ x)
  #⊗ identity (Q (G z) (F₂ x))
· rmap_e Q (G z) (F₂ x) (F₃ x)

  
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
F₁, F₂, F₃: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF₁: functor_enrichment F₁ E₁ E₂
EF₂: functor_enrichment F₂ E₁ E₂
EF₃: functor_enrichment F₃ E₁ E₂
G: C₃ ⟶ C₄
EG: functor_enrichment G E₃ E₄
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₃
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₄
τ₁: F₁ ⟹ F₂
Hτ₁: nat_trans_enrichment τ₁ EF₁ EF₂
τ₂: F₂ ⟹ F₃
Hτ₂: nat_trans_enrichment τ₂ EF₂ EF₃
θ: enriched_profunctor_square EF₁ EG P Q
z: C₃
x: C₁
mon_linvunitor (E₂ ⦃ F₁ x, F₂ x ⦄)
#⊗ identity (Q (G z) (F₁ x))
· (enriched_from_arr E₂ (τ₂ x)
   #⊗ identity (E₂ ⦃ F₁ x, F₂ x ⦄))
  #⊗ identity (Q (G z) (F₁ x))
· mon_lassociator (E₂ ⦃ F₂ x, F₃ x ⦄)
    (E₂ ⦃ F₁ x, F₂ x ⦄) (Q (G z) (F₁ x))
· identity (E₂ ⦃ F₂ x, F₃ x ⦄)
  #⊗ rmap_e Q (G z) (F₁ x) (F₂ x) =
rmap_e Q (G z) (F₁ x) (F₂ x)
· mon_linvunitor (Q (G z) (F₂ x))
· enriched_from_arr E₂ (τ₂ x)
  #⊗ identity (Q (G z) (F₂ x))

  
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
F₁, F₂, F₃: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF₁: functor_enrichment F₁ E₁ E₂
EF₂: functor_enrichment F₂ E₁ E₂
EF₃: functor_enrichment F₃ E₁ E₂
G: C₃ ⟶ C₄
EG: functor_enrichment G E₃ E₄
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₃
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₄
τ₁: F₁ ⟹ F₂
Hτ₁: nat_trans_enrichment τ₁ EF₁ EF₂
τ₂: F₂ ⟹ F₃
Hτ₂: nat_trans_enrichment τ₂ EF₂ EF₃
θ: enriched_profunctor_square EF₁ EG P Q
z: C₃
x: C₁
mon_linvunitor (E₂ ⦃ F₁ x, F₂ x ⦄)
#⊗ identity (Q (G z) (F₁ x))
· (enriched_from_arr E₂ (τ₂ x)
   #⊗ identity (E₂ ⦃ F₁ x, F₂ x ⦄))
  #⊗ identity (Q (G z) (F₁ x))
· mon_lassociator (E₂ ⦃ F₂ x, F₃ x ⦄)
    (E₂ ⦃ F₁ x, F₂ x ⦄) (Q (G z) (F₁ x))
· identity (E₂ ⦃ F₂ x, F₃ x ⦄)
  #⊗ rmap_e Q (G z) (F₁ x) (F₂ x) =
mon_linvunitor ((E₂ ⦃ F₁ x, F₂ x ⦄) ⊗ Q (G z) (F₁ x))
· identity I_{ V} #⊗ rmap_e Q (G z) (F₁ x) (F₂ x)
· enriched_from_arr E₂ (τ₂ x)
  #⊗ identity (Q (G z) (F₂ x))

Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₄
τ₁: F₁ ⟹ F₂
Hτ₁: nat_trans_enrichment τ₁ EF₁ EF₂
τ₂: F₂ ⟹ F₃
Hτ₂: nat_trans_enrichment τ₂ EF₂ EF₃
θ: enriched_profunctor_square EF₁ EG P Q
z: C₃
x: C₁
mon_linvunitor (E₂ ⦃ F₁ x, F₂ x ⦄)
#⊗ identity (Q (G z) (F₁ x))
· (enriched_from_arr E₂ (τ₂ x)
   #⊗ identity (E₂ ⦃ F₁ x, F₂ x ⦄))
  #⊗ identity (Q (G z) (F₁ x))
· mon_lassociator (E₂ ⦃ F₂ x, F₃ x ⦄)
    (E₂ ⦃ F₁ x, F₂ x ⦄) (Q (G z) (F₁ x))
· identity (E₂ ⦃ F₂ x, F₃ x ⦄)
  #⊗ rmap_e Q (G z) (F₁ x) (F₂ x) =
mon_linvunitor (E₂ ⦃ F₁ x, F₂ x ⦄)

· mon_lassociator I_{ V} (E₂ ⦃ F₁ x, F₂ x ⦄)

V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
F₁, F₂, F₃: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF₁: functor_enrichment F₁ E₁ E₂
EF₂: functor_enrichment F₂ E₁ E₂
EF₃: functor_enrichment F₃ E₁ E₂
G: C₃ ⟶ C₄
EG: functor_enrichment G E₃ E₄
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₃
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₄
τ₁: F₁ ⟹ F₂
Hτ₁: nat_trans_enrichment τ₁ EF₁ EF₂
τ₂: F₂ ⟹ F₃
Hτ₂: nat_trans_enrichment τ₂ EF₂ EF₃
θ: enriched_profunctor_square EF₁ EG P Q
z: C₃
x: C₁
mon_linvunitor (E₂ ⦃ F₁ x, F₂ x ⦄)
#⊗ identity (Q (G z) (F₁ x))
· ((enriched_from_arr E₂ (τ₂ x)
    #⊗ identity (E₂ ⦃ F₁ x, F₂ x ⦄))
   #⊗ identity (Q (G z) (F₁ x))
   · (mon_lassociator (E₂ ⦃ F₂ x, F₃ x ⦄)
        (E₂ ⦃ F₁ x, F₂ x ⦄) (Q (G z) (F₁ x))
      · identity (E₂ ⦃ F₂ x, F₃ x ⦄)
        #⊗ rmap_e Q (G z) (F₁ x) (F₂ x))) =
mon_linvunitor (E₂ ⦃ F₁ x, F₂ x ⦄)
#⊗ identity (Q (G z) (F₁ x))
· (mon_lassociator I_{ V} (E₂ ⦃ F₁ x, F₂ x ⦄)
     (Q (G z) (F₁ x))
   · (identity I_{ V} #⊗ rmap_e Q (G z) (F₁ x) (F₂ x)
      · enriched_from_arr E₂ (τ₂ x)
        #⊗ identity (Q (G z) (F₂ x))))

C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category

EF₁: functor_enrichment F₁ E₁ E₂
EF₂: functor_enrichment F₂ E₁ E₂

Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₄
τ₁: F₁ ⟹ F₂
Hτ₁: nat_trans_enrichment τ₁ EF₁ EF₂
τ₂: F₂ ⟹ F₃
Hτ₂: nat_trans_enrichment τ₂ EF₂ EF₃
θ: enriched_profunctor_square EF₁ EG P Q
z: C₃
x: C₁
(enriched_from_arr E₂ (τ₂ x)
 #⊗ identity (E₂ ⦃ F₁ x, F₂ x ⦄))
#⊗ identity (Q (G z) (F₁ x))
· (mon_lassociator (E₂ ⦃ F₂ x, F₃ x ⦄)
     (E₂ ⦃ F₁ x, F₂ x ⦄) (Q (G z) (F₁ x))
   · identity (E₂ ⦃ F₂ x, F₃ x ⦄)
     #⊗ rmap_e Q (G z) (F₁ x) (F₂ x)) =
mon_lassociator I_{ V} (E₂ ⦃ F₁ x, F₂ x ⦄)
  (Q (G z) (F₁ x))
· (identity I_{ V} #⊗ rmap_e Q (G z) (F₁ x) (F₂ x)
   · enriched_from_arr E₂ (τ₂ x)
     #⊗ identity (Q (G z) (F₂ x)))

EF₁: functor_enrichment F₁ E₁ E₂
EF₂: functor_enrichment F₂ E₁ E₂
EF₃: functor_enrichment F₃ E₁ E₂
G: C₃ ⟶ C₄
EG: functor_enrichment G E₃ E₄
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₃
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₄
τ₁: F₁ ⟹ F₂
Hτ₁: nat_trans_enrichment τ₁ EF₁ EF₂
τ₂: F₂ ⟹ F₃
Hτ₂: nat_trans_enrichment τ₂ EF₂ EF₃
θ: enriched_profunctor_square EF₁ EG P Q

x: C₁
(enriched_from_arr E₂ (τ₂ x)
 #⊗ identity (E₂ ⦃ F₁ x, F₂ x ⦄))
#⊗ identity (Q (G z) (F₁ x))
· mon_lassociator (E₂ ⦃ F₂ x, F₃ x ⦄)
    (E₂ ⦃ F₁ x, F₂ x ⦄) (Q (G z) (F₁ x))
· identity (E₂ ⦃ F₂ x, F₃ x ⦄)
  #⊗ rmap_e Q (G z) (F₁ x) (F₂ x) =
mon_lassociator I_{ V} (E₂ ⦃ F₁ x, F₂ x ⦄)
  (Q (G z) (F₁ x))
· identity I_{ V} #⊗ rmap_e Q (G z) (F₁ x) (F₂ x)
· enriched_from_arr E₂ (τ₂ x)
  #⊗ identity (Q (G z) (F₂ x))

  
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
F₁, F₂, F₃: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF₁: functor_enrichment F₁ E₁ E₂
EF₂: functor_enrichment F₂ E₁ E₂
EF₃: functor_enrichment F₃ E₁ E₂
G: C₃ ⟶ C₄
EG: functor_enrichment G E₃ E₄
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₃
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₄
τ₁: F₁ ⟹ F₂
Hτ₁: nat_trans_enrichment τ₁ EF₁ EF₂
τ₂: F₂ ⟹ F₃
Hτ₂: nat_trans_enrichment τ₂ EF₂ EF₃
θ: enriched_profunctor_square EF₁ EG P Q
z: C₃
x: C₁
mon_lassociator I_{ V} (E₂ ⦃ F₁ x, F₂ x ⦄)
  (Q (G z) (F₁ x))
· enriched_from_arr E₂ (τ₂ x)
  #⊗ (identity (E₂ ⦃ F₁ x, F₂ x ⦄)
      #⊗ identity (Q (G z) (F₁ x)))
· identity (E₂ ⦃ F₂ x, F₃ x ⦄)
  #⊗ rmap_e Q (G z) (F₁ x) (F₂ x) =
mon_lassociator I_{ V} (E₂ ⦃ F₁ x, F₂ x ⦄)
  (Q (G z) (F₁ x))
· identity I_{ V} #⊗ rmap_e Q (G z) (F₁ x) (F₂ x)
· enriched_from_arr E₂ (τ₂ x)
  #⊗ identity (Q (G z) (F₂ x))

θ: enriched_profunctor_square EF₁ EG P Q
z: C₃
x: C₁
mon_lassociator I_{ V} (E₂ ⦃ F₁ x, F₂ x ⦄)
  (Q (G z) (F₁ x))
· (enriched_from_arr E₂ (τ₂ x)
   #⊗ (identity (E₂ ⦃ F₁ x, F₂ x ⦄)
       #⊗ identity (Q (G z) (F₁ x)))
   · identity (E₂ ⦃ F₂ x, F₃ x ⦄)
     #⊗ rmap_e Q (G z) (F₁ x) (F₂ x)) =
mon_lassociator I_{ V} (E₂ ⦃ F₁ x, F₂ x ⦄)
  (Q (G z) (F₁ x))
· (identity I_{ V} #⊗ rmap_e Q (G z) (F₁ x) (F₂ x)
   · enriched_from_arr E₂ (τ₂ x)
     #⊗ identity (Q (G z) (F₂ x)))

  
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
F₁, F₂, F₃: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF₁: functor_enrichment F₁ E₁ E₂
EF₂: functor_enrichment F₂ E₁ E₂
EF₃: functor_enrichment F₃ E₁ E₂
G: C₃ ⟶ C₄
EG: functor_enrichment G E₃ E₄
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₃
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₄
τ₁: F₁ ⟹ F₂
Hτ₁: nat_trans_enrichment τ₁ EF₁ EF₂
τ₂: F₂ ⟹ F₃
Hτ₂: nat_trans_enrichment τ₂ EF₂ EF₃
θ: enriched_profunctor_square EF₁ EG P Q
z: C₃
x: C₁
enriched_from_arr E₂ (τ₂ x)
#⊗ (identity (E₂ ⦃ F₁ x, F₂ x ⦄)
    #⊗ identity (Q (G z) (F₁ x)))
· identity (E₂ ⦃ F₂ x, F₃ x ⦄)
  #⊗ rmap_e Q (G z) (F₁ x) (F₂ x) =
identity I_{ V} #⊗ rmap_e Q (G z) (F₁ x) (F₂ x)
· enriched_from_arr E₂ (τ₂ x)
  #⊗ identity (Q (G z) (F₂ x))

  
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
F₁, F₂, F₃: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF₁: functor_enrichment F₁ E₁ E₂
EF₂: functor_enrichment F₂ E₁ E₂
EF₃: functor_enrichment F₃ E₁ E₂
G: C₃ ⟶ C₄
EG: functor_enrichment G E₃ E₄
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₃
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₄
τ₁: F₁ ⟹ F₂
Hτ₁: nat_trans_enrichment τ₁ EF₁ EF₂
τ₂: F₂ ⟹ F₃
Hτ₂: nat_trans_enrichment τ₂ EF₂ EF₃
θ: enriched_profunctor_square EF₁ EG P Q
z: C₃
x: C₁
enriched_from_arr E₂ (τ₂ x)
#⊗ identity ((E₂ ⦃ F₁ x, F₂ x ⦄) ⊗ Q (G z) (F₁ x))
· identity (E₂ ⦃ F₂ x, F₃ x ⦄)
  #⊗ rmap_e Q (G z) (F₁ x) (F₂ x) =
identity I_{ V} #⊗ rmap_e Q (G z) (F₁ x) (F₂ x)
· enriched_from_arr E₂ (τ₂ x)
  #⊗ identity (Q (G z) (F₂ x))

  
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
F₁, F₂, F₃: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF₁: functor_enrichment F₁ E₁ E₂
EF₂: functor_enrichment F₂ E₁ E₂
EF₃: functor_enrichment F₃ E₁ E₂
G: C₃ ⟶ C₄
EG: functor_enrichment G E₃ E₄
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₃
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₄
τ₁: F₁ ⟹ F₂
Hτ₁: nat_trans_enrichment τ₁ EF₁ EF₂
τ₂: F₂ ⟹ F₃
Hτ₂: nat_trans_enrichment τ₂ EF₂ EF₃
θ: enriched_profunctor_square EF₁ EG P Q
z: C₃
x: C₁
enriched_from_arr E₂ (τ₂ x)
#⊗ identity ((E₂ ⦃ F₁ x, F₂ x ⦄) ⊗ Q (G z) (F₁ x))
· identity (E₂ ⦃ F₂ x, F₃ x ⦄)
  #⊗ rmap_e Q (G z) (F₁ x) (F₂ x) =
enriched_from_arr E₂ (τ₂ x)
#⊗ rmap_e Q (G z) (F₁ x) (F₂ x)

  
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
F₁, F₂, F₃: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF₁: functor_enrichment F₁ E₁ E₂
EF₂: functor_enrichment F₂ E₁ E₂
EF₃: functor_enrichment F₃ E₁ E₂
G: C₃ ⟶ C₄
EG: functor_enrichment G E₃ E₄
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₃
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₄
τ₁: F₁ ⟹ F₂
Hτ₁: nat_trans_enrichment τ₁ EF₁ EF₂
τ₂: F₂ ⟹ F₃
Hτ₂: nat_trans_enrichment τ₂ EF₂ EF₃
θ: enriched_profunctor_square EF₁ EG P Q
z: C₃
x: C₁
enriched_from_arr E₂ (τ₂ x)
#⊗ rmap_e Q (G z) (F₁ x) (F₂ x) =
enriched_from_arr E₂ (τ₂ x)
#⊗ rmap_e Q (G z) (F₁ x) (F₂ x)

  apply idpath.
Qed.

(** * 2. Down whiskering and composition *)

V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
G₁, G₂, G₃: C₃ ⟶ C₄
EG₁: functor_enrichment G₁ E₃ E₄
EG₂: functor_enrichment G₂ E₃ E₄
EG₃: functor_enrichment G₃ E₃ E₄
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₃
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₄
τ₁: G₁ ⟹ G₂
Hτ₁: nat_trans_enrichment τ₁ EG₁ EG₂
τ₂: G₂ ⟹ G₃
Hτ₂: nat_trans_enrichment τ₂ EG₂ EG₃
θ: enriched_profunctor_square EF EG₃ P Q
dwhisker_enriched_profunctor_square
  (comp_trans_enrichment Hτ₁ Hτ₂) θ =
dwhisker_enriched_profunctor_square Hτ₁
  (dwhisker_enriched_profunctor_square Hτ₂ θ)


V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
G₁, G₂, G₃: C₃ ⟶ C₄
EG₁: functor_enrichment G₁ E₃ E₄
EG₂: functor_enrichment G₂ E₃ E₄
EG₃: functor_enrichment G₃ E₃ E₄
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₃
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₄
τ₁: G₁ ⟹ G₂
Hτ₁: nat_trans_enrichment τ₁ EG₁ EG₂
τ₂: G₂ ⟹ G₃
Hτ₂: nat_trans_enrichment τ₂ EG₂ EG₃
θ: enriched_profunctor_square EF EG₃ P Q
dwhisker_enriched_profunctor_square
  (comp_trans_enrichment Hτ₁ Hτ₂) θ =
dwhisker_enriched_profunctor_square Hτ₁
  (dwhisker_enriched_profunctor_square Hτ₂ θ)

  
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
G₁, G₂, G₃: C₃ ⟶ C₄
EG₁: functor_enrichment G₁ E₃ E₄
EG₂: functor_enrichment G₂ E₃ E₄
EG₃: functor_enrichment G₃ E₃ E₄
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₃
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₄
τ₁: G₁ ⟹ G₂
Hτ₁: nat_trans_enrichment τ₁ EG₁ EG₂
τ₂: G₂ ⟹ G₃
Hτ₂: nat_trans_enrichment τ₂ EG₂ EG₃
θ: enriched_profunctor_square EF EG₃ P Q
z: C₃
x: C₁
θ z x · mon_linvunitor (Q (G₃ z) (F x))
· enriched_from_arr E₄ (τ₁ z · τ₂ z)
  #⊗ identity (Q (G₃ z) (F x))
· lmap_e Q (G₃ z) (G₁ z) (F x) =
θ z x · mon_linvunitor (Q (G₃ z) (F x))
· enriched_from_arr E₄ (τ₂ z)
  #⊗ identity (Q (G₃ z) (F x))
· lmap_e Q (G₃ z) (G₂ z) (F x)
· mon_linvunitor (Q (G₂ z) (F x))
· enriched_from_arr E₄ (τ₁ z)
  #⊗ identity (Q (G₂ z) (F x))
· lmap_e Q (G₂ z) (G₁ z) (F x)

  
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
G₁, G₂, G₃: C₃ ⟶ C₄
EG₁: functor_enrichment G₁ E₃ E₄
EG₂: functor_enrichment G₂ E₃ E₄
EG₃: functor_enrichment G₃ E₃ E₄
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₃
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₄
τ₁: G₁ ⟹ G₂
Hτ₁: nat_trans_enrichment τ₁ EG₁ EG₂
τ₂: G₂ ⟹ G₃
Hτ₂: nat_trans_enrichment τ₂ EG₂ EG₃
θ: enriched_profunctor_square EF EG₃ P Q
z: C₃
x: C₁
θ z x
· (mon_linvunitor (Q (G₃ z) (F x))
   · (enriched_from_arr E₄ (τ₁ z · τ₂ z)
      #⊗ identity (Q (G₃ z) (F x))
      · lmap_e Q (G₃ z) (G₁ z) (F x))) =
θ z x
· (mon_linvunitor (Q (G₃ z) (F x))
   · (enriched_from_arr E₄ (τ₂ z)
      #⊗ identity (Q (G₃ z) (F x))
      · (lmap_e Q (G₃ z) (G₂ z) (F x)
         · (mon_linvunitor (Q (G₂ z) (F x))
            · (enriched_from_arr E₄ (τ₁ z)
               #⊗ identity (Q (G₂ z) (F x))
               · lmap_e Q (G₂ z) (G₁ z) (F x))))))

  
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
G₁, G₂, G₃: C₃ ⟶ C₄
EG₁: functor_enrichment G₁ E₃ E₄
EG₂: functor_enrichment G₂ E₃ E₄
EG₃: functor_enrichment G₃ E₃ E₄
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₃
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₄
τ₁: G₁ ⟹ G₂
Hτ₁: nat_trans_enrichment τ₁ EG₁ EG₂
τ₂: G₂ ⟹ G₃
Hτ₂: nat_trans_enrichment τ₂ EG₂ EG₃
θ: enriched_profunctor_square EF EG₃ P Q
z: C₃
x: C₁
enriched_from_arr E₄ (τ₁ z · τ₂ z)
#⊗ identity (Q (G₃ z) (F x))
· lmap_e Q (G₃ z) (G₁ z) (F x) =
enriched_from_arr E₄ (τ₂ z)
#⊗ identity (Q (G₃ z) (F x))
· (lmap_e Q (G₃ z) (G₂ z) (F x)
   · (mon_linvunitor (Q (G₂ z) (F x))
      · (enriched_from_arr E₄ (τ₁ z)
         #⊗ identity (Q (G₂ z) (F x))
         · lmap_e Q (G₂ z) (G₁ z) (F x))))

  
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
G₁, G₂, G₃: C₃ ⟶ C₄
EG₁: functor_enrichment G₁ E₃ E₄
EG₂: functor_enrichment G₂ E₃ E₄
EG₃: functor_enrichment G₃ E₃ E₄
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₃
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₄
τ₁: G₁ ⟹ G₂
Hτ₁: nat_trans_enrichment τ₁ EG₁ EG₂
τ₂: G₂ ⟹ G₃
Hτ₂: nat_trans_enrichment τ₂ EG₂ EG₃
θ: enriched_profunctor_square EF EG₃ P Q
z: C₃
x: C₁
enriched_from_arr E₄ (τ₂ z)
#⊗ identity (Q (G₃ z) (F x))
· (lmap_e Q (G₃ z) (G₂ z) (F x)
   · (mon_linvunitor (Q (G₂ z) (F x))
      · (enriched_from_arr E₄ (τ₁ z)
         #⊗ identity (Q (G₂ z) (F x))
         · lmap_e Q (G₂ z) (G₁ z) (F x)))) =
enriched_from_arr E₄ (τ₁ z · τ₂ z)
#⊗ identity (Q (G₃ z) (F x))
· lmap_e Q (G₃ z) (G₁ z) (F x)

  
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
G₁, G₂, G₃: C₃ ⟶ C₄
EG₁: functor_enrichment G₁ E₃ E₄
EG₂: functor_enrichment G₂ E₃ E₄
EG₃: functor_enrichment G₃ E₃ E₄
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₃
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₄
τ₁: G₁ ⟹ G₂
Hτ₁: nat_trans_enrichment τ₁ EG₁ EG₂
τ₂: G₂ ⟹ G₃
Hτ₂: nat_trans_enrichment τ₂ EG₂ EG₃
θ: enriched_profunctor_square EF EG₃ P Q
z: C₃
x: C₁
enriched_from_arr E₄ (τ₂ z)
#⊗ identity (Q (G₃ z) (F x))
· (lmap_e Q (G₃ z) (G₂ z) (F x)
   · (mon_linvunitor (Q (G₂ z) (F x))
      · (enriched_from_arr E₄ (τ₁ z)
         #⊗ identity (Q (G₂ z) (F x))
         · lmap_e Q (G₂ z) (G₁ z) (F x)))) = ?b
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
G₁, G₂, G₃: C₃ ⟶ C₄
EG₁: functor_enrichment G₁ E₃ E₄
EG₂: functor_enrichment G₂ E₃ E₄
EG₃: functor_enrichment G₃ E₃ E₄
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₃
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₄
τ₁: G₁ ⟹ G₂
Hτ₁: nat_trans_enrichment τ₁ EG₁ EG₂
τ₂: G₂ ⟹ G₃
Hτ₂: nat_trans_enrichment τ₂ EG₂ EG₃
θ: enriched_profunctor_square EF EG₃ P Q
z: C₃
x: C₁
?b =
enriched_from_arr E₄ (τ₁ z · τ₂ z)
#⊗ identity (Q (G₃ z) (F x))
· lmap_e Q (G₃ z) (G₁ z) (F x)

  
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
G₁, G₂, G₃: C₃ ⟶ C₄
EG₁: functor_enrichment G₁ E₃ E₄
EG₂: functor_enrichment G₂ E₃ E₄
EG₃: functor_enrichment G₃ E₃ E₄
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₃
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₄
τ₁: G₁ ⟹ G₂
Hτ₁: nat_trans_enrichment τ₁ EG₁ EG₂
τ₂: G₂ ⟹ G₃
Hτ₂: nat_trans_enrichment τ₂ EG₂ EG₃
θ: enriched_profunctor_square EF EG₃ P Q
z: C₃
x: C₁
enriched_from_arr E₄ (τ₂ z)
#⊗ identity (Q (G₃ z) (F x))
· (lmap_e Q (G₃ z) (G₂ z) (F x)
   · (mon_linvunitor (Q (G₂ z) (F x))
      · (enriched_from_arr E₄ (τ₁ z)
         #⊗ identity (Q (G₂ z) (F x))
         · lmap_e Q (G₂ z) (G₁ z) (F x)))) = ?b

    
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
G₁, G₂, G₃: C₃ ⟶ C₄
EG₁: functor_enrichment G₁ E₃ E₄
EG₂: functor_enrichment G₂ E₃ E₄
EG₃: functor_enrichment G₃ E₃ E₄
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₃
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₄
τ₁: G₁ ⟹ G₂
Hτ₁: nat_trans_enrichment τ₁ EG₁ EG₂
τ₂: G₂ ⟹ G₃
Hτ₂: nat_trans_enrichment τ₂ EG₂ EG₃
θ: enriched_profunctor_square EF EG₃ P Q
z: C₃
x: C₁
lmap_e Q (G₃ z) (G₂ z) (F x)
· (mon_linvunitor (Q (G₂ z) (F x))
   · (enriched_from_arr E₄ (τ₁ z)
      #⊗ identity (Q (G₂ z) (F x))
      · lmap_e Q (G₂ z) (G₁ z) (F x))) = ?t2

    
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
G₁, G₂, G₃: C₃ ⟶ C₄
EG₁: functor_enrichment G₁ E₃ E₄
EG₂: functor_enrichment G₂ E₃ E₄
EG₃: functor_enrichment G₃ E₃ E₄
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₃
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₄
τ₁: G₁ ⟹ G₂
Hτ₁: nat_trans_enrichment τ₁ EG₁ EG₂
τ₂: G₂ ⟹ G₃
Hτ₂: nat_trans_enrichment τ₂ EG₂ EG₃
θ: enriched_profunctor_square EF EG₃ P Q
z: C₃
x: C₁
lmap_e Q (G₃ z) (G₂ z) (F x)
· mon_linvunitor (Q (G₂ z) (F x))
· enriched_from_arr E₄ (τ₁ z)
  #⊗ identity (Q (G₂ z) (F x))
· lmap_e Q (G₂ z) (G₁ z) (F x) = ?t2

    
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
G₁, G₂, G₃: C₃ ⟶ C₄
EG₁: functor_enrichment G₁ E₃ E₄
EG₂: functor_enrichment G₂ E₃ E₄
EG₃: functor_enrichment G₃ E₃ E₄
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₃
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₄
τ₁: G₁ ⟹ G₂
Hτ₁: nat_trans_enrichment τ₁ EG₁ EG₂
τ₂: G₂ ⟹ G₃
Hτ₂: nat_trans_enrichment τ₂ EG₂ EG₃
θ: enriched_profunctor_square EF EG₃ P Q
z: C₃
x: C₁
mon_linvunitor ((E₄ ⦃ G₂ z, G₃ z ⦄) ⊗ Q (G₃ z) (F x))
· identity I_{ V} #⊗ lmap_e Q (G₃ z) (G₂ z) (F x)
· enriched_from_arr E₄ (τ₁ z)
  #⊗ identity (Q (G₂ z) (F x))
· lmap_e Q (G₂ z) (G₁ z) (F x) = ?t2

    
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
G₁, G₂, G₃: C₃ ⟶ C₄
EG₁: functor_enrichment G₁ E₃ E₄
EG₂: functor_enrichment G₂ E₃ E₄
EG₃: functor_enrichment G₃ E₃ E₄
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₃
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₄
τ₁: G₁ ⟹ G₂
Hτ₁: nat_trans_enrichment τ₁ EG₁ EG₂
τ₂: G₂ ⟹ G₃
Hτ₂: nat_trans_enrichment τ₂ EG₂ EG₃
θ: enriched_profunctor_square EF EG₃ P Q
z: C₃
x: C₁
mon_linvunitor ((E₄ ⦃ G₂ z, G₃ z ⦄) ⊗ Q (G₃ z) (F x))
· (identity I_{ V} #⊗ lmap_e Q (G₃ z) (G₂ z) (F x)
   · (enriched_from_arr E₄ (τ₁ z)
      #⊗ identity (Q (G₂ z) (F x))
      · lmap_e Q (G₂ z) (G₁ z) (F x))) = ?t2

    
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
G₁, G₂, G₃: C₃ ⟶ C₄
EG₁: functor_enrichment G₁ E₃ E₄
EG₂: functor_enrichment G₂ E₃ E₄
EG₃: functor_enrichment G₃ E₃ E₄
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₃
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₄
τ₁: G₁ ⟹ G₂
Hτ₁: nat_trans_enrichment τ₁ EG₁ EG₂
τ₂: G₂ ⟹ G₃
Hτ₂: nat_trans_enrichment τ₂ EG₂ EG₃
θ: enriched_profunctor_square EF EG₃ P Q
z: C₃
x: C₁
identity I_{ V} #⊗ lmap_e Q (G₃ z) (G₂ z) (F x)
· (enriched_from_arr E₄ (τ₁ z)
   #⊗ identity (Q (G₂ z) (F x))
   · lmap_e Q (G₂ z) (G₁ z) (F x)) = ?t2

    
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
G₁, G₂, G₃: C₃ ⟶ C₄
EG₁: functor_enrichment G₁ E₃ E₄
EG₂: functor_enrichment G₂ E₃ E₄
EG₃: functor_enrichment G₃ E₃ E₄
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₃
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₄
τ₁: G₁ ⟹ G₂
Hτ₁: nat_trans_enrichment τ₁ EG₁ EG₂
τ₂: G₂ ⟹ G₃
Hτ₂: nat_trans_enrichment τ₂ EG₂ EG₃
θ: enriched_profunctor_square EF EG₃ P Q
z: C₃
x: C₁
identity I_{ V} #⊗ lmap_e Q (G₃ z) (G₂ z) (F x)
· enriched_from_arr E₄ (τ₁ z)
  #⊗ identity (Q (G₂ z) (F x))
· lmap_e Q (G₂ z) (G₁ z) (F x) = ?t2

    
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
G₁, G₂, G₃: C₃ ⟶ C₄
EG₁: functor_enrichment G₁ E₃ E₄
EG₂: functor_enrichment G₂ E₃ E₄
EG₃: functor_enrichment G₃ E₃ E₄
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₃
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₄
τ₁: G₁ ⟹ G₂
Hτ₁: nat_trans_enrichment τ₁ EG₁ EG₂
τ₂: G₂ ⟹ G₃
Hτ₂: nat_trans_enrichment τ₂ EG₂ EG₃
θ: enriched_profunctor_square EF EG₃ P Q
z: C₃
x: C₁
enriched_from_arr E₄ (τ₁ z)
#⊗ lmap_e Q (G₃ z) (G₂ z) (F x)
· lmap_e Q (G₂ z) (G₁ z) (F x) = ?t2

    
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
G₁, G₂, G₃: C₃ ⟶ C₄
EG₁: functor_enrichment G₁ E₃ E₄
EG₂: functor_enrichment G₂ E₃ E₄
EG₃: functor_enrichment G₃ E₃ E₄
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₃
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₄
τ₁: G₁ ⟹ G₂
Hτ₁: nat_trans_enrichment τ₁ EG₁ EG₂
τ₂: G₂ ⟹ G₃
Hτ₂: nat_trans_enrichment τ₂ EG₂ EG₃
θ: enriched_profunctor_square EF EG₃ P Q
z: C₃
x: C₁
enriched_from_arr E₄ (τ₁ z)
#⊗ identity ((E₄ ⦃ G₂ z, G₃ z ⦄) ⊗ Q (G₃ z) (F x))
· identity (E₄ ⦃ G₁ z, G₂ z ⦄)
  #⊗ lmap_e Q (G₃ z) (G₂ z) (F x)
· lmap_e Q (G₂ z) (G₁ z) (F x) = ?t2

    
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
G₁, G₂, G₃: C₃ ⟶ C₄
EG₁: functor_enrichment G₁ E₃ E₄
EG₂: functor_enrichment G₂ E₃ E₄
EG₃: functor_enrichment G₃ E₃ E₄
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₃
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₄
τ₁: G₁ ⟹ G₂
Hτ₁: nat_trans_enrichment τ₁ EG₁ EG₂
τ₂: G₂ ⟹ G₃
Hτ₂: nat_trans_enrichment τ₂ EG₂ EG₃
θ: enriched_profunctor_square EF EG₃ P Q
z: C₃
x: C₁
enriched_from_arr E₄ (τ₁ z)
#⊗ identity ((E₄ ⦃ G₂ z, G₃ z ⦄) ⊗ Q (G₃ z) (F x))
· (identity (E₄ ⦃ G₁ z, G₂ z ⦄)
   #⊗ lmap_e Q (G₃ z) (G₂ z) (F x)
   · lmap_e Q (G₂ z) (G₁ z) (F x)) = ?t2

    
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
G₁, G₂, G₃: C₃ ⟶ C₄
EG₁: functor_enrichment G₁ E₃ E₄
EG₂: functor_enrichment G₂ E₃ E₄
EG₃: functor_enrichment G₃ E₃ E₄
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₃
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₄
τ₁: G₁ ⟹ G₂
Hτ₁: nat_trans_enrichment τ₁ EG₁ EG₂
τ₂: G₂ ⟹ G₃
Hτ₂: nat_trans_enrichment τ₂ EG₂ EG₃
θ: enriched_profunctor_square EF EG₃ P Q
z: C₃
x: C₁
enriched_from_arr E₄ (τ₁ z)
#⊗ identity ((E₄ ⦃ G₂ z, G₃ z ⦄) ⊗ Q (G₃ z) (F x))
· (mon_rassociator (E₄ ⦃ G₁ z, G₂ z ⦄)
     (E₄ ⦃ G₂ z, G₃ z ⦄) (Q (G₃ z) (F x))
   · sym_mon_braiding V (E₄ ⦃ G₁ z, G₂ z ⦄)
       (E₄ ⦃ G₂ z, G₃ z ⦄)
     #⊗ identity (Q (G₃ z) (F x))
   · enriched_comp E₄ (G₁ z) (G₂ z) (G₃ z)
     #⊗ identity (Q (G₃ z) (F x))
   · lmap_e Q (G₃ z) (G₁ z) (F x)) = ?t2

    apply idpath.
  
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
G₁, G₂, G₃: C₃ ⟶ C₄
EG₁: functor_enrichment G₁ E₃ E₄
EG₂: functor_enrichment G₂ E₃ E₄
EG₃: functor_enrichment G₃ E₃ E₄
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₃
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₄
τ₁: G₁ ⟹ G₂
Hτ₁: nat_trans_enrichment τ₁ EG₁ EG₂
τ₂: G₂ ⟹ G₃
Hτ₂: nat_trans_enrichment τ₂ EG₂ EG₃
θ: enriched_profunctor_square EF EG₃ P Q
z: C₃
x: C₁
enriched_from_arr E₄ (τ₂ z)
#⊗ identity (Q (G₃ z) (F x))
· (mon_linvunitor
     ((E₄ ⦃ G₂ z, G₃ z ⦄) ⊗ Q (G₃ z) (F x))
   · (enriched_from_arr E₄ (τ₁ z)
      #⊗ identity
           ((E₄ ⦃ G₂ z, G₃ z ⦄) ⊗ Q (G₃ z) (F x))
      · (mon_rassociator (E₄ ⦃ G₁ z, G₂ z ⦄)
           (E₄ ⦃ G₂ z, G₃ z ⦄) (Q (G₃ z) (F x))
         · sym_mon_braiding V (E₄ ⦃ G₁ z, G₂ z ⦄)
             (E₄ ⦃ G₂ z, G₃ z ⦄)
           #⊗ identity (Q (G₃ z) (F x))
         · enriched_comp E₄ (G₁ z) (G₂ z) (G₃ z)
           #⊗ identity (Q (G₃ z) (F x))
         · lmap_e Q (G₃ z) (G₁ z) (F x)))) =
enriched_from_arr E₄ (τ₁ z · τ₂ z)
#⊗ identity (Q (G₃ z) (F x))
· lmap_e Q (G₃ z) (G₁ z) (F x)

  
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
G₁, G₂, G₃: C₃ ⟶ C₄
EG₁: functor_enrichment G₁ E₃ E₄
EG₂: functor_enrichment G₂ E₃ E₄
EG₃: functor_enrichment G₃ E₃ E₄
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₃
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₄
τ₁: G₁ ⟹ G₂
Hτ₁: nat_trans_enrichment τ₁ EG₁ EG₂
τ₂: G₂ ⟹ G₃
Hτ₂: nat_trans_enrichment τ₂ EG₂ EG₃
θ: enriched_profunctor_square EF EG₃ P Q
z: C₃
x: C₁
enriched_from_arr E₄ (τ₂ z)
#⊗ identity (Q (G₃ z) (F x))
· mon_linvunitor
    ((E₄ ⦃ G₂ z, G₃ z ⦄) ⊗ Q (G₃ z) (F x))
· enriched_from_arr E₄ (τ₁ z)
  #⊗ identity ((E₄ ⦃ G₂ z, G₃ z ⦄) ⊗ Q (G₃ z) (F x))
· mon_rassociator (E₄ ⦃ G₁ z, G₂ z ⦄)
    (E₄ ⦃ G₂ z, G₃ z ⦄) (Q (G₃ z) (F x))
· sym_mon_braiding V (E₄ ⦃ G₁ z, G₂ z ⦄)
    (E₄ ⦃ G₂ z, G₃ z ⦄) #⊗ identity (Q (G₃ z) (F x))
· enriched_comp E₄ (G₁ z) (G₂ z) (G₃ z)
  #⊗ identity (Q (G₃ z) (F x))
· lmap_e Q (G₃ z) (G₁ z) (F x) =
enriched_from_arr E₄ (τ₁ z · τ₂ z)
#⊗ identity (Q (G₃ z) (F x))
· lmap_e Q (G₃ z) (G₁ z) (F x)

  
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
G₁, G₂, G₃: C₃ ⟶ C₄
EG₁: functor_enrichment G₁ E₃ E₄
EG₂: functor_enrichment G₂ E₃ E₄
EG₃: functor_enrichment G₃ E₃ E₄
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₃
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₄
τ₁: G₁ ⟹ G₂
Hτ₁: nat_trans_enrichment τ₁ EG₁ EG₂
τ₂: G₂ ⟹ G₃
Hτ₂: nat_trans_enrichment τ₂ EG₂ EG₃
θ: enriched_profunctor_square EF EG₃ P Q
z: C₃
x: C₁
enriched_from_arr E₄ (τ₂ z)
#⊗ identity (Q (G₃ z) (F x))
· mon_linvunitor
    ((E₄ ⦃ G₂ z, G₃ z ⦄) ⊗ Q (G₃ z) (F x))
· enriched_from_arr E₄ (τ₁ z)
  #⊗ identity ((E₄ ⦃ G₂ z, G₃ z ⦄) ⊗ Q (G₃ z) (F x))
· mon_rassociator (E₄ ⦃ G₁ z, G₂ z ⦄)
    (E₄ ⦃ G₂ z, G₃ z ⦄) (Q (G₃ z) (F x))
· sym_mon_braiding V (E₄ ⦃ G₁ z, G₂ z ⦄)
    (E₄ ⦃ G₂ z, G₃ z ⦄) #⊗ identity (Q (G₃ z) (F x))
· enriched_comp E₄ (G₁ z) (G₂ z) (G₃ z)
  #⊗ identity (Q (G₃ z) (F x)) =
enriched_from_arr E₄ (τ₁ z · τ₂ z)
#⊗ identity (Q (G₃ z) (F x))

  
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
G₁, G₂, G₃: C₃ ⟶ C₄
EG₁: functor_enrichment G₁ E₃ E₄
EG₂: functor_enrichment G₂ E₃ E₄
EG₃: functor_enrichment G₃ E₃ E₄
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₃
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₄
τ₁: G₁ ⟹ G₂
Hτ₁: nat_trans_enrichment τ₁ EG₁ EG₂
τ₂: G₂ ⟹ G₃
Hτ₂: nat_trans_enrichment τ₂ EG₂ EG₃
θ: enriched_profunctor_square EF EG₃ P Q
z: C₃
x: C₁
enriched_from_arr E₄ (τ₂ z)
#⊗ identity (Q (G₃ z) (F x))
· mon_linvunitor
    ((E₄ ⦃ G₂ z, G₃ z ⦄) ⊗ Q (G₃ z) (F x))
· enriched_from_arr E₄ (τ₁ z)
  #⊗ identity ((E₄ ⦃ G₂ z, G₃ z ⦄) ⊗ Q (G₃ z) (F x))
· mon_rassociator (E₄ ⦃ G₁ z, G₂ z ⦄)
    (E₄ ⦃ G₂ z, G₃ z ⦄) (Q (G₃ z) (F x))
· sym_mon_braiding V (E₄ ⦃ G₁ z, G₂ z ⦄)
    (E₄ ⦃ G₂ z, G₃ z ⦄) #⊗ identity (Q (G₃ z) (F x))
· enriched_comp E₄ (G₁ z) (G₂ z) (G₃ z)
  #⊗ identity (Q (G₃ z) (F x)) =
(mon_linvunitor I_{ V}
 · enriched_from_arr E₄ (τ₂ z)
   #⊗ enriched_from_arr E₄ (τ₁ z)
 · enriched_comp E₄ (G₁ z) (G₂ z) (G₃ z))
#⊗ identity (Q (G₃ z) (F x))

enriched_from_arr E₄ (τ₂ z)
#⊗ identity (Q (G₃ z) (F x))
· mon_linvunitor
    ((E₄ ⦃ G₂ z, G₃ z ⦄) ⊗ Q (G₃ z) (F x))
· enriched_from_arr E₄ (τ₁ z)
  #⊗ identity ((E₄ ⦃ G₂ z, G₃ z ⦄) ⊗ Q (G₃ z) (F x))
· mon_rassociator (E₄ ⦃ G₁ z, G₂ z ⦄)
    (E₄ ⦃ G₂ z, G₃ z ⦄) (Q (G₃ z) (F x))
· sym_mon_braiding V (E₄ ⦃ G₁ z, G₂ z ⦄)
    (E₄ ⦃ G₂ z, G₃ z ⦄) #⊗ identity (Q (G₃ z) (F x))
· enriched_comp E₄ (G₁ z) (G₂ z) (G₃ z)
  #⊗ identity (Q (G₃ z) (F x)) =
(mon_linvunitor I_{ V}
 · enriched_from_arr E₄ (τ₂ z)
   #⊗ enriched_from_arr E₄ (τ₁ z))
#⊗ identity (Q (G₃ z) (F x))
· enriched_comp E₄ (G₁ z) (G₂ z) (G₃ z)

EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂

EG₁: functor_enrichment G₁ E₃ E₄
EG₂: functor_enrichment G₂ E₃ E₄
EG₃: functor_enrichment G₃ E₃ E₄
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₃
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₄
τ₁: G₁ ⟹ G₂
Hτ₁: nat_trans_enrichment τ₁ EG₁ EG₂
τ₂: G₂ ⟹ G₃
Hτ₂: nat_trans_enrichment τ₂ EG₂ EG₃
θ: enriched_profunctor_square EF EG₃ P Q

enriched_from_arr E₄ (τ₂ z)
#⊗ identity (Q (G₃ z) (F x))
· mon_linvunitor
    ((E₄ ⦃ G₂ z, G₃ z ⦄) ⊗ Q (G₃ z) (F x))
· enriched_from_arr E₄ (τ₁ z)
  #⊗ identity ((E₄ ⦃ G₂ z, G₃ z ⦄) ⊗ Q (G₃ z) (F x))
· mon_rassociator (E₄ ⦃ G₁ z, G₂ z ⦄)
    (E₄ ⦃ G₂ z, G₃ z ⦄) (Q (G₃ z) (F x))
· sym_mon_braiding V (E₄ ⦃ G₁ z, G₂ z ⦄)
    (E₄ ⦃ G₂ z, G₃ z ⦄) #⊗ identity (Q (G₃ z) (F x)) =
(mon_linvunitor I_{ V}
 · enriched_from_arr E₄ (τ₂ z)
   #⊗ enriched_from_arr E₄ (τ₁ z))
#⊗ identity (Q (G₃ z) (F x))

  
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
G₁, G₂, G₃: C₃ ⟶ C₄
EG₁: functor_enrichment G₁ E₃ E₄
EG₂: functor_enrichment G₂ E₃ E₄
EG₃: functor_enrichment G₃ E₃ E₄
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₃
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₄
τ₁: G₁ ⟹ G₂
Hτ₁: nat_trans_enrichment τ₁ EG₁ EG₂
τ₂: G₂ ⟹ G₃
Hτ₂: nat_trans_enrichment τ₂ EG₂ EG₃
θ: enriched_profunctor_square EF EG₃ P Q
z: C₃
x: C₁
enriched_from_arr E₄ (τ₂ z)
#⊗ identity (Q (G₃ z) (F x))
· mon_linvunitor
    ((E₄ ⦃ G₂ z, G₃ z ⦄) ⊗ Q (G₃ z) (F x))
· enriched_from_arr E₄ (τ₁ z)
  #⊗ identity ((E₄ ⦃ G₂ z, G₃ z ⦄) ⊗ Q (G₃ z) (F x))
· mon_rassociator (E₄ ⦃ G₁ z, G₂ z ⦄)
    (E₄ ⦃ G₂ z, G₃ z ⦄) (Q (G₃ z) (F x))
· sym_mon_braiding V (E₄ ⦃ G₁ z, G₂ z ⦄)
    (E₄ ⦃ G₂ z, G₃ z ⦄) #⊗ identity (Q (G₃ z) (F x)) =
?b
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
G₁, G₂, G₃: C₃ ⟶ C₄
EG₁: functor_enrichment G₁ E₃ E₄
EG₂: functor_enrichment G₂ E₃ E₄
EG₃: functor_enrichment G₃ E₃ E₄
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₃
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₄
τ₁: G₁ ⟹ G₂
Hτ₁: nat_trans_enrichment τ₁ EG₁ EG₂
τ₂: G₂ ⟹ G₃
Hτ₂: nat_trans_enrichment τ₂ EG₂ EG₃
θ: enriched_profunctor_square EF EG₃ P Q
z: C₃
x: C₁
?b =
(mon_linvunitor I_{ V}
 · enriched_from_arr E₄ (τ₂ z)
   #⊗ enriched_from_arr E₄ (τ₁ z))
#⊗ identity (Q (G₃ z) (F x))

  
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
G₁, G₂, G₃: C₃ ⟶ C₄
EG₁: functor_enrichment G₁ E₃ E₄
EG₂: functor_enrichment G₂ E₃ E₄
EG₃: functor_enrichment G₃ E₃ E₄
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₃
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₄
τ₁: G₁ ⟹ G₂
Hτ₁: nat_trans_enrichment τ₁ EG₁ EG₂
τ₂: G₂ ⟹ G₃
Hτ₂: nat_trans_enrichment τ₂ EG₂ EG₃
θ: enriched_profunctor_square EF EG₃ P Q
z: C₃
x: C₁
enriched_from_arr E₄ (τ₂ z)
#⊗ identity (Q (G₃ z) (F x))
· mon_linvunitor
    ((E₄ ⦃ G₂ z, G₃ z ⦄) ⊗ Q (G₃ z) (F x))
· enriched_from_arr E₄ (τ₁ z)
  #⊗ identity ((E₄ ⦃ G₂ z, G₃ z ⦄) ⊗ Q (G₃ z) (F x))
· mon_rassociator (E₄ ⦃ G₁ z, G₂ z ⦄)
    (E₄ ⦃ G₂ z, G₃ z ⦄) (Q (G₃ z) (F x))
· sym_mon_braiding V (E₄ ⦃ G₁ z, G₂ z ⦄)
    (E₄ ⦃ G₂ z, G₃ z ⦄) #⊗ identity (Q (G₃ z) (F x)) =
?b

    
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
G₁, G₂, G₃: C₃ ⟶ C₄
EG₁: functor_enrichment G₁ E₃ E₄
EG₂: functor_enrichment G₂ E₃ E₄
EG₃: functor_enrichment G₃ E₃ E₄
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₃
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₄
τ₁: G₁ ⟹ G₂
Hτ₁: nat_trans_enrichment τ₁ EG₁ EG₂
τ₂: G₂ ⟹ G₃
Hτ₂: nat_trans_enrichment τ₂ EG₂ EG₃
θ: enriched_profunctor_square EF EG₃ P Q
z: C₃
x: C₁
enriched_from_arr E₄ (τ₂ z)
#⊗ identity (Q (G₃ z) (F x))
· (mon_linvunitor
     ((E₄ ⦃ G₂ z, G₃ z ⦄) ⊗ Q (G₃ z) (F x))
   · (enriched_from_arr E₄ (τ₁ z)
      #⊗ identity
           ((E₄ ⦃ G₂ z, G₃ z ⦄) ⊗ Q (G₃ z) (F x))
      · (mon_rassociator (E₄ ⦃ G₁ z, G₂ z ⦄)
           (E₄ ⦃ G₂ z, G₃ z ⦄) (Q (G₃ z) (F x))
         · sym_mon_braiding V (E₄ ⦃ G₁ z, G₂ z ⦄)
             (E₄ ⦃ G₂ z, G₃ z ⦄)
           #⊗ identity (Q (G₃ z) (F x))))) = ?b

     #⊗ identity (Q (G₃ z) (F x))) = ?t2

V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂

EG₂: functor_enrichment G₂ E₃ E₄
EG₃: functor_enrichment G₃ E₃ E₄

τ₂: G₂ ⟹ G₃

z: C₃
x: C₁
enriched_from_arr E₄ (τ₁ z)
#⊗ (identity (E₄ ⦃ G₂ z, G₃ z ⦄)
    #⊗ identity (Q (G₃ z) (F x)))
· mon_rassociator (E₄ ⦃ G₁ z, G₂ z ⦄)

· sym_mon_braiding V (E₄ ⦃ G₁ z, G₂ z ⦄)
    (E₄ ⦃ G₂ z, G₃ z ⦄) #⊗ identity (Q (G₃ z) (F x)) =
?t2

    
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂

EG₂: functor_enrichment G₂ E₃ E₄
EG₃: functor_enrichment G₃ E₃ E₄
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₃
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₄

Hτ₁: nat_trans_enrichment τ₁ EG₁ EG₂
τ₂: G₂ ⟹ G₃
Hτ₂: nat_trans_enrichment τ₂ EG₂ EG₃
θ: enriched_profunctor_square EF EG₃ P Q
z: C₃
x: C₁
mon_rassociator I_{ V} (E₄ ⦃ G₂ z, G₃ z ⦄)
  (Q (G₃ z) (F x))
· (enriched_from_arr E₄ (τ₁ z)
   #⊗ identity (E₄ ⦃ G₂ z, G₃ z ⦄))
  #⊗ identity (Q (G₃ z) (F x))
· sym_mon_braiding V (E₄ ⦃ G₁ z, G₂ z ⦄)
    (E₄ ⦃ G₂ z, G₃ z ⦄) #⊗ identity (Q (G₃ z) (F x)) =
?t2

· (enriched_from_arr E₄ (τ₁ z)
   #⊗ identity (E₄ ⦃ G₂ z, G₃ z ⦄)
   · sym_mon_braiding V (E₄ ⦃ G₁ z, G₂ z ⦄)

V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
G₁, G₂, G₃: C₃ ⟶ C₄
EG₁: functor_enrichment G₁ E₃ E₄
EG₂: functor_enrichment G₂ E₃ E₄
EG₃: functor_enrichment G₃ E₃ E₄
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₃
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₄
τ₁: G₁ ⟹ G₂
Hτ₁: nat_trans_enrichment τ₁ EG₁ EG₂
τ₂: G₂ ⟹ G₃
Hτ₂: nat_trans_enrichment τ₂ EG₂ EG₃
θ: enriched_profunctor_square EF EG₃ P Q
z: C₃
x: C₁
mon_rassociator I_{ V} (E₄ ⦃ G₂ z, G₃ z ⦄)
  (Q (G₃ z) (F x))
· (sym_mon_braiding V I_{ V} (E₄ ⦃ G₂ z, G₃ z ⦄)
   · identity (E₄ ⦃ G₂ z, G₃ z ⦄)
     #⊗ enriched_from_arr E₄ (τ₁ z))
  #⊗ identity (Q (G₃ z) (F x)) = ?t2

    
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
G₁, G₂, G₃: C₃ ⟶ C₄
EG₁: functor_enrichment G₁ E₃ E₄
EG₂: functor_enrichment G₂ E₃ E₄
EG₃: functor_enrichment G₃ E₃ E₄
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₃
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₄
τ₁: G₁ ⟹ G₂
Hτ₁: nat_trans_enrichment τ₁ EG₁ EG₂
τ₂: G₂ ⟹ G₃
Hτ₂: nat_trans_enrichment τ₂ EG₂ EG₃
θ: enriched_profunctor_square EF EG₃ P Q
z: C₃
x: C₁
mon_rassociator I_{ V} (E₄ ⦃ G₂ z, G₃ z ⦄)
  (Q (G₃ z) (F x))
· (sym_mon_braiding V I_{ V} (E₄ ⦃ G₂ z, G₃ z ⦄)
   #⊗ identity (Q (G₃ z) (F x))
   · (identity (E₄ ⦃ G₂ z, G₃ z ⦄)
      #⊗ enriched_from_arr E₄ (τ₁ z))
     #⊗ identity (Q (G₃ z) (F x))) = ?t2

    apply idpath.
  
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
G₁, G₂, G₃: C₃ ⟶ C₄
EG₁: functor_enrichment G₁ E₃ E₄
EG₂: functor_enrichment G₂ E₃ E₄
EG₃: functor_enrichment G₃ E₃ E₄
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₃
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₄
τ₁: G₁ ⟹ G₂
Hτ₁: nat_trans_enrichment τ₁ EG₁ EG₂
τ₂: G₂ ⟹ G₃
Hτ₂: nat_trans_enrichment τ₂ EG₂ EG₃
θ: enriched_profunctor_square EF EG₃ P Q
z: C₃
x: C₁
enriched_from_arr E₄ (τ₂ z)
#⊗ identity (Q (G₃ z) (F x))
· (mon_linvunitor
     ((E₄ ⦃ G₂ z, G₃ z ⦄) ⊗ Q (G₃ z) (F x))
   · (mon_rassociator I_{ V} (E₄ ⦃ G₂ z, G₃ z ⦄)
        (Q (G₃ z) (F x))
      · (sym_mon_braiding V I_{ V} (E₄ ⦃ G₂ z, G₃ z ⦄)
         #⊗ identity (Q (G₃ z) (F x))
         · (identity (E₄ ⦃ G₂ z, G₃ z ⦄)
            #⊗ enriched_from_arr E₄ (τ₁ z))
           #⊗ identity (Q (G₃ z) (F x))))) =
(mon_linvunitor I_{ V}
 · enriched_from_arr E₄ (τ₂ z)
   #⊗ enriched_from_arr E₄ (τ₁ z))
#⊗ identity (Q (G₃ z) (F x))

  
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
G₁, G₂, G₃: C₃ ⟶ C₄

EG₂: functor_enrichment G₂ E₃ E₄
EG₃: functor_enrichment G₃ E₃ E₄

τ₂: G₂ ⟹ G₃
Hτ₂: nat_trans_enrichment τ₂ EG₂ EG₃
θ: enriched_profunctor_square EF EG₃ P Q
z: C₃
x: C₁
(mon_linvunitor I_{ V}
 · enriched_from_arr E₄ (τ₂ z)
   #⊗ enriched_from_arr E₄ (τ₁ z))
#⊗ identity (Q (G₃ z) (F x)) =
enriched_from_arr E₄ (τ₂ z)
#⊗ identity (Q (G₃ z) (F x))
· (mon_linvunitor
     ((E₄ ⦃ G₂ z, G₃ z ⦄) ⊗ Q (G₃ z) (F x))
   · (mon_rassociator I_{ V} (E₄ ⦃ G₂ z, G₃ z ⦄)
        (Q (G₃ z) (F x))
      · (sym_mon_braiding V I_{ V} (E₄ ⦃ G₂ z, G₃ z ⦄)
         #⊗ identity (Q (G₃ z) (F x))
         · (identity (E₄ ⦃ G₂ z, G₃ z ⦄)
            #⊗ enriched_from_arr E₄ (τ₁ z))
           #⊗ identity (Q (G₃ z) (F x)))))

z: C₃

(mon_linvunitor I_{ V}

V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂

EG₁: functor_enrichment G₁ E₃ E₄
EG₂: functor_enrichment G₂ E₃ E₄
EG₃: functor_enrichment G₃ E₃ E₄

τ₂: G₂ ⟹ G₃

θ: enriched_profunctor_square EF EG₃ P Q
z: C₃
x: C₁
?b =
enriched_from_arr E₄ (τ₂ z)
#⊗ identity (Q (G₃ z) (F x))
· (mon_linvunitor
     ((E₄ ⦃ G₂ z, G₃ z ⦄) ⊗ Q (G₃ z) (F x))
   · (mon_rassociator I_{ V} (E₄ ⦃ G₂ z, G₃ z ⦄)
        (Q (G₃ z) (F x))
      · (sym_mon_braiding V I_{ V} (E₄ ⦃ G₂ z, G₃ z ⦄)
         #⊗ identity (Q (G₃ z) (F x))
         · (identity (E₄ ⦃ G₂ z, G₃ z ⦄)
            #⊗ enriched_from_arr E₄ (τ₁ z))
           #⊗ identity (Q (G₃ z) (F x)))))

EG₁: functor_enrichment G₁ E₃ E₄
EG₂: functor_enrichment G₂ E₃ E₄
EG₃: functor_enrichment G₃ E₃ E₄
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₃
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₄
τ₁: G₁ ⟹ G₂
Hτ₁: nat_trans_enrichment τ₁ EG₁ EG₂
τ₂: G₂ ⟹ G₃
Hτ₂: nat_trans_enrichment τ₂ EG₂ EG₃
θ: enriched_profunctor_square EF EG₃ P Q
z: C₃
x: C₁
mon_linvunitor I_{ V}
· (enriched_from_arr E₄ (τ₂ z) #⊗ identity I_{ V}
   · identity (E₄ ⦃ G₂ z, G₃ z ⦄)
     #⊗ enriched_from_arr E₄ (τ₁ z)) = ?y'

    
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
G₁, G₂, G₃: C₃ ⟶ C₄
EG₁: functor_enrichment G₁ E₃ E₄
EG₂: functor_enrichment G₂ E₃ E₄
EG₃: functor_enrichment G₃ E₃ E₄
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₃
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₄
τ₁: G₁ ⟹ G₂
Hτ₁: nat_trans_enrichment τ₁ EG₁ EG₂
τ₂: G₂ ⟹ G₃
Hτ₂: nat_trans_enrichment τ₂ EG₂ EG₃
θ: enriched_profunctor_square EF EG₃ P Q
z: C₃
x: C₁
mon_linvunitor I_{ V}
· enriched_from_arr E₄ (τ₂ z) #⊗ identity I_{ V}
· identity (E₄ ⦃ G₂ z, G₃ z ⦄)
  #⊗ enriched_from_arr E₄ (τ₁ z) = ?y'

    
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
G₁, G₂, G₃: C₃ ⟶ C₄
EG₁: functor_enrichment G₁ E₃ E₄
EG₂: functor_enrichment G₂ E₃ E₄
EG₃: functor_enrichment G₃ E₃ E₄
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₃
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₄
τ₁: G₁ ⟹ G₂
Hτ₁: nat_trans_enrichment τ₁ EG₁ EG₂
τ₂: G₂ ⟹ G₃
Hτ₂: nat_trans_enrichment τ₂ EG₂ EG₃
θ: enriched_profunctor_square EF EG₃ P Q
z: C₃
x: C₁
mon_rinvunitor I_{ V}
· enriched_from_arr E₄ (τ₂ z) #⊗ identity I_{ V}
· identity (E₄ ⦃ G₂ z, G₃ z ⦄)
  #⊗ enriched_from_arr E₄ (τ₁ z) = ?y'

    
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
G₁, G₂, G₃: C₃ ⟶ C₄
EG₁: functor_enrichment G₁ E₃ E₄
EG₂: functor_enrichment G₂ E₃ E₄
EG₃: functor_enrichment G₃ E₃ E₄
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₃
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₄
τ₁: G₁ ⟹ G₂
Hτ₁: nat_trans_enrichment τ₁ EG₁ EG₂
τ₂: G₂ ⟹ G₃
Hτ₂: nat_trans_enrichment τ₂ EG₂ EG₃
θ: enriched_profunctor_square EF EG₃ P Q
z: C₃
x: C₁
enriched_from_arr E₄ (τ₂ z)
· mon_rinvunitor (E₄ ⦃ G₂ z, G₃ z ⦄)
· identity (E₄ ⦃ G₂ z, G₃ z ⦄)
  #⊗ enriched_from_arr E₄ (τ₁ z) = ?y'

    apply idpath.
  
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
G₁, G₂, G₃: C₃ ⟶ C₄
EG₁: functor_enrichment G₁ E₃ E₄
EG₂: functor_enrichment G₂ E₃ E₄
EG₃: functor_enrichment G₃ E₃ E₄
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₃
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₄
τ₁: G₁ ⟹ G₂
Hτ₁: nat_trans_enrichment τ₁ EG₁ EG₂
τ₂: G₂ ⟹ G₃
Hτ₂: nat_trans_enrichment τ₂ EG₂ EG₃
θ: enriched_profunctor_square EF EG₃ P Q
z: C₃
x: C₁
(enriched_from_arr E₄ (τ₂ z)
 · mon_rinvunitor (E₄ ⦃ G₂ z, G₃ z ⦄)
 · identity (E₄ ⦃ G₂ z, G₃ z ⦄)
   #⊗ enriched_from_arr E₄ (τ₁ z))
#⊗ identity (Q (G₃ z) (F x)) =
enriched_from_arr E₄ (τ₂ z)
#⊗ identity (Q (G₃ z) (F x))
· (mon_linvunitor
     ((E₄ ⦃ G₂ z, G₃ z ⦄) ⊗ Q (G₃ z) (F x))
   · (mon_rassociator I_{ V} (E₄ ⦃ G₂ z, G₃ z ⦄)
        (Q (G₃ z) (F x))
      · (sym_mon_braiding V I_{ V} (E₄ ⦃ G₂ z, G₃ z ⦄)
         #⊗ identity (Q (G₃ z) (F x))
         · (identity (E₄ ⦃ G₂ z, G₃ z ⦄)
            #⊗ enriched_from_arr E₄ (τ₁ z))
           #⊗ identity (Q (G₃ z) (F x)))))

  
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
G₁, G₂, G₃: C₃ ⟶ C₄
EG₁: functor_enrichment G₁ E₃ E₄
EG₂: functor_enrichment G₂ E₃ E₄
EG₃: functor_enrichment G₃ E₃ E₄
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₃
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₄
τ₁: G₁ ⟹ G₂
Hτ₁: nat_trans_enrichment τ₁ EG₁ EG₂
τ₂: G₂ ⟹ G₃
Hτ₂: nat_trans_enrichment τ₂ EG₂ EG₃
θ: enriched_profunctor_square EF EG₃ P Q
z: C₃
x: C₁
enriched_from_arr E₄ (τ₂ z)
#⊗ identity (Q (G₃ z) (F x))
· mon_rinvunitor (E₄ ⦃ G₂ z, G₃ z ⦄)
  #⊗ identity (Q (G₃ z) (F x))
· (identity (E₄ ⦃ G₂ z, G₃ z ⦄)
   #⊗ enriched_from_arr E₄ (τ₁ z))
  #⊗ identity (Q (G₃ z) (F x)) =
enriched_from_arr E₄ (τ₂ z)
#⊗ identity (Q (G₃ z) (F x))
· (mon_linvunitor
     ((E₄ ⦃ G₂ z, G₃ z ⦄) ⊗ Q (G₃ z) (F x))
   · (mon_rassociator I_{ V} (E₄ ⦃ G₂ z, G₃ z ⦄)
        (Q (G₃ z) (F x))
      · (sym_mon_braiding V I_{ V} (E₄ ⦃ G₂ z, G₃ z ⦄)
         #⊗ identity (Q (G₃ z) (F x))
         · (identity (E₄ ⦃ G₂ z, G₃ z ⦄)
            #⊗ enriched_from_arr E₄ (τ₁ z))
           #⊗ identity (Q (G₃ z) (F x)))))

  
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
G₁, G₂, G₃: C₃ ⟶ C₄

EG₂: functor_enrichment G₂ E₃ E₄
EG₃: functor_enrichment G₃ E₃ E₄
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₃
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₄
τ₁: G₁ ⟹ G₂
Hτ₁: nat_trans_enrichment τ₁ EG₁ EG₂
τ₂: G₂ ⟹ G₃
Hτ₂: nat_trans_enrichment τ₂ EG₂ EG₃
θ: enriched_profunctor_square EF EG₃ P Q
z: C₃
x: C₁
enriched_from_arr E₄ (τ₂ z)
#⊗ identity (Q (G₃ z) (F x))
· (mon_rinvunitor (E₄ ⦃ G₂ z, G₃ z ⦄)
   #⊗ identity (Q (G₃ z) (F x))
   · (identity (E₄ ⦃ G₂ z, G₃ z ⦄)
      #⊗ enriched_from_arr E₄ (τ₁ z))
     #⊗ identity (Q (G₃ z) (F x))) =
enriched_from_arr E₄ (τ₂ z)
#⊗ identity (Q (G₃ z) (F x))
· (mon_linvunitor
     ((E₄ ⦃ G₂ z, G₃ z ⦄) ⊗ Q (G₃ z) (F x))
   · (mon_rassociator I_{ V} (E₄ ⦃ G₂ z, G₃ z ⦄)
        (Q (G₃ z) (F x))
      · (sym_mon_braiding V I_{ V} (E₄ ⦃ G₂ z, G₃ z ⦄)
         #⊗ identity (Q (G₃ z) (F x))
         · (identity (E₄ ⦃ G₂ z, G₃ z ⦄)
            #⊗ enriched_from_arr E₄ (τ₁ z))
           #⊗ identity (Q (G₃ z) (F x)))))

  
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category

E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂

G₁, G₂, G₃: C₃ ⟶ C₄

EG₂: functor_enrichment G₂ E₃ E₄
EG₃: functor_enrichment G₃ E₃ E₄

Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₄
τ₁: G₁ ⟹ G₂
Hτ₁: nat_trans_enrichment τ₁ EG₁ EG₂
τ₂: G₂ ⟹ G₃
Hτ₂: nat_trans_enrichment τ₂ EG₂ EG₃
θ: enriched_profunctor_square EF EG₃ P Q
z: C₃
x: C₁
mon_rinvunitor (E₄ ⦃ G₂ z, G₃ z ⦄)
#⊗ identity (Q (G₃ z) (F x))
· (identity (E₄ ⦃ G₂ z, G₃ z ⦄)
   #⊗ enriched_from_arr E₄ (τ₁ z))
  #⊗ identity (Q (G₃ z) (F x)) =
mon_linvunitor ((E₄ ⦃ G₂ z, G₃ z ⦄) ⊗ Q (G₃ z) (F x))
· (mon_rassociator I_{ V} (E₄ ⦃ G₂ z, G₃ z ⦄)
     (Q (G₃ z) (F x))
   · (sym_mon_braiding V I_{ V} (E₄ ⦃ G₂ z, G₃ z ⦄)
      #⊗ identity (Q (G₃ z) (F x))
      · (identity (E₄ ⦃ G₂ z, G₃ z ⦄)
         #⊗ enriched_from_arr E₄ (τ₁ z))
        #⊗ identity (Q (G₃ z) (F x))))

EG₂: functor_enrichment G₂ E₃ E₄

τ₂: G₂ ⟹ G₃

#⊗ identity (Q (G₃ z) (F x))
· (identity (E₄ ⦃ G₂ z, G₃ z ⦄)

  #⊗ identity (Q (G₃ z) (F x)) =
mon_linvunitor ((E₄ ⦃ G₂ z, G₃ z ⦄) ⊗ Q (G₃ z) (F x))
· mon_rassociator I_{ V} (E₄ ⦃ G₂ z, G₃ z ⦄)
    (Q (G₃ z) (F x))
· sym_mon_braiding V I_{ V} (E₄ ⦃ G₂ z, G₃ z ⦄)

· (identity (E₄ ⦃ G₂ z, G₃ z ⦄)
   #⊗ enriched_from_arr E₄ (τ₁ z))
  #⊗ identity (Q (G₃ z) (F x))

mon_linvunitor ((E₄ ⦃ G₂ z, G₃ z ⦄) ⊗ Q (G₃ z) (F x))
· mon_rassociator I_{ V} (E₄ ⦃ G₂ z, G₃ z ⦄)
    (Q (G₃ z) (F x))
· sym_mon_braiding V I_{ V} (E₄ ⦃ G₂ z, G₃ z ⦄)

C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category

Hτ₁: nat_trans_enrichment τ₁ EG₁ EG₂
τ₂: G₂ ⟹ G₃
Hτ₂: nat_trans_enrichment τ₂ EG₂ EG₃

#⊗ identity (Q (G₃ z) (F x))
· mon_lassociator I_{ V} (E₄ ⦃ G₂ z, G₃ z ⦄)
    (Q (G₃ z) (F x))
· mon_rassociator I_{ V} (E₄ ⦃ G₂ z, G₃ z ⦄)

V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
G₁, G₂, G₃: C₃ ⟶ C₄
EG₁: functor_enrichment G₁ E₃ E₄
EG₂: functor_enrichment G₂ E₃ E₄
EG₃: functor_enrichment G₃ E₃ E₄
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₃
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₄
τ₁: G₁ ⟹ G₂
Hτ₁: nat_trans_enrichment τ₁ EG₁ EG₂
τ₂: G₂ ⟹ G₃
Hτ₂: nat_trans_enrichment τ₂ EG₂ EG₃
θ: enriched_profunctor_square EF EG₃ P Q
z: C₃
x: C₁
mon_linvunitor (E₄ ⦃ G₂ z, G₃ z ⦄)
#⊗ identity (Q (G₃ z) (F x))
· mon_lassociator I_{ V} (E₄ ⦃ G₂ z, G₃ z ⦄)
    (Q (G₃ z) (F x))
· mon_rassociator I_{ V} (E₄ ⦃ G₂ z, G₃ z ⦄)
    (Q (G₃ z) (F x))
· sym_mon_braiding V I_{ V} (E₄ ⦃ G₂ z, G₃ z ⦄)
  #⊗ identity (Q (G₃ z) (F x)) =
mon_rinvunitor (E₄ ⦃ G₂ z, G₃ z ⦄)
#⊗ identity (Q (G₃ z) (F x))

  
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
G₁, G₂, G₃: C₃ ⟶ C₄
EG₁: functor_enrichment G₁ E₃ E₄
EG₂: functor_enrichment G₂ E₃ E₄
EG₃: functor_enrichment G₃ E₃ E₄
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₃
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₄
τ₁: G₁ ⟹ G₂
Hτ₁: nat_trans_enrichment τ₁ EG₁ EG₂
τ₂: G₂ ⟹ G₃
Hτ₂: nat_trans_enrichment τ₂ EG₂ EG₃
θ: enriched_profunctor_square EF EG₃ P Q
z: C₃
x: C₁
mon_linvunitor (E₄ ⦃ G₂ z, G₃ z ⦄)
#⊗ identity (Q (G₃ z) (F x))
· mon_lassociator I_{ V} (E₄ ⦃ G₂ z, G₃ z ⦄)
    (Q (G₃ z) (F x))
· mon_rassociator I_{ V} (E₄ ⦃ G₂ z, G₃ z ⦄)
    (Q (G₃ z) (F x))
· sym_mon_braiding V I_{ V} (E₄ ⦃ G₂ z, G₃ z ⦄)
  #⊗ identity (Q (G₃ z) (F x)) = ?b
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
G₁, G₂, G₃: C₃ ⟶ C₄
EG₁: functor_enrichment G₁ E₃ E₄
EG₂: functor_enrichment G₂ E₃ E₄
EG₃: functor_enrichment G₃ E₃ E₄
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₃
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₄
τ₁: G₁ ⟹ G₂
Hτ₁: nat_trans_enrichment τ₁ EG₁ EG₂
τ₂: G₂ ⟹ G₃
Hτ₂: nat_trans_enrichment τ₂ EG₂ EG₃
θ: enriched_profunctor_square EF EG₃ P Q
z: C₃
x: C₁
?b =
mon_rinvunitor (E₄ ⦃ G₂ z, G₃ z ⦄)
#⊗ identity (Q (G₃ z) (F x))

  
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V

EG₂: functor_enrichment G₂ E₃ E₄
EG₃: functor_enrichment G₃ E₃ E₄
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₃

τ₁: G₁ ⟹ G₂
Hτ₁: nat_trans_enrichment τ₁ EG₁ EG₂
τ₂: G₂ ⟹ G₃
Hτ₂: nat_trans_enrichment τ₂ EG₂ EG₃
