x: C₁
mon_linvunitor (E₄ ⦃ G₂ z, G₃ z ⦄)
#⊗ identity (Q (G₃ z) (F x))
· mon_lassociator I_{ V} (E₄ ⦃ G₂ z, G₃ z ⦄)
    (Q (G₃ z) (F x))
· mon_rassociator I_{ V} (E₄ ⦃ G₂ z, G₃ z ⦄)
    (Q (G₃ z) (F x))
· sym_mon_braiding V I_{ V} (E₄ ⦃ G₂ z, G₃ z ⦄)
  #⊗ identity (Q (G₃ z) (F x)) = ?b

    
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
G₁, G₂, G₃: C₃ ⟶ C₄
EG₁: functor_enrichment G₁ E₃ E₄
EG₂: functor_enrichment G₂ E₃ E₄
EG₃: functor_enrichment G₃ E₃ E₄
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₃
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₄
τ₁: G₁ ⟹ G₂
Hτ₁: nat_trans_enrichment τ₁ EG₁ EG₂
τ₂: G₂ ⟹ G₃
Hτ₂: nat_trans_enrichment τ₂ EG₂ EG₃
θ: enriched_profunctor_square EF EG₃ P Q
z: C₃
x: C₁
mon_linvunitor (E₄ ⦃ G₂ z, G₃ z ⦄)
#⊗ identity (Q (G₃ z) (F x))
· mon_lassociator I_{ V} (E₄ ⦃ G₂ z, G₃ z ⦄)
    (Q (G₃ z) (F x))
· mon_rassociator I_{ V} (E₄ ⦃ G₂ z, G₃ z ⦄)
    (Q (G₃ z) (F x)) = ?y'

    
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
G₁, G₂, G₃: C₃ ⟶ C₄
EG₁: functor_enrichment G₁ E₃ E₄
EG₂: functor_enrichment G₂ E₃ E₄
EG₃: functor_enrichment G₃ E₃ E₄
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₃
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₄
τ₁: G₁ ⟹ G₂
Hτ₁: nat_trans_enrichment τ₁ EG₁ EG₂
τ₂: G₂ ⟹ G₃
Hτ₂: nat_trans_enrichment τ₂ EG₂ EG₃
θ: enriched_profunctor_square EF EG₃ P Q
z: C₃
x: C₁
mon_linvunitor (E₄ ⦃ G₂ z, G₃ z ⦄)
#⊗ identity (Q (G₃ z) (F x))
· (mon_lassociator I_{ V} (E₄ ⦃ G₂ z, G₃ z ⦄)
     (Q (G₃ z) (F x))
   · mon_rassociator I_{ V} (E₄ ⦃ G₂ z, G₃ z ⦄)
       (Q (G₃ z) (F x))) = ?y'

    
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
G₁, G₂, G₃: C₃ ⟶ C₄
EG₁: functor_enrichment G₁ E₃ E₄
EG₂: functor_enrichment G₂ E₃ E₄
EG₃: functor_enrichment G₃ E₃ E₄
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₃
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₄
τ₁: G₁ ⟹ G₂
Hτ₁: nat_trans_enrichment τ₁ EG₁ EG₂
τ₂: G₂ ⟹ G₃
Hτ₂: nat_trans_enrichment τ₂ EG₂ EG₃
θ: enriched_profunctor_square EF EG₃ P Q
z: C₃
x: C₁
mon_linvunitor (E₄ ⦃ G₂ z, G₃ z ⦄)
#⊗ identity (Q (G₃ z) (F x))
· identity
    (I_{ V} ⊗ (E₄ ⦃ G₂ z, G₃ z ⦄) ⊗ Q (G₃ z) (F x)) =
?y'

    apply id_right.
  
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
G₁, G₂, G₃: C₃ ⟶ C₄
EG₁: functor_enrichment G₁ E₃ E₄
EG₂: functor_enrichment G₂ E₃ E₄
EG₃: functor_enrichment G₃ E₃ E₄
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₃
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₄
τ₁: G₁ ⟹ G₂
Hτ₁: nat_trans_enrichment τ₁ EG₁ EG₂
τ₂: G₂ ⟹ G₃
Hτ₂: nat_trans_enrichment τ₂ EG₂ EG₃
θ: enriched_profunctor_square EF EG₃ P Q
z: C₃
x: C₁
mon_linvunitor (E₄ ⦃ G₂ z, G₃ z ⦄)
#⊗ identity (Q (G₃ z) (F x))
· sym_mon_braiding V I_{ V} (E₄ ⦃ G₂ z, G₃ z ⦄)
  #⊗ identity (Q (G₃ z) (F x)) =
mon_rinvunitor (E₄ ⦃ G₂ z, G₃ z ⦄)
#⊗ identity (Q (G₃ z) (F x))

  
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
G₁, G₂, G₃: C₃ ⟶ C₄
EG₁: functor_enrichment G₁ E₃ E₄
EG₂: functor_enrichment G₂ E₃ E₄
EG₃: functor_enrichment G₃ E₃ E₄
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₃
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₄
τ₁: G₁ ⟹ G₂
Hτ₁: nat_trans_enrichment τ₁ EG₁ EG₂
τ₂: G₂ ⟹ G₃
Hτ₂: nat_trans_enrichment τ₂ EG₂ EG₃
θ: enriched_profunctor_square EF EG₃ P Q
z: C₃
x: C₁
(mon_linvunitor (E₄ ⦃ G₂ z, G₃ z ⦄)
 · sym_mon_braiding V I_{ V} (E₄ ⦃ G₂ z, G₃ z ⦄))
#⊗ identity (Q (G₃ z) (F x)) =
mon_rinvunitor (E₄ ⦃ G₂ z, G₃ z ⦄)
#⊗ identity (Q (G₃ z) (F x))

  
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
G₁, G₂, G₃: C₃ ⟶ C₄
EG₁: functor_enrichment G₁ E₃ E₄
EG₂: functor_enrichment G₂ E₃ E₄
EG₃: functor_enrichment G₃ E₃ E₄
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₃
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₄
τ₁: G₁ ⟹ G₂
Hτ₁: nat_trans_enrichment τ₁ EG₁ EG₂
τ₂: G₂ ⟹ G₃
Hτ₂: nat_trans_enrichment τ₂ EG₂ EG₃
θ: enriched_profunctor_square EF EG₃ P Q
z: C₃
x: C₁
mon_rinvunitor (E₄ ⦃ G₂ z, G₃ z ⦄)
#⊗ identity (Q (G₃ z) (F x)) =
mon_rinvunitor (E₄ ⦃ G₂ z, G₃ z ⦄)
#⊗ identity (Q (G₃ z) (F x))

  apply idpath.
Qed.

(** * 3. Up whiskering and identities *)

V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
τ: F ⟹ G
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₂
Hτ: nat_trans_enrichment τ EF EG
uwhisker_enriched_profunctor_square Hτ
  (id_v_enriched_profunctor_square EF) =
dwhisker_enriched_profunctor_square Hτ
  (id_v_enriched_profunctor_square EG)


V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
τ: F ⟹ G
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₂
Hτ: nat_trans_enrichment τ EF EG
uwhisker_enriched_profunctor_square Hτ
  (id_v_enriched_profunctor_square EF) =
dwhisker_enriched_profunctor_square Hτ
  (id_v_enriched_profunctor_square EG)

  
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
τ: F ⟹ G
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₂
Hτ: nat_trans_enrichment τ EF EG
z, x: C₁
EF z x · mon_linvunitor (E₂ ⦃ F z, F x ⦄)
· enriched_from_arr E₂ (τ x)
  #⊗ identity (E₂ ⦃ F z, F x ⦄)
· enriched_comp E₂ (F z) (F x) (G x) =
EG z x · mon_linvunitor (E₂ ⦃ G z, G x ⦄)
· enriched_from_arr E₂ (τ z)
  #⊗ identity (E₂ ⦃ G z, G x ⦄)
· (sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ F z, G z ⦄)
     (E₂ ⦃ G z, G x ⦄)
   · enriched_comp E₂ (F z) (G z) (G x))

  
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
τ: F ⟹ G
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₂
Hτ: nat_trans_enrichment τ EF EG
z, x: C₁
mon_linvunitor (E₁ ⦃ z, x ⦄)
· identity I_{ V} #⊗ EF z x
· enriched_from_arr E₂ (τ x)
  #⊗ identity (E₂ ⦃ F z, F x ⦄)
· enriched_comp E₂ (F z) (F x) (G x) =
mon_linvunitor (E₁ ⦃ z, x ⦄)
· identity I_{ V} #⊗ EG z x
· enriched_from_arr E₂ (τ z)
  #⊗ identity (E₂ ⦃ G z, G x ⦄)
· (sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ F z, G z ⦄)
     (E₂ ⦃ G z, G x ⦄)
   · enriched_comp E₂ (F z) (G z) (G x))

  
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
τ: F ⟹ G
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₂
Hτ: nat_trans_enrichment τ EF EG
z, x: C₁
mon_linvunitor (E₁ ⦃ z, x ⦄)
· (identity I_{ V} #⊗ EF z x
   · (enriched_from_arr E₂ (τ x)
      #⊗ identity (E₂ ⦃ F z, F x ⦄)
      · enriched_comp E₂ (F z) (F x) (G x))) =
mon_linvunitor (E₁ ⦃ z, x ⦄)
· (identity I_{ V} #⊗ EG z x
   · (enriched_from_arr E₂ (τ z)
      #⊗ identity (E₂ ⦃ G z, G x ⦄)
      · (sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ F z, G z ⦄)
           (E₂ ⦃ G z, G x ⦄)
         · enriched_comp E₂ (F z) (G z) (G x))))

  
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
τ: F ⟹ G
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₂
Hτ: nat_trans_enrichment τ EF EG
z, x: C₁
identity I_{ V} #⊗ EF z x
· (enriched_from_arr E₂ (τ x)
   #⊗ identity (E₂ ⦃ F z, F x ⦄)
   · enriched_comp E₂ (F z) (F x) (G x)) =
identity I_{ V} #⊗ EG z x
· (enriched_from_arr E₂ (τ z)
   #⊗ identity (E₂ ⦃ G z, G x ⦄)
   · (sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ F z, G z ⦄)
        (E₂ ⦃ G z, G x ⦄)
      · enriched_comp E₂ (F z) (G z) (G x)))

  
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
τ: F ⟹ G
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₂
Hτ: nat_trans_enrichment τ EF EG
z, x: C₁
identity I_{ V} #⊗ EF z x
· enriched_from_arr E₂ (τ x)
  #⊗ identity (E₂ ⦃ F z, F x ⦄)
· enriched_comp E₂ (F z) (F x) (G x) =
identity I_{ V} #⊗ EG z x
· enriched_from_arr E₂ (τ z)
  #⊗ identity (E₂ ⦃ G z, G x ⦄)
· sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ F z, G z ⦄)
    (E₂ ⦃ G z, G x ⦄)
· enriched_comp E₂ (F z) (G z) (G x)

  
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
τ: F ⟹ G
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₂
Hτ: nat_trans_enrichment τ EF EG
z, x: C₁
enriched_from_arr E₂ (τ x) #⊗ EF z x
· enriched_comp E₂ (F z) (F x) (G x) =
enriched_from_arr E₂ (τ z) #⊗ EG z x
· sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ F z, G z ⦄)
    (E₂ ⦃ G z, G x ⦄)
· enriched_comp E₂ (F z) (G z) (G x)

  
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
τ: F ⟹ G
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₂
Hτ: nat_trans_enrichment τ EF EG
z, x: C₁
enriched_from_arr E₂ (τ x) #⊗ EF z x
· enriched_comp E₂ (F z) (F x) (G x) =
sym_mon_braiding V I_{ V} (E₁ ⦃ z, x ⦄)
· EG z x #⊗ enriched_from_arr E₂ (τ z)
· enriched_comp E₂ (F z) (G z) (G x)

  
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
τ: F ⟹ G
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₂
Hτ: nat_trans_enrichment τ EF EG
z, x: C₁
enriched_from_arr E₂ (τ x) #⊗ EF z x
· enriched_comp E₂ (F z) (F x) (G x) =
sym_mon_braiding V I_{ V} (E₁ ⦃ z, x ⦄)
· (EG z x #⊗ enriched_from_arr E₂ (τ z)
   · enriched_comp E₂ (F z) (G z) (G x))

  
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
τ: F ⟹ G
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₂
Hτ: nat_trans_enrichment τ EF EG
z, x: C₁
identity (I_{ V} ⊗ (E₁ ⦃ z, x ⦄))
· (enriched_from_arr E₂ (τ x) #⊗ EF z x
   · enriched_comp E₂ (F z) (F x) (G x)) =
sym_mon_braiding V I_{ V} (E₁ ⦃ z, x ⦄)
· (EG z x #⊗ enriched_from_arr E₂ (τ z)
   · enriched_comp E₂ (F z) (G z) (G x))

  
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
τ: F ⟹ G
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₂
Hτ: nat_trans_enrichment τ EF EG
z, x: C₁
mon_lunitor (E₁ ⦃ z, x ⦄)
· mon_linvunitor (E₁ ⦃ z, x ⦄)
· (enriched_from_arr E₂ (τ x) #⊗ EF z x
   · enriched_comp E₂ (F z) (F x) (G x)) =
sym_mon_braiding V I_{ V} (E₁ ⦃ z, x ⦄)
· (EG z x #⊗ enriched_from_arr E₂ (τ z)
   · enriched_comp E₂ (F z) (G z) (G x))

  
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
τ: F ⟹ G
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₂
Hτ: nat_trans_enrichment τ EF EG
z, x: C₁
mon_lunitor (E₁ ⦃ z, x ⦄)
· mon_linvunitor (E₁ ⦃ z, x ⦄)
· (enriched_from_arr E₂ (τ x) #⊗ EF z x
   · enriched_comp E₂ (F z) (F x) (G x)) = ?b
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
τ: F ⟹ G
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₂
Hτ: nat_trans_enrichment τ EF EG
z, x: C₁
?b =
sym_mon_braiding V I_{ V} (E₁ ⦃ z, x ⦄)
· (EG z x #⊗ enriched_from_arr E₂ (τ z)
   · enriched_comp E₂ (F z) (G z) (G x))

  
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
τ: F ⟹ G
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₂
Hτ: nat_trans_enrichment τ EF EG
z, x: C₁
mon_lunitor (E₁ ⦃ z, x ⦄)
· mon_linvunitor (E₁ ⦃ z, x ⦄)
· (enriched_from_arr E₂ (τ x) #⊗ EF z x
   · enriched_comp E₂ (F z) (F x) (G x)) = ?b

    
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
τ: F ⟹ G
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₂
Hτ: nat_trans_enrichment τ EF EG
z, x: C₁
mon_lunitor (E₁ ⦃ z, x ⦄)
· (mon_linvunitor (E₁ ⦃ z, x ⦄)
   · (enriched_from_arr E₂ (τ x) #⊗ EF z x
      · enriched_comp E₂ (F z) (F x) (G x))) = ?b

    
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
τ: F ⟹ G
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₂
Hτ: nat_trans_enrichment τ EF EG
z, x: C₁
mon_linvunitor (E₁ ⦃ z, x ⦄)
· (enriched_from_arr E₂ (τ x) #⊗ EF z x
   · enriched_comp E₂ (F z) (F x) (G x)) = ?t2

    
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
τ: F ⟹ G
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₂
Hτ: nat_trans_enrichment τ EF EG
z, x: C₁
mon_linvunitor (E₁ ⦃ z, x ⦄)
· enriched_from_arr E₂ (τ x) #⊗ EF z x
· enriched_comp E₂ (F z) (F x) (G x) = ?t2

    exact (!(Hτ z x)).
  
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
τ: F ⟹ G
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₂
Hτ: nat_trans_enrichment τ EF EG
z, x: C₁
mon_lunitor (E₁ ⦃ z, x ⦄)
· (mon_rinvunitor (E₁ ⦃ z, x ⦄)
   · EG z x #⊗ enriched_from_arr E₂ (τ z)
   · enriched_comp E₂ (F z) (G z) (G x)) =
sym_mon_braiding V I_{ V} (E₁ ⦃ z, x ⦄)
· (EG z x #⊗ enriched_from_arr E₂ (τ z)
   · enriched_comp E₂ (F z) (G z) (G x))

  
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
τ: F ⟹ G
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₂
Hτ: nat_trans_enrichment τ EF EG
z, x: C₁
mon_lunitor (E₁ ⦃ z, x ⦄)
· mon_rinvunitor (E₁ ⦃ z, x ⦄)
· EG z x #⊗ enriched_from_arr E₂ (τ z)
· enriched_comp E₂ (F z) (G z) (G x) =
sym_mon_braiding V I_{ V} (E₁ ⦃ z, x ⦄)
· EG z x #⊗ enriched_from_arr E₂ (τ z)
· enriched_comp E₂ (F z) (G z) (G x)

  
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
τ: F ⟹ G
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₂
Hτ: nat_trans_enrichment τ EF EG
z, x: C₁
mon_lunitor (E₁ ⦃ z, x ⦄)
· mon_rinvunitor (E₁ ⦃ z, x ⦄) =
sym_mon_braiding V I_{ V} (E₁ ⦃ z, x ⦄)

  
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
τ: F ⟹ G
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₂
Hτ: nat_trans_enrichment τ EF EG
z, x: C₁
mon_lunitor (E₁ ⦃ z, x ⦄)
· mon_rinvunitor (E₁ ⦃ z, x ⦄) =
sym_mon_braiding V I_{ V} (E₁ ⦃ z, x ⦄)
· identity ((E₁ ⦃ z, x ⦄) ⊗ I_{ V})

  
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
τ: F ⟹ G
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₂
Hτ: nat_trans_enrichment τ EF EG
z, x: C₁
mon_lunitor (E₁ ⦃ z, x ⦄)
· mon_rinvunitor (E₁ ⦃ z, x ⦄) =
sym_mon_braiding V I_{ V} (E₁ ⦃ z, x ⦄)
· (mon_runitor (E₁ ⦃ z, x ⦄)
   · mon_rinvunitor (E₁ ⦃ z, x ⦄))

  
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
τ: F ⟹ G
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₂
Hτ: nat_trans_enrichment τ EF EG
z, x: C₁
mon_lunitor (E₁ ⦃ z, x ⦄)
· mon_rinvunitor (E₁ ⦃ z, x ⦄) =
sym_mon_braiding V I_{ V} (E₁ ⦃ z, x ⦄)
· mon_runitor (E₁ ⦃ z, x ⦄)
· mon_rinvunitor (E₁ ⦃ z, x ⦄)

  
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
τ: F ⟹ G
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₂
Hτ: nat_trans_enrichment τ EF EG
z, x: C₁
mon_lunitor (E₁ ⦃ z, x ⦄)
· mon_rinvunitor (E₁ ⦃ z, x ⦄) =
mon_lunitor (E₁ ⦃ z, x ⦄)
· mon_rinvunitor (E₁ ⦃ z, x ⦄)

  apply idpath.
Qed.

(** * 4. Swapping whiskering *)

V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
F₁, F₂: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF₁: functor_enrichment F₁ E₁ E₂
EF₂: functor_enrichment F₂ E₁ E₂
τ₁: F₁ ⟹ F₂
Hτ₁: nat_trans_enrichment τ₁ EF₁ EF₂
G₁, G₂: C₃ ⟶ C₄
EG₁: functor_enrichment G₁ E₃ E₄
EG₂: functor_enrichment G₂ E₃ E₄
τ₂: G₁ ⟹ G₂
Hτ₂: nat_trans_enrichment τ₂ EG₁ EG₂
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₃
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₄
θ: enriched_profunctor_square EF₁ EG₂ P Q
dwhisker_enriched_profunctor_square Hτ₂
  (uwhisker_enriched_profunctor_square Hτ₁ θ) =
uwhisker_enriched_profunctor_square Hτ₁
  (dwhisker_enriched_profunctor_square Hτ₂ θ)


V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
F₁, F₂: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF₁: functor_enrichment F₁ E₁ E₂
EF₂: functor_enrichment F₂ E₁ E₂
τ₁: F₁ ⟹ F₂
Hτ₁: nat_trans_enrichment τ₁ EF₁ EF₂
G₁, G₂: C₃ ⟶ C₄
EG₁: functor_enrichment G₁ E₃ E₄
EG₂: functor_enrichment G₂ E₃ E₄
τ₂: G₁ ⟹ G₂
Hτ₂: nat_trans_enrichment τ₂ EG₁ EG₂
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₃
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₄
θ: enriched_profunctor_square EF₁ EG₂ P Q
dwhisker_enriched_profunctor_square Hτ₂
  (uwhisker_enriched_profunctor_square Hτ₁ θ) =
uwhisker_enriched_profunctor_square Hτ₁
  (dwhisker_enriched_profunctor_square Hτ₂ θ)

  
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
F₁, F₂: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF₁: functor_enrichment F₁ E₁ E₂
EF₂: functor_enrichment F₂ E₁ E₂
τ₁: F₁ ⟹ F₂
Hτ₁: nat_trans_enrichment τ₁ EF₁ EF₂
G₁, G₂: C₃ ⟶ C₄
EG₁: functor_enrichment G₁ E₃ E₄
EG₂: functor_enrichment G₂ E₃ E₄
τ₂: G₁ ⟹ G₂
Hτ₂: nat_trans_enrichment τ₂ EG₁ EG₂
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₃
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₄
θ: enriched_profunctor_square EF₁ EG₂ P Q
z: C₃
x: C₁
θ z x · mon_linvunitor (Q (G₂ z) (F₁ x))
· enriched_from_arr E₂ (τ₁ x)
  #⊗ identity (Q (G₂ z) (F₁ x))
· rmap_e Q (G₂ z) (F₁ x) (F₂ x)
· mon_linvunitor (Q (G₂ z) (F₂ x))
· enriched_from_arr E₄ (τ₂ z)
  #⊗ identity (Q (G₂ z) (F₂ x))
· lmap_e Q (G₂ z) (G₁ z) (F₂ x) =
θ z x · mon_linvunitor (Q (G₂ z) (F₁ x))
· enriched_from_arr E₄ (τ₂ z)
  #⊗ identity (Q (G₂ z) (F₁ x))
· lmap_e Q (G₂ z) (G₁ z) (F₁ x)
· mon_linvunitor (Q (G₁ z) (F₁ x))
· enriched_from_arr E₂ (τ₁ x)
  #⊗ identity (Q (G₁ z) (F₁ x))
· rmap_e Q (G₁ z) (F₁ x) (F₂ x)

  
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
F₁, F₂: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF₁: functor_enrichment F₁ E₁ E₂
EF₂: functor_enrichment F₂ E₁ E₂
τ₁: F₁ ⟹ F₂
Hτ₁: nat_trans_enrichment τ₁ EF₁ EF₂
G₁, G₂: C₃ ⟶ C₄
EG₁: functor_enrichment G₁ E₃ E₄
EG₂: functor_enrichment G₂ E₃ E₄
τ₂: G₁ ⟹ G₂
Hτ₂: nat_trans_enrichment τ₂ EG₁ EG₂
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₃
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₄
θ: enriched_profunctor_square EF₁ EG₂ P Q
z: C₃
x: C₁
θ z x
· (mon_linvunitor (Q (G₂ z) (F₁ x))
   · (enriched_from_arr E₂ (τ₁ x)
      #⊗ identity (Q (G₂ z) (F₁ x))
      · (rmap_e Q (G₂ z) (F₁ x) (F₂ x)
         · (mon_linvunitor (Q (G₂ z) (F₂ x))
            · (enriched_from_arr E₄ (τ₂ z)
               #⊗ identity (Q (G₂ z) (F₂ x))
               · lmap_e Q (G₂ z) (G₁ z) (F₂ x)))))) =
θ z x
· (mon_linvunitor (Q (G₂ z) (F₁ x))
   · (enriched_from_arr E₄ (τ₂ z)
      #⊗ identity (Q (G₂ z) (F₁ x))
      · (lmap_e Q (G₂ z) (G₁ z) (F₁ x)
         · (mon_linvunitor (Q (G₁ z) (F₁ x))
            · (enriched_from_arr E₂ (τ₁ x)
               #⊗ identity (Q (G₁ z) (F₁ x))
               · rmap_e Q (G₁ z) (F₁ x) (F₂ x))))))

  
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
F₁, F₂: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF₁: functor_enrichment F₁ E₁ E₂
EF₂: functor_enrichment F₂ E₁ E₂
τ₁: F₁ ⟹ F₂
Hτ₁: nat_trans_enrichment τ₁ EF₁ EF₂
G₁, G₂: C₃ ⟶ C₄
EG₁: functor_enrichment G₁ E₃ E₄
EG₂: functor_enrichment G₂ E₃ E₄
τ₂: G₁ ⟹ G₂
Hτ₂: nat_trans_enrichment τ₂ EG₁ EG₂
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₃
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₄
θ: enriched_profunctor_square EF₁ EG₂ P Q
z: C₃
x: C₁
enriched_from_arr E₂ (τ₁ x)
#⊗ identity (Q (G₂ z) (F₁ x))
· (rmap_e Q (G₂ z) (F₁ x) (F₂ x)
   · (mon_linvunitor (Q (G₂ z) (F₂ x))
      · (enriched_from_arr E₄ (τ₂ z)
         #⊗ identity (Q (G₂ z) (F₂ x))
         · lmap_e Q (G₂ z) (G₁ z) (F₂ x)))) =
enriched_from_arr E₄ (τ₂ z)
#⊗ identity (Q (G₂ z) (F₁ x))
· (lmap_e Q (G₂ z) (G₁ z) (F₁ x)
   · (mon_linvunitor (Q (G₁ z) (F₁ x))
      · (enriched_from_arr E₂ (τ₁ x)
         #⊗ identity (Q (G₁ z) (F₁ x))
         · rmap_e Q (G₁ z) (F₁ x) (F₂ x))))

  
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
F₁, F₂: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF₁: functor_enrichment F₁ E₁ E₂
EF₂: functor_enrichment F₂ E₁ E₂
τ₁: F₁ ⟹ F₂
Hτ₁: nat_trans_enrichment τ₁ EF₁ EF₂
G₁, G₂: C₃ ⟶ C₄
EG₁: functor_enrichment G₁ E₃ E₄
EG₂: functor_enrichment G₂ E₃ E₄
τ₂: G₁ ⟹ G₂
Hτ₂: nat_trans_enrichment τ₂ EG₁ EG₂
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₃
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₄
θ: enriched_profunctor_square EF₁ EG₂ P Q
z: C₃
x: C₁
enriched_from_arr E₂ (τ₁ x)
#⊗ identity (Q (G₂ z) (F₁ x))
· (rmap_e Q (G₂ z) (F₁ x) (F₂ x)
   · (mon_linvunitor (Q (G₂ z) (F₂ x))
      · (enriched_from_arr E₄ (τ₂ z)
         #⊗ identity (Q (G₂ z) (F₂ x))
         · lmap_e Q (G₂ z) (G₁ z) (F₂ x)))) = ?b
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
F₁, F₂: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF₁: functor_enrichment F₁ E₁ E₂
EF₂: functor_enrichment F₂ E₁ E₂
τ₁: F₁ ⟹ F₂
Hτ₁: nat_trans_enrichment τ₁ EF₁ EF₂
G₁, G₂: C₃ ⟶ C₄
EG₁: functor_enrichment G₁ E₃ E₄
EG₂: functor_enrichment G₂ E₃ E₄
τ₂: G₁ ⟹ G₂
Hτ₂: nat_trans_enrichment τ₂ EG₁ EG₂
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₃
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₄
θ: enriched_profunctor_square EF₁ EG₂ P Q
z: C₃
x: C₁
?b =
enriched_from_arr E₄ (τ₂ z)
#⊗ identity (Q (G₂ z) (F₁ x))
· (lmap_e Q (G₂ z) (G₁ z) (F₁ x)
   · (mon_linvunitor (Q (G₁ z) (F₁ x))
      · (enriched_from_arr E₂ (τ₁ x)
         #⊗ identity (Q (G₁ z) (F₁ x))
         · rmap_e Q (G₁ z) (F₁ x) (F₂ x))))

  
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
F₁, F₂: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF₁: functor_enrichment F₁ E₁ E₂
EF₂: functor_enrichment F₂ E₁ E₂
τ₁: F₁ ⟹ F₂
Hτ₁: nat_trans_enrichment τ₁ EF₁ EF₂
G₁, G₂: C₃ ⟶ C₄
EG₁: functor_enrichment G₁ E₃ E₄
EG₂: functor_enrichment G₂ E₃ E₄
τ₂: G₁ ⟹ G₂
Hτ₂: nat_trans_enrichment τ₂ EG₁ EG₂
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₃
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₄
θ: enriched_profunctor_square EF₁ EG₂ P Q
z: C₃
x: C₁
enriched_from_arr E₂ (τ₁ x)
#⊗ identity (Q (G₂ z) (F₁ x))
· (rmap_e Q (G₂ z) (F₁ x) (F₂ x)
   · (mon_linvunitor (Q (G₂ z) (F₂ x))
      · (enriched_from_arr E₄ (τ₂ z)
         #⊗ identity (Q (G₂ z) (F₂ x))
         · lmap_e Q (G₂ z) (G₁ z) (F₂ x)))) = ?b

    
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
F₁, F₂: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF₁: functor_enrichment F₁ E₁ E₂
EF₂: functor_enrichment F₂ E₁ E₂
τ₁: F₁ ⟹ F₂
Hτ₁: nat_trans_enrichment τ₁ EF₁ EF₂
G₁, G₂: C₃ ⟶ C₄
EG₁: functor_enrichment G₁ E₃ E₄
EG₂: functor_enrichment G₂ E₃ E₄
τ₂: G₁ ⟹ G₂
Hτ₂: nat_trans_enrichment τ₂ EG₁ EG₂
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₃
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₄
θ: enriched_profunctor_square EF₁ EG₂ P Q
z: C₃
x: C₁
rmap_e Q (G₂ z) (F₁ x) (F₂ x)
· (mon_linvunitor (Q (G₂ z) (F₂ x))
   · (enriched_from_arr E₄ (τ₂ z)
      #⊗ identity (Q (G₂ z) (F₂ x))
      · lmap_e Q (G₂ z) (G₁ z) (F₂ x))) = ?t2

    
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
F₁, F₂: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF₁: functor_enrichment F₁ E₁ E₂
EF₂: functor_enrichment F₂ E₁ E₂
τ₁: F₁ ⟹ F₂
Hτ₁: nat_trans_enrichment τ₁ EF₁ EF₂
G₁, G₂: C₃ ⟶ C₄
EG₁: functor_enrichment G₁ E₃ E₄
EG₂: functor_enrichment G₂ E₃ E₄
τ₂: G₁ ⟹ G₂
Hτ₂: nat_trans_enrichment τ₂ EG₁ EG₂
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₃
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₄
θ: enriched_profunctor_square EF₁ EG₂ P Q
z: C₃
x: C₁
rmap_e Q (G₂ z) (F₁ x) (F₂ x)
· mon_linvunitor (Q (G₂ z) (F₂ x))
· enriched_from_arr E₄ (τ₂ z)
  #⊗ identity (Q (G₂ z) (F₂ x))
· lmap_e Q (G₂ z) (G₁ z) (F₂ x) = ?t2

    
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
F₁, F₂: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF₁: functor_enrichment F₁ E₁ E₂
EF₂: functor_enrichment F₂ E₁ E₂
τ₁: F₁ ⟹ F₂
Hτ₁: nat_trans_enrichment τ₁ EF₁ EF₂
G₁, G₂: C₃ ⟶ C₄
EG₁: functor_enrichment G₁ E₃ E₄
EG₂: functor_enrichment G₂ E₃ E₄
τ₂: G₁ ⟹ G₂
Hτ₂: nat_trans_enrichment τ₂ EG₁ EG₂
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₃
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₄
θ: enriched_profunctor_square EF₁ EG₂ P Q
z: C₃
x: C₁
mon_linvunitor ((E₂ ⦃ F₁ x, F₂ x ⦄) ⊗ Q (G₂ z) (F₁ x))
· identity I_{ V} #⊗ rmap_e Q (G₂ z) (F₁ x) (F₂ x)
· enriched_from_arr E₄ (τ₂ z)
  #⊗ identity (Q (G₂ z) (F₂ x))
· lmap_e Q (G₂ z) (G₁ z) (F₂ x) = ?t2

    
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
F₁, F₂: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF₁: functor_enrichment F₁ E₁ E₂
EF₂: functor_enrichment F₂ E₁ E₂
τ₁: F₁ ⟹ F₂
Hτ₁: nat_trans_enrichment τ₁ EF₁ EF₂
G₁, G₂: C₃ ⟶ C₄
EG₁: functor_enrichment G₁ E₃ E₄
EG₂: functor_enrichment G₂ E₃ E₄
τ₂: G₁ ⟹ G₂
Hτ₂: nat_trans_enrichment τ₂ EG₁ EG₂
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₃
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₄
θ: enriched_profunctor_square EF₁ EG₂ P Q
z: C₃
x: C₁
mon_linvunitor ((E₂ ⦃ F₁ x, F₂ x ⦄) ⊗ Q (G₂ z) (F₁ x))
· (identity I_{ V} #⊗ rmap_e Q (G₂ z) (F₁ x) (F₂ x)
   · (enriched_from_arr E₄ (τ₂ z)
      #⊗ identity (Q (G₂ z) (F₂ x))
      · lmap_e Q (G₂ z) (G₁ z) (F₂ x))) = ?t2

    
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category

E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
F₁, F₂: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF₁: functor_enrichment F₁ E₁ E₂
EF₂: functor_enrichment F₂ E₁ E₂
τ₁: F₁ ⟹ F₂

Hτ₂: nat_trans_enrichment τ₂ EG₁ EG₂

Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₄
θ: enriched_profunctor_square EF₁ EG₂ P Q
z: C₃
x: C₁
identity I_{ V} #⊗ rmap_e Q (G₂ z) (F₁ x) (F₂ x)
· (enriched_from_arr E₄ (τ₂ z)
   #⊗ identity (Q (G₂ z) (F₂ x))
   · lmap_e Q (G₂ z) (G₁ z) (F₂ x)) = ?t2

    
V: benabou_cosmos

E₁: enrichment C₁ V

θ: enriched_profunctor_square EF₁ EG₂ P Q
z: C₃
x: C₁
identity I_{ V} #⊗ rmap_e Q (G₂ z) (F₁ x) (F₂ x)
· enriched_from_arr E₄ (τ₂ z)
  #⊗ identity (Q (G₂ z) (F₂ x))
· lmap_e Q (G₂ z) (G₁ z) (F₂ x) = ?t2

    
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
F₁, F₂: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF₁: functor_enrichment F₁ E₁ E₂
EF₂: functor_enrichment F₂ E₁ E₂
τ₁: F₁ ⟹ F₂
Hτ₁: nat_trans_enrichment τ₁ EF₁ EF₂
G₁, G₂: C₃ ⟶ C₄
EG₁: functor_enrichment G₁ E₃ E₄
EG₂: functor_enrichment G₂ E₃ E₄
τ₂: G₁ ⟹ G₂
Hτ₂: nat_trans_enrichment τ₂ EG₁ EG₂
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₃
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₄
θ: enriched_profunctor_square EF₁ EG₂ P Q
z: C₃
x: C₁
enriched_from_arr E₄ (τ₂ z)
#⊗ rmap_e Q (G₂ z) (F₁ x) (F₂ x)
· lmap_e Q (G₂ z) (G₁ z) (F₂ x) = ?t2

    
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
F₁, F₂: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF₁: functor_enrichment F₁ E₁ E₂
EF₂: functor_enrichment F₂ E₁ E₂
τ₁: F₁ ⟹ F₂
Hτ₁: nat_trans_enrichment τ₁ EF₁ EF₂
G₁, G₂: C₃ ⟶ C₄
EG₁: functor_enrichment G₁ E₃ E₄
EG₂: functor_enrichment G₂ E₃ E₄
τ₂: G₁ ⟹ G₂
Hτ₂: nat_trans_enrichment τ₂ EG₁ EG₂
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₃
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₄
θ: enriched_profunctor_square EF₁ EG₂ P Q
z: C₃
x: C₁
enriched_from_arr E₄ (τ₂ z)
#⊗ identity ((E₂ ⦃ F₁ x, F₂ x ⦄) ⊗ Q (G₂ z) (F₁ x))
· identity (E₄ ⦃ G₁ z, G₂ z ⦄)
  #⊗ rmap_e Q (G₂ z) (F₁ x) (F₂ x)
· lmap_e Q (G₂ z) (G₁ z) (F₂ x) = ?t2

    
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
F₁, F₂: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF₁: functor_enrichment F₁ E₁ E₂
EF₂: functor_enrichment F₂ E₁ E₂
τ₁: F₁ ⟹ F₂
Hτ₁: nat_trans_enrichment τ₁ EF₁ EF₂
G₁, G₂: C₃ ⟶ C₄
EG₁: functor_enrichment G₁ E₃ E₄
EG₂: functor_enrichment G₂ E₃ E₄
τ₂: G₁ ⟹ G₂
Hτ₂: nat_trans_enrichment τ₂ EG₁ EG₂
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₃
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₄
θ: enriched_profunctor_square EF₁ EG₂ P Q
z: C₃
x: C₁
enriched_from_arr E₄ (τ₂ z)
#⊗ identity ((E₂ ⦃ F₁ x, F₂ x ⦄) ⊗ Q (G₂ z) (F₁ x))
· (identity (E₄ ⦃ G₁ z, G₂ z ⦄)
   #⊗ rmap_e Q (G₂ z) (F₁ x) (F₂ x)
   · lmap_e Q (G₂ z) (G₁ z) (F₂ x)) = ?t2

    
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
F₁, F₂: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF₁: functor_enrichment F₁ E₁ E₂
EF₂: functor_enrichment F₂ E₁ E₂
τ₁: F₁ ⟹ F₂
Hτ₁: nat_trans_enrichment τ₁ EF₁ EF₂
G₁, G₂: C₃ ⟶ C₄
EG₁: functor_enrichment G₁ E₃ E₄
EG₂: functor_enrichment G₂ E₃ E₄
τ₂: G₁ ⟹ G₂
Hτ₂: nat_trans_enrichment τ₂ EG₁ EG₂
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₃
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₄
θ: enriched_profunctor_square EF₁ EG₂ P Q
z: C₃
x: C₁
enriched_from_arr E₄ (τ₂ z)
#⊗ identity ((E₂ ⦃ F₁ x, F₂ x ⦄) ⊗ Q (G₂ z) (F₁ x))
· (mon_rassociator (E₄ ⦃ G₁ z, G₂ z ⦄)
     (E₂ ⦃ F₁ x, F₂ x ⦄) (Q (G₂ z) (F₁ x))
   · sym_mon_braiding V (E₄ ⦃ G₁ z, G₂ z ⦄)
       (E₂ ⦃ F₁ x, F₂ x ⦄)
     #⊗ identity (Q (G₂ z) (F₁ x))
   · mon_lassociator (E₂ ⦃ F₁ x, F₂ x ⦄)
       (E₄ ⦃ G₁ z, G₂ z ⦄) (Q (G₂ z) (F₁ x))
   · identity (E₂ ⦃ F₁ x, F₂ x ⦄)
     #⊗ lmap_e Q (G₂ z) (G₁ z) (F₁ x)
   · rmap_e Q (G₁ z) (F₁ x) (F₂ x)) = ?t2

    apply idpath.
  
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
F₁, F₂: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF₁: functor_enrichment F₁ E₁ E₂
EF₂: functor_enrichment F₂ E₁ E₂
τ₁: F₁ ⟹ F₂
Hτ₁: nat_trans_enrichment τ₁ EF₁ EF₂
G₁, G₂: C₃ ⟶ C₄
EG₁: functor_enrichment G₁ E₃ E₄
EG₂: functor_enrichment G₂ E₃ E₄
τ₂: G₁ ⟹ G₂
Hτ₂: nat_trans_enrichment τ₂ EG₁ EG₂
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₃
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₄
θ: enriched_profunctor_square EF₁ EG₂ P Q
z: C₃
x: C₁
enriched_from_arr E₂ (τ₁ x)
#⊗ identity (Q (G₂ z) (F₁ x))
· (mon_linvunitor
     ((E₂ ⦃ F₁ x, F₂ x ⦄) ⊗ Q (G₂ z) (F₁ x))
   · (enriched_from_arr E₄ (τ₂ z)
      #⊗ identity
           ((E₂ ⦃ F₁ x, F₂ x ⦄) ⊗ Q (G₂ z) (F₁ x))
      · (mon_rassociator (E₄ ⦃ G₁ z, G₂ z ⦄)
           (E₂ ⦃ F₁ x, F₂ x ⦄) (Q (G₂ z) (F₁ x))
         · sym_mon_braiding V (E₄ ⦃ G₁ z, G₂ z ⦄)
             (E₂ ⦃ F₁ x, F₂ x ⦄)
           #⊗ identity (Q (G₂ z) (F₁ x))
         · mon_lassociator (E₂ ⦃ F₁ x, F₂ x ⦄)
             (E₄ ⦃ G₁ z, G₂ z ⦄) (Q (G₂ z) (F₁ x))
         · identity (E₂ ⦃ F₁ x, F₂ x ⦄)
           #⊗ lmap_e Q (G₂ z) (G₁ z) (F₁ x)
         · rmap_e Q (G₁ z) (F₁ x) (F₂ x)))) =
enriched_from_arr E₄ (τ₂ z)
#⊗ identity (Q (G₂ z) (F₁ x))
· (lmap_e Q (G₂ z) (G₁ z) (F₁ x)
   · (mon_linvunitor (Q (G₁ z) (F₁ x))
      · (enriched_from_arr E₂ (τ₁ x)
         #⊗ identity (Q (G₁ z) (F₁ x))
         · rmap_e Q (G₁ z) (F₁ x) (F₂ x))))

  
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
F₁, F₂: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF₁: functor_enrichment F₁ E₁ E₂
EF₂: functor_enrichment F₂ E₁ E₂
τ₁: F₁ ⟹ F₂
Hτ₁: nat_trans_enrichment τ₁ EF₁ EF₂
G₁, G₂: C₃ ⟶ C₄
EG₁: functor_enrichment G₁ E₃ E₄
EG₂: functor_enrichment G₂ E₃ E₄
τ₂: G₁ ⟹ G₂
Hτ₂: nat_trans_enrichment τ₂ EG₁ EG₂
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₃
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₄
θ: enriched_profunctor_square EF₁ EG₂ P Q
z: C₃
x: C₁
enriched_from_arr E₂ (τ₁ x)
#⊗ identity (Q (G₂ z) (F₁ x))
· mon_linvunitor
    ((E₂ ⦃ F₁ x, F₂ x ⦄) ⊗ Q (G₂ z) (F₁ x))
· enriched_from_arr E₄ (τ₂ z)
  #⊗ identity ((E₂ ⦃ F₁ x, F₂ x ⦄) ⊗ Q (G₂ z) (F₁ x))
· mon_rassociator (E₄ ⦃ G₁ z, G₂ z ⦄)
    (E₂ ⦃ F₁ x, F₂ x ⦄) (Q (G₂ z) (F₁ x))
· sym_mon_braiding V (E₄ ⦃ G₁ z, G₂ z ⦄)
    (E₂ ⦃ F₁ x, F₂ x ⦄) #⊗ identity (Q (G₂ z) (F₁ x))
· mon_lassociator (E₂ ⦃ F₁ x, F₂ x ⦄)
    (E₄ ⦃ G₁ z, G₂ z ⦄) (Q (G₂ z) (F₁ x))
· identity (E₂ ⦃ F₁ x, F₂ x ⦄)
  #⊗ lmap_e Q (G₂ z) (G₁ z) (F₁ x)
· rmap_e Q (G₁ z) (F₁ x) (F₂ x) =
enriched_from_arr E₄ (τ₂ z)
#⊗ identity (Q (G₂ z) (F₁ x))
· lmap_e Q (G₂ z) (G₁ z) (F₁ x)
· mon_linvunitor (Q (G₁ z) (F₁ x))
· enriched_from_arr E₂ (τ₁ x)
  #⊗ identity (Q (G₁ z) (F₁ x))
· rmap_e Q (G₁ z) (F₁ x) (F₂ x)

C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V

F₁, F₂: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF₁: functor_enrichment F₁ E₁ E₂
EF₂: functor_enrichment F₂ E₁ E₂

EG₁: functor_enrichment G₁ E₃ E₄
EG₂: functor_enrichment G₂ E₃ E₄
τ₂: G₁ ⟹ G₂
Hτ₂: nat_trans_enrichment τ₂ EG₁ EG₂
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₃
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₄
θ: enriched_profunctor_square EF₁ EG₂ P Q
z: C₃
x: C₁
enriched_from_arr E₂ (τ₁ x)
#⊗ identity (Q (G₂ z) (F₁ x))
· mon_linvunitor
    ((E₂ ⦃ F₁ x, F₂ x ⦄) ⊗ Q (G₂ z) (F₁ x))
· enriched_from_arr E₄ (τ₂ z)
  #⊗ identity ((E₂ ⦃ F₁ x, F₂ x ⦄) ⊗ Q (G₂ z) (F₁ x))
· mon_rassociator (E₄ ⦃ G₁ z, G₂ z ⦄)
    (E₂ ⦃ F₁ x, F₂ x ⦄) (Q (G₂ z) (F₁ x))
· sym_mon_braiding V (E₄ ⦃ G₁ z, G₂ z ⦄)
    (E₂ ⦃ F₁ x, F₂ x ⦄) #⊗ identity (Q (G₂ z) (F₁ x))
· mon_lassociator (E₂ ⦃ F₁ x, F₂ x ⦄)
    (E₄ ⦃ G₁ z, G₂ z ⦄) (Q (G₂ z) (F₁ x))
· identity (E₂ ⦃ F₁ x, F₂ x ⦄)
  #⊗ lmap_e Q (G₂ z) (G₁ z) (F₁ x) =
enriched_from_arr E₄ (τ₂ z)
#⊗ identity (Q (G₂ z) (F₁ x))
· lmap_e Q (G₂ z) (G₁ z) (F₁ x)
· mon_linvunitor (Q (G₁ z) (F₁ x))
· enriched_from_arr E₂ (τ₁ x)
  #⊗ identity (Q (G₁ z) (F₁ x))

EF₁: functor_enrichment F₁ E₁ E₂
EF₂: functor_enrichment F₂ E₁ E₂
τ₁: F₁ ⟹ F₂

EG₁: functor_enrichment G₁ E₃ E₄
EG₂: functor_enrichment G₂ E₃ E₄
τ₂: G₁ ⟹ G₂
Hτ₂: nat_trans_enrichment τ₂ EG₁ EG₂
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₃
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₄
θ: enriched_profunctor_square EF₁ EG₂ P Q
z: C₃
x: C₁
enriched_from_arr E₄ (τ₂ z)
#⊗ identity (Q (G₂ z) (F₁ x))
· lmap_e Q (G₂ z) (G₁ z) (F₁ x)
· mon_linvunitor (Q (G₁ z) (F₁ x))
· enriched_from_arr E₂ (τ₁ x)
  #⊗ identity (Q (G₁ z) (F₁ x)) =
enriched_from_arr E₂ (τ₁ x)
#⊗ identity (Q (G₂ z) (F₁ x))
· mon_linvunitor
    ((E₂ ⦃ F₁ x, F₂ x ⦄) ⊗ Q (G₂ z) (F₁ x))
· enriched_from_arr E₄ (τ₂ z)
  #⊗ identity ((E₂ ⦃ F₁ x, F₂ x ⦄) ⊗ Q (G₂ z) (F₁ x))
· mon_rassociator (E₄ ⦃ G₁ z, G₂ z ⦄)
    (E₂ ⦃ F₁ x, F₂ x ⦄) (Q (G₂ z) (F₁ x))
· sym_mon_braiding V (E₄ ⦃ G₁ z, G₂ z ⦄)
    (E₂ ⦃ F₁ x, F₂ x ⦄) #⊗ identity (Q (G₂ z) (F₁ x))
· mon_lassociator (E₂ ⦃ F₁ x, F₂ x ⦄)
    (E₄ ⦃ G₁ z, G₂ z ⦄) (Q (G₂ z) (F₁ x))
· identity (E₂ ⦃ F₁ x, F₂ x ⦄)
  #⊗ lmap_e Q (G₂ z) (G₁ z) (F₁ x)

z: C₃
x: C₁
enriched_from_arr E₄ (τ₂ z)
#⊗ identity (Q (G₂ z) (F₁ x))
· lmap_e Q (G₂ z) (G₁ z) (F₁ x)
· mon_linvunitor (Q (G₁ z) (F₁ x))
· enriched_from_arr E₂ (τ₁ x)
  #⊗ identity (Q (G₁ z) (F₁ x)) = ?b
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
F₁, F₂: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF₁: functor_enrichment F₁ E₁ E₂
EF₂: functor_enrichment F₂ E₁ E₂
τ₁: F₁ ⟹ F₂
Hτ₁: nat_trans_enrichment τ₁ EF₁ EF₂
G₁, G₂: C₃ ⟶ C₄
EG₁: functor_enrichment G₁ E₃ E₄
EG₂: functor_enrichment G₂ E₃ E₄
τ₂: G₁ ⟹ G₂
Hτ₂: nat_trans_enrichment τ₂ EG₁ EG₂
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₃
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₄
θ: enriched_profunctor_square EF₁ EG₂ P Q
z: C₃
x: C₁
?b =
enriched_from_arr E₂ (τ₁ x)
#⊗ identity (Q (G₂ z) (F₁ x))
· mon_linvunitor
    ((E₂ ⦃ F₁ x, F₂ x ⦄) ⊗ Q (G₂ z) (F₁ x))
· enriched_from_arr E₄ (τ₂ z)
  #⊗ identity ((E₂ ⦃ F₁ x, F₂ x ⦄) ⊗ Q (G₂ z) (F₁ x))
· mon_rassociator (E₄ ⦃ G₁ z, G₂ z ⦄)
    (E₂ ⦃ F₁ x, F₂ x ⦄) (Q (G₂ z) (F₁ x))
· sym_mon_braiding V (E₄ ⦃ G₁ z, G₂ z ⦄)
    (E₂ ⦃ F₁ x, F₂ x ⦄) #⊗ identity (Q (G₂ z) (F₁ x))
· mon_lassociator (E₂ ⦃ F₁ x, F₂ x ⦄)
    (E₄ ⦃ G₁ z, G₂ z ⦄) (Q (G₂ z) (F₁ x))
· identity (E₂ ⦃ F₁ x, F₂ x ⦄)
  #⊗ lmap_e Q (G₂ z) (G₁ z) (F₁ x)

C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
F₁, F₂: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF₁: functor_enrichment F₁ E₁ E₂

Hτ₁: nat_trans_enrichment τ₁ EF₁ EF₂

EG₁: functor_enrichment G₁ E₃ E₄
EG₂: functor_enrichment G₂ E₃ E₄
τ₂: G₁ ⟹ G₂
Hτ₂: nat_trans_enrichment τ₂ EG₁ EG₂

Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₄
θ: enriched_profunctor_square EF₁ EG₂ P Q
z: C₃
x: C₁
lmap_e Q (G₂ z) (G₁ z) (F₁ x)
· (mon_linvunitor (Q (G₁ z) (F₁ x))
   · enriched_from_arr E₂ (τ₁ x)
     #⊗ identity (Q (G₁ z) (F₁ x))) = ?t2

    
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
F₁, F₂: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF₁: functor_enrichment F₁ E₁ E₂
EF₂: functor_enrichment F₂ E₁ E₂
τ₁: F₁ ⟹ F₂
Hτ₁: nat_trans_enrichment τ₁ EF₁ EF₂
G₁, G₂: C₃ ⟶ C₄
EG₁: functor_enrichment G₁ E₃ E₄
EG₂: functor_enrichment G₂ E₃ E₄
τ₂: G₁ ⟹ G₂
Hτ₂: nat_trans_enrichment τ₂ EG₁ EG₂
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₃
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₄
θ: enriched_profunctor_square EF₁ EG₂ P Q
z: C₃
x: C₁
lmap_e Q (G₂ z) (G₁ z) (F₁ x)
· mon_linvunitor (Q (G₁ z) (F₁ x))
· enriched_from_arr E₂ (τ₁ x)
  #⊗ identity (Q (G₁ z) (F₁ x)) = ?t2

    
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
F₁, F₂: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF₁: functor_enrichment F₁ E₁ E₂
EF₂: functor_enrichment F₂ E₁ E₂
τ₁: F₁ ⟹ F₂
Hτ₁: nat_trans_enrichment τ₁ EF₁ EF₂
G₁, G₂: C₃ ⟶ C₄
EG₁: functor_enrichment G₁ E₃ E₄
EG₂: functor_enrichment G₂ E₃ E₄
τ₂: G₁ ⟹ G₂
Hτ₂: nat_trans_enrichment τ₂ EG₁ EG₂
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₃
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₄
θ: enriched_profunctor_square EF₁ EG₂ P Q
z: C₃
x: C₁
mon_linvunitor ((E₄ ⦃ G₁ z, G₂ z ⦄) ⊗ Q (G₂ z) (F₁ x))
· identity I_{ V} #⊗ lmap_e Q (G₂ z) (G₁ z) (F₁ x)
· enriched_from_arr E₂ (τ₁ x)
  #⊗ identity (Q (G₁ z) (F₁ x)) = ?t2

C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category

P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₃
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₄
θ: enriched_profunctor_square EF₁ EG₂ P Q
z: C₃
x: C₁
mon_linvunitor ((E₄ ⦃ G₁ z, G₂ z ⦄) ⊗ Q (G₂ z) (F₁ x))
· (identity I_{ V} #⊗ lmap_e Q (G₂ z) (G₁ z) (F₁ x)
   · enriched_from_arr E₂ (τ₁ x)
     #⊗ identity (Q (G₁ z) (F₁ x))) = ?t2

    
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
F₁, F₂: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF₁: functor_enrichment F₁ E₁ E₂
EF₂: functor_enrichment F₂ E₁ E₂
τ₁: F₁ ⟹ F₂
Hτ₁: nat_trans_enrichment τ₁ EF₁ EF₂
G₁, G₂: C₃ ⟶ C₄
EG₁: functor_enrichment G₁ E₃ E₄
EG₂: functor_enrichment G₂ E₃ E₄
τ₂: G₁ ⟹ G₂
Hτ₂: nat_trans_enrichment τ₂ EG₁ EG₂
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₃
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₄
θ: enriched_profunctor_square EF₁ EG₂ P Q
z: C₃
x: C₁
mon_linvunitor ((E₄ ⦃ G₁ z, G₂ z ⦄) ⊗ Q (G₂ z) (F₁ x))
· enriched_from_arr E₂ (τ₁ x)
  #⊗ lmap_e Q (G₂ z) (G₁ z) (F₁ x) = ?t2

    
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
F₁, F₂: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF₁: functor_enrichment F₁ E₁ E₂
EF₂: functor_enrichment F₂ E₁ E₂
τ₁: F₁ ⟹ F₂
Hτ₁: nat_trans_enrichment τ₁ EF₁ EF₂
G₁, G₂: C₃ ⟶ C₄
EG₁: functor_enrichment G₁ E₃ E₄
EG₂: functor_enrichment G₂ E₃ E₄
τ₂: G₁ ⟹ G₂
Hτ₂: nat_trans_enrichment τ₂ EG₁ EG₂
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₃
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₄
θ: enriched_profunctor_square EF₁ EG₂ P Q
z: C₃
x: C₁
mon_linvunitor ((E₄ ⦃ G₁ z, G₂ z ⦄) ⊗ Q (G₂ z) (F₁ x))
· (enriched_from_arr E₂ (τ₁ x)
   #⊗ identity ((E₄ ⦃ G₁ z, G₂ z ⦄) ⊗ Q (G₂ z) (F₁ x))
   · identity (E₂ ⦃ F₁ x, F₂ x ⦄)
     #⊗ lmap_e Q (G₂ z) (G₁ z) (F₁ x)) = ?t2

    apply idpath.
  
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
F₁, F₂: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF₁: functor_enrichment F₁ E₁ E₂
EF₂: functor_enrichment F₂ E₁ E₂
τ₁: F₁ ⟹ F₂
Hτ₁: nat_trans_enrichment τ₁ EF₁ EF₂
G₁, G₂: C₃ ⟶ C₄
EG₁: functor_enrichment G₁ E₃ E₄
EG₂: functor_enrichment G₂ E₃ E₄
τ₂: G₁ ⟹ G₂
Hτ₂: nat_trans_enrichment τ₂ EG₁ EG₂
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₃
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₄
θ: enriched_profunctor_square EF₁ EG₂ P Q
z: C₃
x: C₁
enriched_from_arr E₄ (τ₂ z)
#⊗ identity (Q (G₂ z) (F₁ x))
· (mon_linvunitor
     ((E₄ ⦃ G₁ z, G₂ z ⦄) ⊗ Q (G₂ z) (F₁ x))
   · (enriched_from_arr E₂ (τ₁ x)
      #⊗ identity
           ((E₄ ⦃ G₁ z, G₂ z ⦄) ⊗ Q (G₂ z) (F₁ x))
      · identity (E₂ ⦃ F₁ x, F₂ x ⦄)
        #⊗ lmap_e Q (G₂ z) (G₁ z) (F₁ x))) =
enriched_from_arr E₂ (τ₁ x)
#⊗ identity (Q (G₂ z) (F₁ x))
· mon_linvunitor
    ((E₂ ⦃ F₁ x, F₂ x ⦄) ⊗ Q (G₂ z) (F₁ x))
· enriched_from_arr E₄ (τ₂ z)
  #⊗ identity ((E₂ ⦃ F₁ x, F₂ x ⦄) ⊗ Q (G₂ z) (F₁ x))
· mon_rassociator (E₄ ⦃ G₁ z, G₂ z ⦄)
    (E₂ ⦃ F₁ x, F₂ x ⦄) (Q (G₂ z) (F₁ x))
· sym_mon_braiding V (E₄ ⦃ G₁ z, G₂ z ⦄)
    (E₂ ⦃ F₁ x, F₂ x ⦄) #⊗ identity (Q (G₂ z) (F₁ x))
· mon_lassociator (E₂ ⦃ F₁ x, F₂ x ⦄)
    (E₄ ⦃ G₁ z, G₂ z ⦄) (Q (G₂ z) (F₁ x))
· identity (E₂ ⦃ F₁ x, F₂ x ⦄)
  #⊗ lmap_e Q (G₂ z) (G₁ z) (F₁ x)

  
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
F₁, F₂: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF₁: functor_enrichment F₁ E₁ E₂
EF₂: functor_enrichment F₂ E₁ E₂
τ₁: F₁ ⟹ F₂
Hτ₁: nat_trans_enrichment τ₁ EF₁ EF₂
G₁, G₂: C₃ ⟶ C₄
EG₁: functor_enrichment G₁ E₃ E₄
EG₂: functor_enrichment G₂ E₃ E₄
τ₂: G₁ ⟹ G₂
Hτ₂: nat_trans_enrichment τ₂ EG₁ EG₂
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₃
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₄
θ: enriched_profunctor_square EF₁ EG₂ P Q
z: C₃
x: C₁
enriched_from_arr E₄ (τ₂ z)
#⊗ identity (Q (G₂ z) (F₁ x))
· mon_linvunitor
    ((E₄ ⦃ G₁ z, G₂ z ⦄) ⊗ Q (G₂ z) (F₁ x))
· enriched_from_arr E₂ (τ₁ x)
  #⊗ identity ((E₄ ⦃ G₁ z, G₂ z ⦄) ⊗ Q (G₂ z) (F₁ x))
· identity (E₂ ⦃ F₁ x, F₂ x ⦄)
  #⊗ lmap_e Q (G₂ z) (G₁ z) (F₁ x) =
enriched_from_arr E₂ (τ₁ x)
#⊗ identity (Q (G₂ z) (F₁ x))
· mon_linvunitor
    ((E₂ ⦃ F₁ x, F₂ x ⦄) ⊗ Q (G₂ z) (F₁ x))
· enriched_from_arr E₄ (τ₂ z)
  #⊗ identity ((E₂ ⦃ F₁ x, F₂ x ⦄) ⊗ Q (G₂ z) (F₁ x))
· mon_rassociator (E₄ ⦃ G₁ z, G₂ z ⦄)
    (E₂ ⦃ F₁ x, F₂ x ⦄) (Q (G₂ z) (F₁ x))
· sym_mon_braiding V (E₄ ⦃ G₁ z, G₂ z ⦄)
    (E₂ ⦃ F₁ x, F₂ x ⦄) #⊗ identity (Q (G₂ z) (F₁ x))
· mon_lassociator (E₂ ⦃ F₁ x, F₂ x ⦄)
    (E₄ ⦃ G₁ z, G₂ z ⦄) (Q (G₂ z) (F₁ x))
· identity (E₂ ⦃ F₁ x, F₂ x ⦄)
  #⊗ lmap_e Q (G₂ z) (G₁ z) (F₁ x)

  
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
F₁, F₂: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF₁: functor_enrichment F₁ E₁ E₂
EF₂: functor_enrichment F₂ E₁ E₂
τ₁: F₁ ⟹ F₂
Hτ₁: nat_trans_enrichment τ₁ EF₁ EF₂
G₁, G₂: C₃ ⟶ C₄
EG₁: functor_enrichment G₁ E₃ E₄
EG₂: functor_enrichment G₂ E₃ E₄
τ₂: G₁ ⟹ G₂
Hτ₂: nat_trans_enrichment τ₂ EG₁ EG₂
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₃
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₄
θ: enriched_profunctor_square EF₁ EG₂ P Q
z: C₃
x: C₁
enriched_from_arr E₄ (τ₂ z)
#⊗ identity (Q (G₂ z) (F₁ x))
· mon_linvunitor
    ((E₄ ⦃ G₁ z, G₂ z ⦄) ⊗ Q (G₂ z) (F₁ x))
· enriched_from_arr E₂ (τ₁ x)
  #⊗ identity ((E₄ ⦃ G₁ z, G₂ z ⦄) ⊗ Q (G₂ z) (F₁ x)) =
enriched_from_arr E₂ (τ₁ x)
#⊗ identity (Q (G₂ z) (F₁ x))
· mon_linvunitor
    ((E₂ ⦃ F₁ x, F₂ x ⦄) ⊗ Q (G₂ z) (F₁ x))
· enriched_from_arr E₄ (τ₂ z)
  #⊗ identity ((E₂ ⦃ F₁ x, F₂ x ⦄) ⊗ Q (G₂ z) (F₁ x))
· mon_rassociator (E₄ ⦃ G₁ z, G₂ z ⦄)
    (E₂ ⦃ F₁ x, F₂ x ⦄) (Q (G₂ z) (F₁ x))
· sym_mon_braiding V (E₄ ⦃ G₁ z, G₂ z ⦄)
    (E₂ ⦃ F₁ x, F₂ x ⦄) #⊗ identity (Q (G₂ z) (F₁ x))
· mon_lassociator (E₂ ⦃ F₁ x, F₂ x ⦄)
    (E₄ ⦃ G₁ z, G₂ z ⦄) (Q (G₂ z) (F₁ x))

  
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
F₁, F₂: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF₁: functor_enrichment F₁ E₁ E₂
EF₂: functor_enrichment F₂ E₁ E₂
τ₁: F₁ ⟹ F₂
Hτ₁: nat_trans_enrichment τ₁ EF₁ EF₂
G₁, G₂: C₃ ⟶ C₄
EG₁: functor_enrichment G₁ E₃ E₄
EG₂: functor_enrichment G₂ E₃ E₄
τ₂: G₁ ⟹ G₂
Hτ₂: nat_trans_enrichment τ₂ EG₁ EG₂
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₃
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₄
θ: enriched_profunctor_square EF₁ EG₂ P Q
z: C₃
x: C₁
enriched_from_arr E₄ (τ₂ z)
#⊗ identity (Q (G₂ z) (F₁ x))
· mon_linvunitor
    ((E₄ ⦃ G₁ z, G₂ z ⦄) ⊗ Q (G₂ z) (F₁ x))
· enriched_from_arr E₂ (τ₁ x)
  #⊗ identity ((E₄ ⦃ G₁ z, G₂ z ⦄) ⊗ Q (G₂ z) (F₁ x)) =
?b
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
F₁, F₂: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF₁: functor_enrichment F₁ E₁ E₂
EF₂: functor_enrichment F₂ E₁ E₂
τ₁: F₁ ⟹ F₂
Hτ₁: nat_trans_enrichment τ₁ EF₁ EF₂
G₁, G₂: C₃ ⟶ C₄
EG₁: functor_enrichment G₁ E₃ E₄
EG₂: functor_enrichment G₂ E₃ E₄
τ₂: G₁ ⟹ G₂
Hτ₂: nat_trans_enrichment τ₂ EG₁ EG₂
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₃
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₄
θ: enriched_profunctor_square EF₁ EG₂ P Q
z: C₃
x: C₁
?b =
enriched_from_arr E₂ (τ₁ x)
#⊗ identity (Q (G₂ z) (F₁ x))
· mon_linvunitor
    ((E₂ ⦃ F₁ x, F₂ x ⦄) ⊗ Q (G₂ z) (F₁ x))
· enriched_from_arr E₄ (τ₂ z)
  #⊗ identity ((E₂ ⦃ F₁ x, F₂ x ⦄) ⊗ Q (G₂ z) (F₁ x))
· mon_rassociator (E₄ ⦃ G₁ z, G₂ z ⦄)
    (E₂ ⦃ F₁ x, F₂ x ⦄) (Q (G₂ z) (F₁ x))
· sym_mon_braiding V (E₄ ⦃ G₁ z, G₂ z ⦄)
    (E₂ ⦃ F₁ x, F₂ x ⦄) #⊗ identity (Q (G₂ z) (F₁ x))
· mon_lassociator (E₂ ⦃ F₁ x, F₂ x ⦄)
    (E₄ ⦃ G₁ z, G₂ z ⦄) (Q (G₂ z) (F₁ x))

    ((E₄ ⦃ G₁ z, G₂ z ⦄) ⊗ Q (G₂ z) (F₁ x))

  #⊗ identity ((E₄ ⦃ G₁ z, G₂ z ⦄) ⊗ Q (G₂ z) (F₁ x)) =

V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V

F₁, F₂: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF₁: functor_enrichment F₁ E₁ E₂
EF₂: functor_enrichment F₂ E₁ E₂
τ₁: F₁ ⟹ F₂
Hτ₁: nat_trans_enrichment τ₁ EF₁ EF₂
G₁, G₂: C₃ ⟶ C₄
EG₁: functor_enrichment G₁ E₃ E₄
EG₂: functor_enrichment G₂ E₃ E₄
τ₂: G₁ ⟹ G₂
Hτ₂: nat_trans_enrichment τ₂ EG₁ EG₂
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₃
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₄
θ: enriched_profunctor_square EF₁ EG₂ P Q
z: C₃
x: C₁
enriched_from_arr E₄ (τ₂ z)
#⊗ identity (Q (G₂ z) (F₁ x))
· (mon_linvunitor (E₄ ⦃ G₁ z, G₂ z ⦄)
   #⊗ identity (Q (G₂ z) (F₁ x))
   · mon_lassociator I_{ V} (E₄ ⦃ G₁ z, G₂ z ⦄)
       (Q (G₂ z) (F₁ x)))
· enriched_from_arr E₂ (τ₁ x)
  #⊗ identity ((E₄ ⦃ G₁ z, G₂ z ⦄) ⊗ Q (G₂ z) (F₁ x)) =
?b

    
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
F₁, F₂: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF₁: functor_enrichment F₁ E₁ E₂
EF₂: functor_enrichment F₂ E₁ E₂
τ₁: F₁ ⟹ F₂
Hτ₁: nat_trans_enrichment τ₁ EF₁ EF₂
G₁, G₂: C₃ ⟶ C₄
EG₁: functor_enrichment G₁ E₃ E₄
EG₂: functor_enrichment G₂ E₃ E₄
τ₂: G₁ ⟹ G₂
Hτ₂: nat_trans_enrichment τ₂ EG₁ EG₂
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₃
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₄
θ: enriched_profunctor_square EF₁ EG₂ P Q
z: C₃
x: C₁
enriched_from_arr E₄ (τ₂ z)
#⊗ identity (Q (G₂ z) (F₁ x))
· (mon_linvunitor (E₄ ⦃ G₁ z, G₂ z ⦄)
   #⊗ identity (Q (G₂ z) (F₁ x))
   · (mon_lassociator I_{ V} (E₄ ⦃ G₁ z, G₂ z ⦄)
        (Q (G₂ z) (F₁ x))
      · enriched_from_arr E₂ (τ₁ x)
        #⊗ identity
             ((E₄ ⦃ G₁ z, G₂ z ⦄) ⊗ Q (G₂ z) (F₁ x)))) =
?b

    
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
F₁, F₂: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF₁: functor_enrichment F₁ E₁ E₂
EF₂: functor_enrichment F₂ E₁ E₂
τ₁: F₁ ⟹ F₂
Hτ₁: nat_trans_enrichment τ₁ EF₁ EF₂
G₁, G₂: C₃ ⟶ C₄
EG₁: functor_enrichment G₁ E₃ E₄
EG₂: functor_enrichment G₂ E₃ E₄
τ₂: G₁ ⟹ G₂
Hτ₂: nat_trans_enrichment τ₂ EG₁ EG₂
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₃
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₄
θ: enriched_profunctor_square EF₁ EG₂ P Q
z: C₃
x: C₁
enriched_from_arr E₄ (τ₂ z)
#⊗ identity (Q (G₂ z) (F₁ x))
· (mon_linvunitor (E₄ ⦃ G₁ z, G₂ z ⦄)
   #⊗ identity (Q (G₂ z) (F₁ x))
   · (mon_lassociator I_{ V} (E₄ ⦃ G₁ z, G₂ z ⦄)
        (Q (G₂ z) (F₁ x))
      · enriched_from_arr E₂ (τ₁ x)
        #⊗ (identity (E₄ ⦃ G₁ z, G₂ z ⦄)
            #⊗ identity (Q (G₂ z) (F₁ x))))) = ?b

    
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
F₁, F₂: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF₁: functor_enrichment F₁ E₁ E₂
EF₂: functor_enrichment F₂ E₁ E₂
τ₁: F₁ ⟹ F₂
Hτ₁: nat_trans_enrichment τ₁ EF₁ EF₂
G₁, G₂: C₃ ⟶ C₄
EG₁: functor_enrichment G₁ E₃ E₄
EG₂: functor_enrichment G₂ E₃ E₄
τ₂: G₁ ⟹ G₂
Hτ₂: nat_trans_enrichment τ₂ EG₁ EG₂
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₃
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₄
θ: enriched_profunctor_square EF₁ EG₂ P Q
z: C₃
x: C₁
enriched_from_arr E₄ (τ₂ z)
#⊗ identity (Q (G₂ z) (F₁ x))
· (mon_linvunitor (E₄ ⦃ G₁ z, G₂ z ⦄)
   #⊗ identity (Q (G₂ z) (F₁ x))
   · ((enriched_from_arr E₂ (τ₁ x)
       #⊗ identity (E₄ ⦃ G₁ z, G₂ z ⦄))
      #⊗ identity (Q (G₂ z) (F₁ x))
      · mon_lassociator (E₂ ⦃ F₁ x, F₂ x ⦄)
          (E₄ ⦃ G₁ z, G₂ z ⦄) (Q (G₂ z) (F₁ x)))) = 
?b

    apply idpath.
  
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
F₁, F₂: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF₁: functor_enrichment F₁ E₁ E₂
EF₂: functor_enrichment F₂ E₁ E₂
τ₁: F₁ ⟹ F₂
Hτ₁: nat_trans_enrichment τ₁ EF₁ EF₂
G₁, G₂: C₃ ⟶ C₄
EG₁: functor_enrichment G₁ E₃ E₄
EG₂: functor_enrichment G₂ E₃ E₄
τ₂: G₁ ⟹ G₂
Hτ₂: nat_trans_enrichment τ₂ EG₁ EG₂
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₃
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₄
θ: enriched_profunctor_square EF₁ EG₂ P Q
z: C₃
x: C₁
enriched_from_arr E₄ (τ₂ z)
#⊗ identity (Q (G₂ z) (F₁ x))
· (mon_linvunitor (E₄ ⦃ G₁ z, G₂ z ⦄)
   #⊗ identity (Q (G₂ z) (F₁ x))
   · ((enriched_from_arr E₂ (τ₁ x)
       #⊗ identity (E₄ ⦃ G₁ z, G₂ z ⦄))
      #⊗ identity (Q (G₂ z) (F₁ x))
      · mon_lassociator (E₂ ⦃ F₁ x, F₂ x ⦄)
          (E₄ ⦃ G₁ z, G₂ z ⦄) (Q (G₂ z) (F₁ x)))) =
enriched_from_arr E₂ (τ₁ x)
#⊗ identity (Q (G₂ z) (F₁ x))
· mon_linvunitor
    ((E₂ ⦃ F₁ x, F₂ x ⦄) ⊗ Q (G₂ z) (F₁ x))
· enriched_from_arr E₄ (τ₂ z)
  #⊗ identity ((E₂ ⦃ F₁ x, F₂ x ⦄) ⊗ Q (G₂ z) (F₁ x))
· mon_rassociator (E₄ ⦃ G₁ z, G₂ z ⦄)
    (E₂ ⦃ F₁ x, F₂ x ⦄) (Q (G₂ z) (F₁ x))
· sym_mon_braiding V (E₄ ⦃ G₁ z, G₂ z ⦄)
    (E₂ ⦃ F₁ x, F₂ x ⦄) #⊗ identity (Q (G₂ z) (F₁ x))
· mon_lassociator (E₂ ⦃ F₁ x, F₂ x ⦄)
    (E₄ ⦃ G₁ z, G₂ z ⦄) (Q (G₂ z) (F₁ x))

  
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
F₁, F₂: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF₁: functor_enrichment F₁ E₁ E₂
EF₂: functor_enrichment F₂ E₁ E₂
τ₁: F₁ ⟹ F₂
Hτ₁: nat_trans_enrichment τ₁ EF₁ EF₂
G₁, G₂: C₃ ⟶ C₄
EG₁: functor_enrichment G₁ E₃ E₄
EG₂: functor_enrichment G₂ E₃ E₄
τ₂: G₁ ⟹ G₂
Hτ₂: nat_trans_enrichment τ₂ EG₁ EG₂
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₃
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₄
θ: enriched_profunctor_square EF₁ EG₂ P Q
z: C₃
x: C₁
enriched_from_arr E₄ (τ₂ z)
#⊗ identity (Q (G₂ z) (F₁ x))
· mon_linvunitor (E₄ ⦃ G₁ z, G₂ z ⦄)
  #⊗ identity (Q (G₂ z) (F₁ x))
· (enriched_from_arr E₂ (τ₁ x)
   #⊗ identity (E₄ ⦃ G₁ z, G₂ z ⦄))
  #⊗ identity (Q (G₂ z) (F₁ x))
· mon_lassociator (E₂ ⦃ F₁ x, F₂ x ⦄)
    (E₄ ⦃ G₁ z, G₂ z ⦄) (Q (G₂ z) (F₁ x)) =
enriched_from_arr E₂ (τ₁ x)
#⊗ identity (Q (G₂ z) (F₁ x))
· mon_linvunitor
    ((E₂ ⦃ F₁ x, F₂ x ⦄) ⊗ Q (G₂ z) (F₁ x))
· enriched_from_arr E₄ (τ₂ z)
  #⊗ identity ((E₂ ⦃ F₁ x, F₂ x ⦄) ⊗ Q (G₂ z) (F₁ x))
· mon_rassociator (E₄ ⦃ G₁ z, G₂ z ⦄)
    (E₂ ⦃ F₁ x, F₂ x ⦄) (Q (G₂ z) (F₁ x))
· sym_mon_braiding V (E₄ ⦃ G₁ z, G₂ z ⦄)
    (E₂ ⦃ F₁ x, F₂ x ⦄) #⊗ identity (Q (G₂ z) (F₁ x))
· mon_lassociator (E₂ ⦃ F₁ x, F₂ x ⦄)
    (E₄ ⦃ G₁ z, G₂ z ⦄) (Q (G₂ z) (F₁ x))

  
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
F₁, F₂: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF₁: functor_enrichment F₁ E₁ E₂
EF₂: functor_enrichment F₂ E₁ E₂
τ₁: F₁ ⟹ F₂
Hτ₁: nat_trans_enrichment τ₁ EF₁ EF₂
G₁, G₂: C₃ ⟶ C₄
EG₁: functor_enrichment G₁ E₃ E₄
EG₂: functor_enrichment G₂ E₃ E₄
τ₂: G₁ ⟹ G₂
Hτ₂: nat_trans_enrichment τ₂ EG₁ EG₂
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₃
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₄
θ: enriched_profunctor_square EF₁ EG₂ P Q
z: C₃
x: C₁
enriched_from_arr E₄ (τ₂ z)
#⊗ identity (Q (G₂ z) (F₁ x))
· mon_linvunitor (E₄ ⦃ G₁ z, G₂ z ⦄)
  #⊗ identity (Q (G₂ z) (F₁ x))
· (enriched_from_arr E₂ (τ₁ x)
   #⊗ identity (E₄ ⦃ G₁ z, G₂ z ⦄))
  #⊗ identity (Q (G₂ z) (F₁ x)) =
enriched_from_arr E₂ (τ₁ x)
#⊗ identity (Q (G₂ z) (F₁ x))
· mon_linvunitor
    ((E₂ ⦃ F₁ x, F₂ x ⦄) ⊗ Q (G₂ z) (F₁ x))
· enriched_from_arr E₄ (τ₂ z)
  #⊗ identity ((E₂ ⦃ F₁ x, F₂ x ⦄) ⊗ Q (G₂ z) (F₁ x))
· mon_rassociator (E₄ ⦃ G₁ z, G₂ z ⦄)
    (E₂ ⦃ F₁ x, F₂ x ⦄) (Q (G₂ z) (F₁ x))
· sym_mon_braiding V (E₄ ⦃ G₁ z, G₂ z ⦄)
    (E₂ ⦃ F₁ x, F₂ x ⦄) #⊗ identity (Q (G₂ z) (F₁ x))

  
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
F₁, F₂: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF₁: functor_enrichment F₁ E₁ E₂
EF₂: functor_enrichment F₂ E₁ E₂
τ₁: F₁ ⟹ F₂
Hτ₁: nat_trans_enrichment τ₁ EF₁ EF₂
G₁, G₂: C₃ ⟶ C₄
EG₁: functor_enrichment G₁ E₃ E₄
EG₂: functor_enrichment G₂ E₃ E₄
τ₂: G₁ ⟹ G₂
Hτ₂: nat_trans_enrichment τ₂ EG₁ EG₂
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₃
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₄
θ: enriched_profunctor_square EF₁ EG₂ P Q
z: C₃
x: C₁
enriched_from_arr E₂ (τ₁ x)
#⊗ identity (Q (G₂ z) (F₁ x))
· mon_linvunitor
    ((E₂ ⦃ F₁ x, F₂ x ⦄) ⊗ Q (G₂ z) (F₁ x))
· enriched_from_arr E₄ (τ₂ z)
  #⊗ identity ((E₂ ⦃ F₁ x, F₂ x ⦄) ⊗ Q (G₂ z) (F₁ x))
· mon_rassociator (E₄ ⦃ G₁ z, G₂ z ⦄)
    (E₂ ⦃ F₁ x, F₂ x ⦄) (Q (G₂ z) (F₁ x))
· sym_mon_braiding V (E₄ ⦃ G₁ z, G₂ z ⦄)
    (E₂ ⦃ F₁ x, F₂ x ⦄) #⊗ identity (Q (G₂ z) (F₁ x)) =
enriched_from_arr E₄ (τ₂ z)
#⊗ identity (Q (G₂ z) (F₁ x))
· mon_linvunitor (E₄ ⦃ G₁ z, G₂ z ⦄)
  #⊗ identity (Q (G₂ z) (F₁ x))
· (enriched_from_arr E₂ (τ₁ x)
   #⊗ identity (E₄ ⦃ G₁ z, G₂ z ⦄))
  #⊗ identity (Q (G₂ z) (F₁ x))

  
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
F₁, F₂: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF₁: functor_enrichment F₁ E₁ E₂
EF₂: functor_enrichment F₂ E₁ E₂
τ₁: F₁ ⟹ F₂
Hτ₁: nat_trans_enrichment τ₁ EF₁ EF₂
G₁, G₂: C₃ ⟶ C₄
EG₁: functor_enrichment G₁ E₃ E₄
EG₂: functor_enrichment G₂ E₃ E₄
τ₂: G₁ ⟹ G₂
Hτ₂: nat_trans_enrichment τ₂ EG₁ EG₂
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₃
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₄
θ: enriched_profunctor_square EF₁ EG₂ P Q
z: C₃
x: C₁
enriched_from_arr E₂ (τ₁ x)
#⊗ identity (Q (G₂ z) (F₁ x))
· mon_linvunitor
    ((E₂ ⦃ F₁ x, F₂ x ⦄) ⊗ Q (G₂ z) (F₁ x))
· enriched_from_arr E₄ (τ₂ z)
  #⊗ identity ((E₂ ⦃ F₁ x, F₂ x ⦄) ⊗ Q (G₂ z) (F₁ x))
· mon_rassociator (E₄ ⦃ G₁ z, G₂ z ⦄)
    (E₂ ⦃ F₁ x, F₂ x ⦄) (Q (G₂ z) (F₁ x))
· sym_mon_braiding V (E₄ ⦃ G₁ z, G₂ z ⦄)
    (E₂ ⦃ F₁ x, F₂ x ⦄) #⊗ identity (Q (G₂ z) (F₁ x)) =
?b
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
F₁, F₂: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF₁: functor_enrichment F₁ E₁ E₂
EF₂: functor_enrichment F₂ E₁ E₂
τ₁: F₁ ⟹ F₂
Hτ₁: nat_trans_enrichment τ₁ EF₁ EF₂
G₁, G₂: C₃ ⟶ C₄
EG₁: functor_enrichment G₁ E₃ E₄
EG₂: functor_enrichment G₂ E₃ E₄
τ₂: G₁ ⟹ G₂
Hτ₂: nat_trans_enrichment τ₂ EG₁ EG₂
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₃
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₄
θ: enriched_profunctor_square EF₁ EG₂ P Q
z: C₃
x: C₁
?b =
enriched_from_arr E₄ (τ₂ z)
#⊗ identity (Q (G₂ z) (F₁ x))
· mon_linvunitor (E₄ ⦃ G₁ z, G₂ z ⦄)
  #⊗ identity (Q (G₂ z) (F₁ x))
· (enriched_from_arr E₂ (τ₁ x)
   #⊗ identity (E₄ ⦃ G₁ z, G₂ z ⦄))
  #⊗ identity (Q (G₂ z) (F₁ x))

P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₃
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₄
θ: enriched_profunctor_square EF₁ EG₂ P Q
z: C₃
x: C₁
enriched_from_arr E₂ (τ₁ x)
#⊗ identity (Q (G₂ z) (F₁ x))
· mon_linvunitor
    ((E₂ ⦃ F₁ x, F₂ x ⦄) ⊗ Q (G₂ z) (F₁ x))
· enriched_from_arr E₄ (τ₂ z)
  #⊗ identity ((E₂ ⦃ F₁ x, F₂ x ⦄) ⊗ Q (G₂ z) (F₁ x))
· mon_rassociator (E₄ ⦃ G₁ z, G₂ z ⦄)
    (E₂ ⦃ F₁ x, F₂ x ⦄) (Q (G₂ z) (F₁ x))
· sym_mon_braiding V (E₄ ⦃ G₁ z, G₂ z ⦄)
    (E₂ ⦃ F₁ x, F₂ x ⦄) #⊗ identity (Q (G₂ z) (F₁ x)) =
?b

    
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
F₁, F₂: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF₁: functor_enrichment F₁ E₁ E₂
EF₂: functor_enrichment F₂ E₁ E₂
τ₁: F₁ ⟹ F₂
Hτ₁: nat_trans_enrichment τ₁ EF₁ EF₂

EG₁: functor_enrichment G₁ E₃ E₄
EG₂: functor_enrichment G₂ E₃ E₄

Hτ₂: nat_trans_enrichment τ₂ EG₁ EG₂
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₃
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₄
θ: enriched_profunctor_square EF₁ EG₂ P Q
z: C₃
x: C₁
enriched_from_arr E₂ (τ₁ x)
#⊗ identity (Q (G₂ z) (F₁ x))
· (mon_linvunitor (E₂ ⦃ F₁ x, F₂ x ⦄)
   #⊗ identity (Q (G₂ z) (F₁ x))
   · mon_lassociator I_{ V} (E₂ ⦃ F₁ x, F₂ x ⦄)
       (Q (G₂ z) (F₁ x)))
· enriched_from_arr E₄ (τ₂ z)
  #⊗ identity ((E₂ ⦃ F₁ x, F₂ x ⦄) ⊗ Q (G₂ z) (F₁ x))
· mon_rassociator (E₄ ⦃ G₁ z, G₂ z ⦄)
    (E₂ ⦃ F₁ x, F₂ x ⦄) (Q (G₂ z) (F₁ x))
· sym_mon_braiding V (E₄ ⦃ G₁ z, G₂ z ⦄)
    (E₂ ⦃ F₁ x, F₂ x ⦄) #⊗ identity (Q (G₂ z) (F₁ x)) =
?b

C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
F₁, F₂: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF₁: functor_enrichment F₁ E₁ E₂
EF₂: functor_enrichment F₂ E₁ E₂
τ₁: F₁ ⟹ F₂

EG₂: functor_enrichment G₂ E₃ E₄

Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₄
θ: enriched_profunctor_square EF₁ EG₂ P Q
z: C₃
x: C₁
enriched_from_arr E₂ (τ₁ x)
#⊗ identity (Q (G₂ z) (F₁ x))
· (mon_linvunitor (E₂ ⦃ F₁ x, F₂ x ⦄)
   #⊗ identity (Q (G₂ z) (F₁ x))
   · (mon_lassociator I_{ V} (E₂ ⦃ F₁ x, F₂ x ⦄)
        (Q (G₂ z) (F₁ x))
      · (enriched_from_arr E₄ (τ₂ z)
         #⊗ identity
              ((E₂ ⦃ F₁ x, F₂ x ⦄) ⊗ Q (G₂ z) (F₁ x))
         · (mon_rassociator (E₄ ⦃ G₁ z, G₂ z ⦄)
              (E₂ ⦃ F₁ x, F₂ x ⦄) (Q (G₂ z) (F₁ x))
            · sym_mon_braiding V (E₄ ⦃ G₁ z, G₂ z ⦄)
                (E₂ ⦃ F₁ x, F₂ x ⦄)
              #⊗ identity (Q (G₂ z) (F₁ x)))))) = 
?b

    
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
F₁, F₂: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF₁: functor_enrichment F₁ E₁ E₂
EF₂: functor_enrichment F₂ E₁ E₂
τ₁: F₁ ⟹ F₂

Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₄
θ: enriched_profunctor_square EF₁ EG₂ P Q
z: C₃
x: C₁
mon_lassociator I_{ V} (E₂ ⦃ F₁ x, F₂ x ⦄)
  (Q (G₂ z) (F₁ x))
· (enriched_from_arr E₄ (τ₂ z)
   #⊗ identity ((E₂ ⦃ F₁ x, F₂ x ⦄) ⊗ Q (G₂ z) (F₁ x))
   · (mon_rassociator (E₄ ⦃ G₁ z, G₂ z ⦄)
        (E₂ ⦃ F₁ x, F₂ x ⦄) (Q (G₂ z) (F₁ x))
      · sym_mon_braiding V (E₄ ⦃ G₁ z, G₂ z ⦄)
          (E₂ ⦃ F₁ x, F₂ x ⦄)
        #⊗ identity (Q (G₂ z) (F₁ x)))) = ?t2

x: C₁
mon_lassociator I_{ V} (E₂ ⦃ F₁ x, F₂ x ⦄)
  (Q (G₂ z) (F₁ x))
· enriched_from_arr E₄ (τ₂ z)
  #⊗ identity ((E₂ ⦃ F₁ x, F₂ x ⦄) ⊗ Q (G₂ z) (F₁ x))
· mon_rassociator (E₄ ⦃ G₁ z, G₂ z ⦄)
    (E₂ ⦃ F₁ x, F₂ x ⦄) (Q (G₂ z) (F₁ x))
· sym_mon_braiding V (E₄ ⦃ G₁ z, G₂ z ⦄)
    (E₂ ⦃ F₁ x, F₂ x ⦄) #⊗ identity (Q (G₂ z) (F₁ x)) =
?t2

    
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
F₁, F₂: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF₁: functor_enrichment F₁ E₁ E₂
EF₂: functor_enrichment F₂ E₁ E₂
τ₁: F₁ ⟹ F₂
Hτ₁: nat_trans_enrichment τ₁ EF₁ EF₂
G₁, G₂: C₃ ⟶ C₄
EG₁: functor_enrichment G₁ E₃ E₄
EG₂: functor_enrichment G₂ E₃ E₄
τ₂: G₁ ⟹ G₂
Hτ₂: nat_trans_enrichment τ₂ EG₁ EG₂
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₃
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₄
θ: enriched_profunctor_square EF₁ EG₂ P Q
z: C₃
x: C₁
mon_lassociator I_{ V} (E₂ ⦃ F₁ x, F₂ x ⦄)
  (Q (G₂ z) (F₁ x))
· enriched_from_arr E₄ (τ₂ z)
  #⊗ (identity (E₂ ⦃ F₁ x, F₂ x ⦄)
      #⊗ identity (Q (G₂ z) (F₁ x)))
· mon_rassociator (E₄ ⦃ G₁ z, G₂ z ⦄)
    (E₂ ⦃ F₁ x, F₂ x ⦄) (Q (G₂ z) (F₁ x))
· sym_mon_braiding V (E₄ ⦃ G₁ z, G₂ z ⦄)
    (E₂ ⦃ F₁ x, F₂ x ⦄) #⊗ identity (Q (G₂ z) (F₁ x)) =
?t2

θ: enriched_profunctor_square EF₁ EG₂ P Q
z: C₃
x: C₁
(enriched_from_arr E₄ (τ₂ z)
 #⊗ identity (E₂ ⦃ F₁ x, F₂ x ⦄))
#⊗ identity (Q (G₂ z) (F₁ x))
· mon_lassociator (E₄ ⦃ G₁ z, G₂ z ⦄)
    (E₂ ⦃ F₁ x, F₂ x ⦄) (Q (G₂ z) (F₁ x))
· mon_rassociator (E₄ ⦃ G₁ z, G₂ z ⦄)
    (E₂ ⦃ F₁ x, F₂ x ⦄) (Q (G₂ z) (F₁ x))
· sym_mon_braiding V (E₄ ⦃ G₁ z, G₂ z ⦄)
    (E₂ ⦃ F₁ x, F₂ x ⦄) #⊗ identity (Q (G₂ z) (F₁ x)) =

θ: enriched_profunctor_square EF₁ EG₂ P Q
z: C₃
x: C₁
(enriched_from_arr E₄ (τ₂ z)
 #⊗ identity (E₂ ⦃ F₁ x, F₂ x ⦄))
#⊗ identity (Q (G₂ z) (F₁ x))
· (mon_lassociator (E₄ ⦃ G₁ z, G₂ z ⦄)
     (E₂ ⦃ F₁ x, F₂ x ⦄) (Q (G₂ z) (F₁ x))
   · (mon_rassociator (E₄ ⦃ G₁ z, G₂ z ⦄)
        (E₂ ⦃ F₁ x, F₂ x ⦄) (Q (G₂ z) (F₁ x))
      · sym_mon_braiding V (E₄ ⦃ G₁ z, G₂ z ⦄)
          (E₂ ⦃ F₁ x, F₂ x ⦄)
        #⊗ identity (Q (G₂ z) (F₁ x)))) = ?t2

    
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
F₁, F₂: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF₁: functor_enrichment F₁ E₁ E₂
EF₂: functor_enrichment F₂ E₁ E₂
τ₁: F₁ ⟹ F₂

  (E₂ ⦃ F₁ x, F₂ x ⦄) (Q (G₂ z) (F₁ x))
· (mon_rassociator (E₄ ⦃ G₁ z, G₂ z ⦄)
     (E₂ ⦃ F₁ x, F₂ x ⦄) (Q (G₂ z) (F₁ x))
   · sym_mon_braiding V (E₄ ⦃ G₁ z, G₂ z ⦄)
       (E₂ ⦃ F₁ x, F₂ x ⦄)
     #⊗ identity (Q (G₂ z) (F₁ x))) = ?t2

    
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
F₁, F₂: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF₁: functor_enrichment F₁ E₁ E₂
EF₂: functor_enrichment F₂ E₁ E₂
τ₁: F₁ ⟹ F₂
Hτ₁: nat_trans_enrichment τ₁ EF₁ EF₂
G₁, G₂: C₃ ⟶ C₄
EG₁: functor_enrichment G₁ E₃ E₄
EG₂: functor_enrichment G₂ E₃ E₄
τ₂: G₁ ⟹ G₂
Hτ₂: nat_trans_enrichment τ₂ EG₁ EG₂
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₃
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₄
θ: enriched_profunctor_square EF₁ EG₂ P Q
z: C₃
x: C₁
mon_lassociator (E₄ ⦃ G₁ z, G₂ z ⦄)
  (E₂ ⦃ F₁ x, F₂ x ⦄) (Q (G₂ z) (F₁ x))
· mon_rassociator (E₄ ⦃ G₁ z, G₂ z ⦄)
    (E₂ ⦃ F₁ x, F₂ x ⦄) (Q (G₂ z) (F₁ x))
· sym_mon_braiding V (E₄ ⦃ G₁ z, G₂ z ⦄)
    (E₂ ⦃ F₁ x, F₂ x ⦄) #⊗ identity (Q (G₂ z) (F₁ x)) =

V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
F₁, F₂: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF₁: functor_enrichment F₁ E₁ E₂
EF₂: functor_enrichment F₂ E₁ E₂
τ₁: F₁ ⟹ F₂
Hτ₁: nat_trans_enrichment τ₁ EF₁ EF₂
G₁, G₂: C₃ ⟶ C₄
EG₁: functor_enrichment G₁ E₃ E₄
EG₂: functor_enrichment G₂ E₃ E₄
τ₂: G₁ ⟹ G₂
Hτ₂: nat_trans_enrichment τ₂ EG₁ EG₂
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₃
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₄
θ: enriched_profunctor_square EF₁ EG₂ P Q
z: C₃
x: C₁
identity
  ((E₄ ⦃ G₁ z, G₂ z ⦄) ⊗ (E₂ ⦃ F₁ x, F₂ x ⦄)
   ⊗ Q (G₂ z) (F₁ x))
· sym_mon_braiding V (E₄ ⦃ G₁ z, G₂ z ⦄)
    (E₂ ⦃ F₁ x, F₂ x ⦄) #⊗ identity (Q (G₂ z) (F₁ x)) =
?t2

    apply id_left.
  
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
F₁, F₂: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF₁: functor_enrichment F₁ E₁ E₂
EF₂: functor_enrichment F₂ E₁ E₂
τ₁: F₁ ⟹ F₂
Hτ₁: nat_trans_enrichment τ₁ EF₁ EF₂
G₁, G₂: C₃ ⟶ C₄
EG₁: functor_enrichment G₁ E₃ E₄
EG₂: functor_enrichment G₂ E₃ E₄
τ₂: G₁ ⟹ G₂
Hτ₂: nat_trans_enrichment τ₂ EG₁ EG₂
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₃
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₄
θ: enriched_profunctor_square EF₁ EG₂ P Q
z: C₃
x: C₁
enriched_from_arr E₂ (τ₁ x)
#⊗ identity (Q (G₂ z) (F₁ x))
· (mon_linvunitor (E₂ ⦃ F₁ x, F₂ x ⦄)
   #⊗ identity (Q (G₂ z) (F₁ x))
   · ((enriched_from_arr E₄ (τ₂ z)
       #⊗ identity (E₂ ⦃ F₁ x, F₂ x ⦄))
      #⊗ identity (Q (G₂ z) (F₁ x))
      · sym_mon_braiding V (E₄ ⦃ G₁ z, G₂ z ⦄)
          (E₂ ⦃ F₁ x, F₂ x ⦄)
        #⊗ identity (Q (G₂ z) (F₁ x)))) =
enriched_from_arr E₄ (τ₂ z)
#⊗ identity (Q (G₂ z) (F₁ x))
· mon_linvunitor (E₄ ⦃ G₁ z, G₂ z ⦄)
  #⊗ identity (Q (G₂ z) (F₁ x))
· (enriched_from_arr E₂ (τ₁ x)
   #⊗ identity (E₄ ⦃ G₁ z, G₂ z ⦄))
  #⊗ identity (Q (G₂ z) (F₁ x))

  
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
F₁, F₂: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF₁: functor_enrichment F₁ E₁ E₂
EF₂: functor_enrichment F₂ E₁ E₂
τ₁: F₁ ⟹ F₂
Hτ₁: nat_trans_enrichment τ₁ EF₁ EF₂
G₁, G₂: C₃ ⟶ C₄
EG₁: functor_enrichment G₁ E₃ E₄
EG₂: functor_enrichment G₂ E₃ E₄
τ₂: G₁ ⟹ G₂
Hτ₂: nat_trans_enrichment τ₂ EG₁ EG₂
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₃
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₄
θ: enriched_profunctor_square EF₁ EG₂ P Q
z: C₃
x: C₁
(enriched_from_arr E₂ (τ₁ x)
 · (mon_linvunitor (E₂ ⦃ F₁ x, F₂ x ⦄)
    · (enriched_from_arr E₄ (τ₂ z)
       #⊗ identity (E₂ ⦃ F₁ x, F₂ x ⦄)
       · sym_mon_braiding V (E₄ ⦃ G₁ z, G₂ z ⦄)
           (E₂ ⦃ F₁ x, F₂ x ⦄))))
#⊗ identity (Q (G₂ z) (F₁ x)) =
(enriched_from_arr E₄ (τ₂ z)
 · mon_linvunitor (E₄ ⦃ G₁ z, G₂ z ⦄)
 · enriched_from_arr E₂ (τ₁ x)
   #⊗ identity (E₄ ⦃ G₁ z, G₂ z ⦄))
#⊗ identity (Q (G₂ z) (F₁ x))

  
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
F₁, F₂: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF₁: functor_enrichment F₁ E₁ E₂
EF₂: functor_enrichment F₂ E₁ E₂
τ₁: F₁ ⟹ F₂
Hτ₁: nat_trans_enrichment τ₁ EF₁ EF₂
G₁, G₂: C₃ ⟶ C₄
EG₁: functor_enrichment G₁ E₃ E₄
EG₂: functor_enrichment G₂ E₃ E₄
τ₂: G₁ ⟹ G₂
Hτ₂: nat_trans_enrichment τ₂ EG₁ EG₂
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₃
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₄
θ: enriched_profunctor_square EF₁ EG₂ P Q
z: C₃
x: C₁
enriched_from_arr E₂ (τ₁ x)
· (mon_linvunitor (E₂ ⦃ F₁ x, F₂ x ⦄)
   · (enriched_from_arr E₄ (τ₂ z)
      #⊗ identity (E₂ ⦃ F₁ x, F₂ x ⦄)
      · sym_mon_braiding V (E₄ ⦃ G₁ z, G₂ z ⦄)
          (E₂ ⦃ F₁ x, F₂ x ⦄))) =
enriched_from_arr E₄ (τ₂ z)
· mon_linvunitor (E₄ ⦃ G₁ z, G₂ z ⦄)
· enriched_from_arr E₂ (τ₁ x)
  #⊗ identity (E₄ ⦃ G₁ z, G₂ z ⦄)

  
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
F₁, F₂: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF₁: functor_enrichment F₁ E₁ E₂
EF₂: functor_enrichment F₂ E₁ E₂
τ₁: F₁ ⟹ F₂
Hτ₁: nat_trans_enrichment τ₁ EF₁ EF₂
G₁, G₂: C₃ ⟶ C₄
EG₁: functor_enrichment G₁ E₃ E₄
EG₂: functor_enrichment G₂ E₃ E₄
τ₂: G₁ ⟹ G₂
Hτ₂: nat_trans_enrichment τ₂ EG₁ EG₂
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₃
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₄
θ: enriched_profunctor_square EF₁ EG₂ P Q
z: C₃
x: C₁
enriched_from_arr E₂ (τ₁ x)
· (mon_linvunitor (E₂ ⦃ F₁ x, F₂ x ⦄)
   · (enriched_from_arr E₄ (τ₂ z)
      #⊗ identity (E₂ ⦃ F₁ x, F₂ x ⦄)
      · sym_mon_braiding V (E₄ ⦃ G₁ z, G₂ z ⦄)
          (E₂ ⦃ F₁ x, F₂ x ⦄))) =
mon_linvunitor I_{ V}
· identity I_{ V} #⊗ enriched_from_arr E₄ (τ₂ z)
· enriched_from_arr E₂ (τ₁ x)
  #⊗ identity (E₄ ⦃ G₁ z, G₂ z ⦄)

θ: enriched_profunctor_square EF₁ EG₂ P Q
z: C₃
x: C₁
enriched_from_arr E₂ (τ₁ x)
· (mon_linvunitor (E₂ ⦃ F₁ x, F₂ x ⦄)
   · (enriched_from_arr E₄ (τ₂ z)
      #⊗ identity (E₂ ⦃ F₁ x, F₂ x ⦄)
      · sym_mon_braiding V (E₄ ⦃ G₁ z, G₂ z ⦄)
          (E₂ ⦃ F₁ x, F₂ x ⦄))) =
mon_linvunitor I_{ V}
· (identity I_{ V} #⊗ enriched_from_arr E₄ (τ₂ z)
   · enriched_from_arr E₂ (τ₁ x)
     #⊗ identity (E₄ ⦃ G₁ z, G₂ z ⦄))

      · sym_mon_braiding V (E₄ ⦃ G₁ z, G₂ z ⦄)

· enriched_from_arr E₂ (τ₁ x)

z: C₃
x: C₁
enriched_from_arr E₂ (τ₁ x)
· (mon_linvunitor (E₂ ⦃ F₁ x, F₂ x ⦄)
   · (enriched_from_arr E₄ (τ₂ z)
      #⊗ identity (E₂ ⦃ F₁ x, F₂ x ⦄)
      · sym_mon_braiding V (E₄ ⦃ G₁ z, G₂ z ⦄)
          (E₂ ⦃ F₁ x, F₂ x ⦄))) = ?b
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
F₁, F₂: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF₁: functor_enrichment F₁ E₁ E₂
EF₂: functor_enrichment F₂ E₁ E₂
τ₁: F₁ ⟹ F₂
Hτ₁: nat_trans_enrichment τ₁ EF₁ EF₂
G₁, G₂: C₃ ⟶ C₄
EG₁: functor_enrichment G₁ E₃ E₄
EG₂: functor_enrichment G₂ E₃ E₄
τ₂: G₁ ⟹ G₂
Hτ₂: nat_trans_enrichment τ₂ EG₁ EG₂
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₃
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₄
θ: enriched_profunctor_square EF₁ EG₂ P Q
z: C₃
x: C₁
?b =
mon_linvunitor I_{ V}
· enriched_from_arr E₂ (τ₁ x)
  #⊗ enriched_from_arr E₄ (τ₂ z)

  
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V

F₁, F₂: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF₁: functor_enrichment F₁ E₁ E₂
EF₂: functor_enrichment F₂ E₁ E₂
τ₁: F₁ ⟹ F₂
Hτ₁: nat_trans_enrichment τ₁ EF₁ EF₂
G₁, G₂: C₃ ⟶ C₄
EG₁: functor_enrichment G₁ E₃ E₄
EG₂: functor_enrichment G₂ E₃ E₄
τ₂: G₁ ⟹ G₂
Hτ₂: nat_trans_enrichment τ₂ EG₁ EG₂
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₃
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₄
θ: enriched_profunctor_square EF₁ EG₂ P Q
z: C₃
x: C₁
enriched_from_arr E₂ (τ₁ x)
· (mon_linvunitor (E₂ ⦃ F₁ x, F₂ x ⦄)
   · (enriched_from_arr E₄ (τ₂ z)
      #⊗ identity (E₂ ⦃ F₁ x, F₂ x ⦄)
      · sym_mon_braiding V (E₄ ⦃ G₁ z, G₂ z ⦄)
          (E₂ ⦃ F₁ x, F₂ x ⦄))) = ?b

    
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
F₁, F₂: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF₁: functor_enrichment F₁ E₁ E₂
EF₂: functor_enrichment F₂ E₁ E₂
τ₁: F₁ ⟹ F₂
Hτ₁: nat_trans_enrichment τ₁ EF₁ EF₂
G₁, G₂: C₃ ⟶ C₄
EG₁: functor_enrichment G₁ E₃ E₄
EG₂: functor_enrichment G₂ E₃ E₄
τ₂: G₁ ⟹ G₂
Hτ₂: nat_trans_enrichment τ₂ EG₁ EG₂
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₃
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₄
θ: enriched_profunctor_square EF₁ EG₂ P Q
z: C₃
x: C₁
enriched_from_arr E₂ (τ₁ x)
· (mon_linvunitor (E₂ ⦃ F₁ x, F₂ x ⦄)
   · (sym_mon_braiding V I_{ V} (E₂ ⦃ F₁ x, F₂ x ⦄)
      · identity (E₂ ⦃ F₁ x, F₂ x ⦄)
        #⊗ enriched_from_arr E₄ (τ₂ z))) = ?b

mon_linvunitor (E₂ ⦃ F₁ x, F₂ x ⦄)
· (sym_mon_braiding V I_{ V} (E₂ ⦃ F₁ x, F₂ x ⦄)
   · identity (E₂ ⦃ F₁ x, F₂ x ⦄)
     #⊗ enriched_from_arr E₄ (τ₂ z)) = ?t2

· sym_mon_braiding V I_{ V} (E₂ ⦃ F₁ x, F₂ x ⦄)
· identity (E₂ ⦃ F₁ x, F₂ x ⦄)
  #⊗ enriched_from_arr E₄ (τ₂ z) = ?t2

· identity (E₂ ⦃ F₁ x, F₂ x ⦄)
  #⊗ enriched_from_arr E₄ (τ₂ z) = ?t2

    apply idpath.
