V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
F₁, F₂: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF₁: functor_enrichment F₁ E₁ E₂
EF₂: functor_enrichment F₂ E₁ E₂
τ₁: F₁ ⟹ F₂
Hτ₁: nat_trans_enrichment τ₁ EF₁ EF₂
G₁, G₂: C₃ ⟶ C₄
EG₁: functor_enrichment G₁ E₃ E₄
EG₂: functor_enrichment G₂ E₃ E₄
τ₂: G₁ ⟹ G₂
Hτ₂: nat_trans_enrichment τ₂ EG₁ EG₂
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₃
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₄
θ: enriched_profunctor_square EF₁ EG₂ P Q
z: C₃
x: C₁
mon_linvunitor I_{ V}
· enriched_from_arr E₂ (τ₁ x)
  #⊗ enriched_from_arr E₄ (τ₂ z) =
mon_linvunitor I_{ V}
· enriched_from_arr E₂ (τ₁ x)
  #⊗ enriched_from_arr E₄ (τ₂ z)

  apply idpath.
Qed.


V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
F₁, F₂: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF₁: functor_enrichment F₁ E₁ E₂
EF₂: functor_enrichment F₂ E₁ E₂
τ₁: F₁ ⟹ F₂
Hτ₁: nat_trans_enrichment τ₁ EF₁ EF₂
G: C₃ ⟶ C₄
EG: functor_enrichment G E₃ E₄
P₁, P₂: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₃
τ₂: enriched_profunctor_transformation P₁ P₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₄
θ: enriched_profunctor_square EF₁ EG P₂ Q
lwhisker_enriched_profunctor_square τ₂
  (uwhisker_enriched_profunctor_square Hτ₁ θ) =
uwhisker_enriched_profunctor_square Hτ₁
  (lwhisker_enriched_profunctor_square τ₂ θ)


V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
F₁, F₂: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF₁: functor_enrichment F₁ E₁ E₂
EF₂: functor_enrichment F₂ E₁ E₂
τ₁: F₁ ⟹ F₂
Hτ₁: nat_trans_enrichment τ₁ EF₁ EF₂
G: C₃ ⟶ C₄
EG: functor_enrichment G E₃ E₄
P₁, P₂: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₃
τ₂: enriched_profunctor_transformation P₁ P₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₄
θ: enriched_profunctor_square EF₁ EG P₂ Q
lwhisker_enriched_profunctor_square τ₂
  (uwhisker_enriched_profunctor_square Hτ₁ θ) =
uwhisker_enriched_profunctor_square Hτ₁
  (lwhisker_enriched_profunctor_square τ₂ θ)

  
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
F₁, F₂: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF₁: functor_enrichment F₁ E₁ E₂
EF₂: functor_enrichment F₂ E₁ E₂
τ₁: F₁ ⟹ F₂
Hτ₁: nat_trans_enrichment τ₁ EF₁ EF₂
G: C₃ ⟶ C₄
EG: functor_enrichment G E₃ E₄
P₁, P₂: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₃
τ₂: enriched_profunctor_transformation P₁ P₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₄
θ: enriched_profunctor_square EF₁ EG P₂ Q
z: C₃
x: C₁
τ₂ z x
· (θ z x · mon_linvunitor (Q (G z) (F₁ x))
   · enriched_from_arr E₂ (τ₁ x)
     #⊗ identity (Q (G z) (F₁ x))
   · rmap_e Q (G z) (F₁ x) (F₂ x)) =
τ₂ z x · θ z x · mon_linvunitor (Q (G z) (F₁ x))
· enriched_from_arr E₂ (τ₁ x)
  #⊗ identity (Q (G z) (F₁ x))
· rmap_e Q (G z) (F₁ x) (F₂ x)

  
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
F₁, F₂: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF₁: functor_enrichment F₁ E₁ E₂
EF₂: functor_enrichment F₂ E₁ E₂
τ₁: F₁ ⟹ F₂
Hτ₁: nat_trans_enrichment τ₁ EF₁ EF₂
G: C₃ ⟶ C₄
EG: functor_enrichment G E₃ E₄
P₁, P₂: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₃
τ₂: enriched_profunctor_transformation P₁ P₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₄
θ: enriched_profunctor_square EF₁ EG P₂ Q
z: C₃
x: C₁
τ₂ z x
· (θ z x
   · (mon_linvunitor (Q (G z) (F₁ x))
      · (enriched_from_arr E₂ (τ₁ x)
         #⊗ identity (Q (G z) (F₁ x))
         · rmap_e Q (G z) (F₁ x) (F₂ x)))) =
τ₂ z x
· (θ z x
   · (mon_linvunitor (Q (G z) (F₁ x))
      · (enriched_from_arr E₂ (τ₁ x)
         #⊗ identity (Q (G z) (F₁ x))
         · rmap_e Q (G z) (F₁ x) (F₂ x))))

  apply idpath.
Qed.


V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
F₁, F₂: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF₁: functor_enrichment F₁ E₁ E₂
EF₂: functor_enrichment F₂ E₁ E₂
τ₁: F₁ ⟹ F₂
Hτ₁: nat_trans_enrichment τ₁ EF₁ EF₂
G: C₃ ⟶ C₄
EG: functor_enrichment G E₃ E₄
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₃
Q₁, Q₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₄
τ₂: enriched_profunctor_transformation Q₁ Q₂
θ: enriched_profunctor_square EF₁ EG P Q₁
rwhisker_enriched_profunctor_square τ₂
  (uwhisker_enriched_profunctor_square Hτ₁ θ) =
uwhisker_enriched_profunctor_square Hτ₁
  (rwhisker_enriched_profunctor_square τ₂ θ)


V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
F₁, F₂: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF₁: functor_enrichment F₁ E₁ E₂
EF₂: functor_enrichment F₂ E₁ E₂
τ₁: F₁ ⟹ F₂
Hτ₁: nat_trans_enrichment τ₁ EF₁ EF₂
G: C₃ ⟶ C₄
EG: functor_enrichment G E₃ E₄
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₃
Q₁, Q₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₄
τ₂: enriched_profunctor_transformation Q₁ Q₂
θ: enriched_profunctor_square EF₁ EG P Q₁
rwhisker_enriched_profunctor_square τ₂
  (uwhisker_enriched_profunctor_square Hτ₁ θ) =
uwhisker_enriched_profunctor_square Hτ₁
  (rwhisker_enriched_profunctor_square τ₂ θ)

  
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
F₁, F₂: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF₁: functor_enrichment F₁ E₁ E₂
EF₂: functor_enrichment F₂ E₁ E₂
τ₁: F₁ ⟹ F₂
Hτ₁: nat_trans_enrichment τ₁ EF₁ EF₂
G: C₃ ⟶ C₄
EG: functor_enrichment G E₃ E₄
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₃
Q₁, Q₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₄
τ₂: enriched_profunctor_transformation Q₁ Q₂
θ: enriched_profunctor_square EF₁ EG P Q₁
z: C₃
x: C₁
θ z x · mon_linvunitor (Q₁ (G z) (F₁ x))
· enriched_from_arr E₂ (τ₁ x)
  #⊗ identity (Q₁ (G z) (F₁ x))
· rmap_e Q₁ (G z) (F₁ x) (F₂ x) · τ₂ (G z) (F₂ x) =
θ z x · τ₂ (G z) (F₁ x)
· mon_linvunitor (Q₂ (G z) (F₁ x))
· enriched_from_arr E₂ (τ₁ x)
  #⊗ identity (Q₂ (G z) (F₁ x))
· rmap_e Q₂ (G z) (F₁ x) (F₂ x)

  
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
F₁, F₂: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF₁: functor_enrichment F₁ E₁ E₂
EF₂: functor_enrichment F₂ E₁ E₂
τ₁: F₁ ⟹ F₂
Hτ₁: nat_trans_enrichment τ₁ EF₁ EF₂
G: C₃ ⟶ C₄
EG: functor_enrichment G E₃ E₄
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₃
Q₁, Q₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₄
τ₂: enriched_profunctor_transformation Q₁ Q₂
θ: enriched_profunctor_square EF₁ EG P Q₁
z: C₃
x: C₁
θ z x
· (mon_linvunitor (Q₁ (G z) (F₁ x))
   · (enriched_from_arr E₂ (τ₁ x)
      #⊗ identity (Q₁ (G z) (F₁ x))
      · (rmap_e Q₁ (G z) (F₁ x) (F₂ x)
         · τ₂ (G z) (F₂ x)))) =
θ z x
· (τ₂ (G z) (F₁ x)
   · (mon_linvunitor (Q₂ (G z) (F₁ x))
      · (enriched_from_arr E₂ (τ₁ x)
         #⊗ identity (Q₂ (G z) (F₁ x))
         · rmap_e Q₂ (G z) (F₁ x) (F₂ x))))

  
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
F₁, F₂: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF₁: functor_enrichment F₁ E₁ E₂
EF₂: functor_enrichment F₂ E₁ E₂
τ₁: F₁ ⟹ F₂
Hτ₁: nat_trans_enrichment τ₁ EF₁ EF₂
G: C₃ ⟶ C₄
EG: functor_enrichment G E₃ E₄
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₃
Q₁, Q₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₄
τ₂: enriched_profunctor_transformation Q₁ Q₂
θ: enriched_profunctor_square EF₁ EG P Q₁
z: C₃
x: C₁
mon_linvunitor (Q₁ (G z) (F₁ x))
· (enriched_from_arr E₂ (τ₁ x)
   #⊗ identity (Q₁ (G z) (F₁ x))
   · (rmap_e Q₁ (G z) (F₁ x) (F₂ x) · τ₂ (G z) (F₂ x))) =
τ₂ (G z) (F₁ x)
· (mon_linvunitor (Q₂ (G z) (F₁ x))
   · (enriched_from_arr E₂ (τ₁ x)
      #⊗ identity (Q₂ (G z) (F₁ x))
      · rmap_e Q₂ (G z) (F₁ x) (F₂ x)))

  
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
F₁, F₂: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF₁: functor_enrichment F₁ E₁ E₂
EF₂: functor_enrichment F₂ E₁ E₂
τ₁: F₁ ⟹ F₂
Hτ₁: nat_trans_enrichment τ₁ EF₁ EF₂
G: C₃ ⟶ C₄
EG: functor_enrichment G E₃ E₄
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₃
Q₁, Q₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₄
τ₂: enriched_profunctor_transformation Q₁ Q₂
θ: enriched_profunctor_square EF₁ EG P Q₁
z: C₃
x: C₁
mon_linvunitor (Q₁ (G z) (F₁ x))
· (enriched_from_arr E₂ (τ₁ x)
   #⊗ identity (Q₁ (G z) (F₁ x))
   · (identity (E₂ ⦃ F₁ x, F₂ x ⦄) #⊗ τ₂ (G z) (F₁ x)
      · rmap_e Q₂ (G z) (F₁ x) (F₂ x))) =
τ₂ (G z) (F₁ x)
· (mon_linvunitor (Q₂ (G z) (F₁ x))
   · (enriched_from_arr E₂ (τ₁ x)
      #⊗ identity (Q₂ (G z) (F₁ x))
      · rmap_e Q₂ (G z) (F₁ x) (F₂ x)))

  
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
F₁, F₂: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF₁: functor_enrichment F₁ E₁ E₂
EF₂: functor_enrichment F₂ E₁ E₂
τ₁: F₁ ⟹ F₂
Hτ₁: nat_trans_enrichment τ₁ EF₁ EF₂
G: C₃ ⟶ C₄
EG: functor_enrichment G E₃ E₄
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₃
Q₁, Q₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₄
τ₂: enriched_profunctor_transformation Q₁ Q₂
θ: enriched_profunctor_square EF₁ EG P Q₁
z: C₃
x: C₁
mon_linvunitor (Q₁ (G z) (F₁ x))
· enriched_from_arr E₂ (τ₁ x)
  #⊗ identity (Q₁ (G z) (F₁ x))
· identity (E₂ ⦃ F₁ x, F₂ x ⦄) #⊗ τ₂ (G z) (F₁ x)
· rmap_e Q₂ (G z) (F₁ x) (F₂ x) =
τ₂ (G z) (F₁ x) · mon_linvunitor (Q₂ (G z) (F₁ x))
· enriched_from_arr E₂ (τ₁ x)
  #⊗ identity (Q₂ (G z) (F₁ x))
· rmap_e Q₂ (G z) (F₁ x) (F₂ x)

  
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
F₁, F₂: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF₁: functor_enrichment F₁ E₁ E₂
EF₂: functor_enrichment F₂ E₁ E₂
τ₁: F₁ ⟹ F₂
Hτ₁: nat_trans_enrichment τ₁ EF₁ EF₂
G: C₃ ⟶ C₄
EG: functor_enrichment G E₃ E₄
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₃
Q₁, Q₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₄
τ₂: enriched_profunctor_transformation Q₁ Q₂
θ: enriched_profunctor_square EF₁ EG P Q₁
z: C₃
x: C₁
mon_linvunitor (Q₁ (G z) (F₁ x))
· enriched_from_arr E₂ (τ₁ x)
  #⊗ identity (Q₁ (G z) (F₁ x))
· identity (E₂ ⦃ F₁ x, F₂ x ⦄) #⊗ τ₂ (G z) (F₁ x) =
τ₂ (G z) (F₁ x) · mon_linvunitor (Q₂ (G z) (F₁ x))
· enriched_from_arr E₂ (τ₁ x)
  #⊗ identity (Q₂ (G z) (F₁ x))

  
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
F₁, F₂: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF₁: functor_enrichment F₁ E₁ E₂
EF₂: functor_enrichment F₂ E₁ E₂
τ₁: F₁ ⟹ F₂
Hτ₁: nat_trans_enrichment τ₁ EF₁ EF₂
G: C₃ ⟶ C₄
EG: functor_enrichment G E₃ E₄
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₃
Q₁, Q₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₄
τ₂: enriched_profunctor_transformation Q₁ Q₂
θ: enriched_profunctor_square EF₁ EG P Q₁
z: C₃
x: C₁
mon_linvunitor (Q₁ (G z) (F₁ x))
· enriched_from_arr E₂ (τ₁ x)
  #⊗ identity (Q₁ (G z) (F₁ x))
· identity (E₂ ⦃ F₁ x, F₂ x ⦄) #⊗ τ₂ (G z) (F₁ x) =
mon_linvunitor (Q₁ (G z) (F₁ x))
· identity I_{ V} #⊗ τ₂ (G z) (F₁ x)
· enriched_from_arr E₂ (τ₁ x)
  #⊗ identity (Q₂ (G z) (F₁ x))

  
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
F₁, F₂: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF₁: functor_enrichment F₁ E₁ E₂
EF₂: functor_enrichment F₂ E₁ E₂
τ₁: F₁ ⟹ F₂
Hτ₁: nat_trans_enrichment τ₁ EF₁ EF₂
G: C₃ ⟶ C₄
EG: functor_enrichment G E₃ E₄
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₃
Q₁, Q₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₄
τ₂: enriched_profunctor_transformation Q₁ Q₂
θ: enriched_profunctor_square EF₁ EG P Q₁
z: C₃
x: C₁
mon_linvunitor (Q₁ (G z) (F₁ x))
· (enriched_from_arr E₂ (τ₁ x)
   #⊗ identity (Q₁ (G z) (F₁ x))
   · identity (E₂ ⦃ F₁ x, F₂ x ⦄) #⊗ τ₂ (G z) (F₁ x)) =
mon_linvunitor (Q₁ (G z) (F₁ x))
· (identity I_{ V} #⊗ τ₂ (G z) (F₁ x)
   · enriched_from_arr E₂ (τ₁ x)
     #⊗ identity (Q₂ (G z) (F₁ x)))

  
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
F₁, F₂: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF₁: functor_enrichment F₁ E₁ E₂
EF₂: functor_enrichment F₂ E₁ E₂
τ₁: F₁ ⟹ F₂
Hτ₁: nat_trans_enrichment τ₁ EF₁ EF₂
G: C₃ ⟶ C₄
EG: functor_enrichment G E₃ E₄
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₃
Q₁, Q₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₄
τ₂: enriched_profunctor_transformation Q₁ Q₂
θ: enriched_profunctor_square EF₁ EG P Q₁
z: C₃
x: C₁
mon_linvunitor (Q₁ (G z) (F₁ x))
· (enriched_from_arr E₂ (τ₁ x)
   #⊗ identity (Q₁ (G z) (F₁ x))
   · identity (E₂ ⦃ F₁ x, F₂ x ⦄) #⊗ τ₂ (G z) (F₁ x)) =
mon_linvunitor (Q₁ (G z) (F₁ x))
· enriched_from_arr E₂ (τ₁ x) #⊗ τ₂ (G z) (F₁ x)

  
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
F₁, F₂: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF₁: functor_enrichment F₁ E₁ E₂
EF₂: functor_enrichment F₂ E₁ E₂
τ₁: F₁ ⟹ F₂
Hτ₁: nat_trans_enrichment τ₁ EF₁ EF₂
G: C₃ ⟶ C₄
EG: functor_enrichment G E₃ E₄
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₃
Q₁, Q₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₄
τ₂: enriched_profunctor_transformation Q₁ Q₂
θ: enriched_profunctor_square EF₁ EG P Q₁
z: C₃
x: C₁
mon_linvunitor (Q₁ (G z) (F₁ x))
· enriched_from_arr E₂ (τ₁ x) #⊗ τ₂ (G z) (F₁ x) =
mon_linvunitor (Q₁ (G z) (F₁ x))
· enriched_from_arr E₂ (τ₁ x) #⊗ τ₂ (G z) (F₁ x)

  apply idpath.
Qed.


V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
G₁, G₂: C₃ ⟶ C₄
EG₁: functor_enrichment G₁ E₃ E₄
EG₂: functor_enrichment G₂ E₃ E₄
τ₁: G₁ ⟹ G₂
Hτ₁: nat_trans_enrichment τ₁ EG₁ EG₂
P₁, P₂: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₃
τ₂: enriched_profunctor_transformation P₁ P₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₄
θ: enriched_profunctor_square EF EG₂ P₂ Q
lwhisker_enriched_profunctor_square τ₂
  (dwhisker_enriched_profunctor_square Hτ₁ θ) =
dwhisker_enriched_profunctor_square Hτ₁
  (lwhisker_enriched_profunctor_square τ₂ θ)


V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
G₁, G₂: C₃ ⟶ C₄
EG₁: functor_enrichment G₁ E₃ E₄
EG₂: functor_enrichment G₂ E₃ E₄
τ₁: G₁ ⟹ G₂
Hτ₁: nat_trans_enrichment τ₁ EG₁ EG₂
P₁, P₂: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₃
τ₂: enriched_profunctor_transformation P₁ P₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₄
θ: enriched_profunctor_square EF EG₂ P₂ Q
lwhisker_enriched_profunctor_square τ₂
  (dwhisker_enriched_profunctor_square Hτ₁ θ) =
dwhisker_enriched_profunctor_square Hτ₁
  (lwhisker_enriched_profunctor_square τ₂ θ)

  
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
G₁, G₂: C₃ ⟶ C₄
EG₁: functor_enrichment G₁ E₃ E₄
EG₂: functor_enrichment G₂ E₃ E₄
τ₁: G₁ ⟹ G₂
Hτ₁: nat_trans_enrichment τ₁ EG₁ EG₂
P₁, P₂: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₃
τ₂: enriched_profunctor_transformation P₁ P₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₄
θ: enriched_profunctor_square EF EG₂ P₂ Q
z: C₃
x: C₁
τ₂ z x
· (θ z x · mon_linvunitor (Q (G₂ z) (F x))
   · enriched_from_arr E₄ (τ₁ z)
     #⊗ identity (Q (G₂ z) (F x))
   · lmap_e Q (G₂ z) (G₁ z) (F x)) =
τ₂ z x · θ z x · mon_linvunitor (Q (G₂ z) (F x))
· enriched_from_arr E₄ (τ₁ z)
  #⊗ identity (Q (G₂ z) (F x))
· lmap_e Q (G₂ z) (G₁ z) (F x)

  
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
G₁, G₂: C₃ ⟶ C₄
EG₁: functor_enrichment G₁ E₃ E₄
EG₂: functor_enrichment G₂ E₃ E₄
τ₁: G₁ ⟹ G₂
Hτ₁: nat_trans_enrichment τ₁ EG₁ EG₂
P₁, P₂: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₃
τ₂: enriched_profunctor_transformation P₁ P₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₄
θ: enriched_profunctor_square EF EG₂ P₂ Q
z: C₃
x: C₁
τ₂ z x
· (θ z x
   · (mon_linvunitor (Q (G₂ z) (F x))
      · (enriched_from_arr E₄ (τ₁ z)
         #⊗ identity (Q (G₂ z) (F x))
         · lmap_e Q (G₂ z) (G₁ z) (F x)))) =
τ₂ z x
· (θ z x
   · (mon_linvunitor (Q (G₂ z) (F x))
      · (enriched_from_arr E₄ (τ₁ z)
         #⊗ identity (Q (G₂ z) (F x))
         · lmap_e Q (G₂ z) (G₁ z) (F x))))

  apply idpath.
Qed.


V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
G₁, G₂: C₃ ⟶ C₄
EG₁: functor_enrichment G₁ E₃ E₄
EG₂: functor_enrichment G₂ E₃ E₄
τ₁: G₁ ⟹ G₂
Hτ₁: nat_trans_enrichment τ₁ EG₁ EG₂
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₃
Q₁, Q₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₄
τ₂: enriched_profunctor_transformation Q₁ Q₂
θ: enriched_profunctor_square EF EG₂ P Q₁
rwhisker_enriched_profunctor_square τ₂
  (dwhisker_enriched_profunctor_square Hτ₁ θ) =
dwhisker_enriched_profunctor_square Hτ₁
  (rwhisker_enriched_profunctor_square τ₂ θ)


V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
G₁, G₂: C₃ ⟶ C₄
EG₁: functor_enrichment G₁ E₃ E₄
EG₂: functor_enrichment G₂ E₃ E₄
τ₁: G₁ ⟹ G₂
Hτ₁: nat_trans_enrichment τ₁ EG₁ EG₂
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₃
Q₁, Q₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₄
τ₂: enriched_profunctor_transformation Q₁ Q₂
θ: enriched_profunctor_square EF EG₂ P Q₁
rwhisker_enriched_profunctor_square τ₂
  (dwhisker_enriched_profunctor_square Hτ₁ θ) =
dwhisker_enriched_profunctor_square Hτ₁
  (rwhisker_enriched_profunctor_square τ₂ θ)

  
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
G₁, G₂: C₃ ⟶ C₄
EG₁: functor_enrichment G₁ E₃ E₄
EG₂: functor_enrichment G₂ E₃ E₄
τ₁: G₁ ⟹ G₂
Hτ₁: nat_trans_enrichment τ₁ EG₁ EG₂
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₃
Q₁, Q₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₄
τ₂: enriched_profunctor_transformation Q₁ Q₂
θ: enriched_profunctor_square EF EG₂ P Q₁
z: C₃
x: C₁
θ z x · mon_linvunitor (Q₁ (G₂ z) (F x))
· enriched_from_arr E₄ (τ₁ z)
  #⊗ identity (Q₁ (G₂ z) (F x))
· lmap_e Q₁ (G₂ z) (G₁ z) (F x) · τ₂ (G₁ z) (F x) =
θ z x · τ₂ (G₂ z) (F x)
· mon_linvunitor (Q₂ (G₂ z) (F x))
· enriched_from_arr E₄ (τ₁ z)
  #⊗ identity (Q₂ (G₂ z) (F x))
· lmap_e Q₂ (G₂ z) (G₁ z) (F x)

  
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
G₁, G₂: C₃ ⟶ C₄
EG₁: functor_enrichment G₁ E₃ E₄
EG₂: functor_enrichment G₂ E₃ E₄
τ₁: G₁ ⟹ G₂
Hτ₁: nat_trans_enrichment τ₁ EG₁ EG₂
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₃
Q₁, Q₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₄
τ₂: enriched_profunctor_transformation Q₁ Q₂
θ: enriched_profunctor_square EF EG₂ P Q₁
z: C₃
x: C₁
θ z x
· (mon_linvunitor (Q₁ (G₂ z) (F x))
   · (enriched_from_arr E₄ (τ₁ z)
      #⊗ identity (Q₁ (G₂ z) (F x))
      · (lmap_e Q₁ (G₂ z) (G₁ z) (F x)
         · τ₂ (G₁ z) (F x)))) =
θ z x
· (τ₂ (G₂ z) (F x)
   · (mon_linvunitor (Q₂ (G₂ z) (F x))
      · (enriched_from_arr E₄ (τ₁ z)
         #⊗ identity (Q₂ (G₂ z) (F x))
         · lmap_e Q₂ (G₂ z) (G₁ z) (F x))))

  
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
G₁, G₂: C₃ ⟶ C₄
EG₁: functor_enrichment G₁ E₃ E₄
EG₂: functor_enrichment G₂ E₃ E₄
τ₁: G₁ ⟹ G₂
Hτ₁: nat_trans_enrichment τ₁ EG₁ EG₂
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₃
Q₁, Q₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₄
τ₂: enriched_profunctor_transformation Q₁ Q₂
θ: enriched_profunctor_square EF EG₂ P Q₁
z: C₃
x: C₁
mon_linvunitor (Q₁ (G₂ z) (F x))
· (enriched_from_arr E₄ (τ₁ z)
   #⊗ identity (Q₁ (G₂ z) (F x))
   · (lmap_e Q₁ (G₂ z) (G₁ z) (F x) · τ₂ (G₁ z) (F x))) =
τ₂ (G₂ z) (F x)
· (mon_linvunitor (Q₂ (G₂ z) (F x))
   · (enriched_from_arr E₄ (τ₁ z)
      #⊗ identity (Q₂ (G₂ z) (F x))
      · lmap_e Q₂ (G₂ z) (G₁ z) (F x)))

  
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
G₁, G₂: C₃ ⟶ C₄
EG₁: functor_enrichment G₁ E₃ E₄
EG₂: functor_enrichment G₂ E₃ E₄
τ₁: G₁ ⟹ G₂
Hτ₁: nat_trans_enrichment τ₁ EG₁ EG₂
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₃
Q₁, Q₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₄
τ₂: enriched_profunctor_transformation Q₁ Q₂
θ: enriched_profunctor_square EF EG₂ P Q₁
z: C₃
x: C₁
mon_linvunitor (Q₁ (G₂ z) (F x))
· (enriched_from_arr E₄ (τ₁ z)
   #⊗ identity (Q₁ (G₂ z) (F x))
   · (identity (E₄ ⦃ G₁ z, G₂ z ⦄) #⊗ τ₂ (G₂ z) (F x)
      · lmap_e Q₂ (G₂ z) (G₁ z) (F x))) =
τ₂ (G₂ z) (F x)
· (mon_linvunitor (Q₂ (G₂ z) (F x))
   · (enriched_from_arr E₄ (τ₁ z)
      #⊗ identity (Q₂ (G₂ z) (F x))
      · lmap_e Q₂ (G₂ z) (G₁ z) (F x)))

  
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
G₁, G₂: C₃ ⟶ C₄
EG₁: functor_enrichment G₁ E₃ E₄
EG₂: functor_enrichment G₂ E₃ E₄
τ₁: G₁ ⟹ G₂
Hτ₁: nat_trans_enrichment τ₁ EG₁ EG₂
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₃
Q₁, Q₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₄
τ₂: enriched_profunctor_transformation Q₁ Q₂
θ: enriched_profunctor_square EF EG₂ P Q₁
z: C₃
x: C₁
mon_linvunitor (Q₁ (G₂ z) (F x))
· enriched_from_arr E₄ (τ₁ z)
  #⊗ identity (Q₁ (G₂ z) (F x))
· identity (E₄ ⦃ G₁ z, G₂ z ⦄) #⊗ τ₂ (G₂ z) (F x)
· lmap_e Q₂ (G₂ z) (G₁ z) (F x) =
τ₂ (G₂ z) (F x) · mon_linvunitor (Q₂ (G₂ z) (F x))
· enriched_from_arr E₄ (τ₁ z)
  #⊗ identity (Q₂ (G₂ z) (F x))
· lmap_e Q₂ (G₂ z) (G₁ z) (F x)

  
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
G₁, G₂: C₃ ⟶ C₄
EG₁: functor_enrichment G₁ E₃ E₄
EG₂: functor_enrichment G₂ E₃ E₄
τ₁: G₁ ⟹ G₂
Hτ₁: nat_trans_enrichment τ₁ EG₁ EG₂
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₃
Q₁, Q₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₄
τ₂: enriched_profunctor_transformation Q₁ Q₂
θ: enriched_profunctor_square EF EG₂ P Q₁
z: C₃
x: C₁
mon_linvunitor (Q₁ (G₂ z) (F x))
· enriched_from_arr E₄ (τ₁ z)
  #⊗ identity (Q₁ (G₂ z) (F x))
· identity (E₄ ⦃ G₁ z, G₂ z ⦄) #⊗ τ₂ (G₂ z) (F x) =
τ₂ (G₂ z) (F x) · mon_linvunitor (Q₂ (G₂ z) (F x))
· enriched_from_arr E₄ (τ₁ z)
  #⊗ identity (Q₂ (G₂ z) (F x))

  
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
G₁, G₂: C₃ ⟶ C₄
EG₁: functor_enrichment G₁ E₃ E₄
EG₂: functor_enrichment G₂ E₃ E₄
τ₁: G₁ ⟹ G₂
Hτ₁: nat_trans_enrichment τ₁ EG₁ EG₂
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₃
Q₁, Q₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₄
τ₂: enriched_profunctor_transformation Q₁ Q₂
θ: enriched_profunctor_square EF EG₂ P Q₁
z: C₃
x: C₁
mon_linvunitor (Q₁ (G₂ z) (F x))
· enriched_from_arr E₄ (τ₁ z)
  #⊗ identity (Q₁ (G₂ z) (F x))
· identity (E₄ ⦃ G₁ z, G₂ z ⦄) #⊗ τ₂ (G₂ z) (F x) =
mon_linvunitor (Q₁ (G₂ z) (F x))
· identity I_{ V} #⊗ τ₂ (G₂ z) (F x)
· enriched_from_arr E₄ (τ₁ z)
  #⊗ identity (Q₂ (G₂ z) (F x))

  
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
G₁, G₂: C₃ ⟶ C₄
EG₁: functor_enrichment G₁ E₃ E₄
EG₂: functor_enrichment G₂ E₃ E₄
τ₁: G₁ ⟹ G₂
Hτ₁: nat_trans_enrichment τ₁ EG₁ EG₂
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₃
Q₁, Q₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₄
τ₂: enriched_profunctor_transformation Q₁ Q₂
θ: enriched_profunctor_square EF EG₂ P Q₁
z: C₃
x: C₁
mon_linvunitor (Q₁ (G₂ z) (F x))
· (enriched_from_arr E₄ (τ₁ z)
   #⊗ identity (Q₁ (G₂ z) (F x))
   · identity (E₄ ⦃ G₁ z, G₂ z ⦄) #⊗ τ₂ (G₂ z) (F x)) =
mon_linvunitor (Q₁ (G₂ z) (F x))
· (identity I_{ V} #⊗ τ₂ (G₂ z) (F x)
   · enriched_from_arr E₄ (τ₁ z)
     #⊗ identity (Q₂ (G₂ z) (F x)))

  
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
G₁, G₂: C₃ ⟶ C₄
EG₁: functor_enrichment G₁ E₃ E₄
EG₂: functor_enrichment G₂ E₃ E₄
τ₁: G₁ ⟹ G₂
Hτ₁: nat_trans_enrichment τ₁ EG₁ EG₂
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₃
Q₁, Q₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₄
τ₂: enriched_profunctor_transformation Q₁ Q₂
θ: enriched_profunctor_square EF EG₂ P Q₁
z: C₃
x: C₁
mon_linvunitor (Q₁ (G₂ z) (F x))
· (enriched_from_arr E₄ (τ₁ z)
   #⊗ identity (Q₁ (G₂ z) (F x))
   · identity (E₄ ⦃ G₁ z, G₂ z ⦄) #⊗ τ₂ (G₂ z) (F x)) =
mon_linvunitor (Q₁ (G₂ z) (F x))
· enriched_from_arr E₄ (τ₁ z) #⊗ τ₂ (G₂ z) (F x)

  
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
G₁, G₂: C₃ ⟶ C₄
EG₁: functor_enrichment G₁ E₃ E₄
EG₂: functor_enrichment G₂ E₃ E₄
τ₁: G₁ ⟹ G₂
Hτ₁: nat_trans_enrichment τ₁ EG₁ EG₂
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₃
Q₁, Q₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₄
τ₂: enriched_profunctor_transformation Q₁ Q₂
θ: enriched_profunctor_square EF EG₂ P Q₁
z: C₃
x: C₁
mon_linvunitor (Q₁ (G₂ z) (F x))
· enriched_from_arr E₄ (τ₁ z) #⊗ τ₂ (G₂ z) (F x) =
mon_linvunitor (Q₁ (G₂ z) (F x))
· enriched_from_arr E₄ (τ₁ z) #⊗ τ₂ (G₂ z) (F x)

  apply idpath.
Qed.

(** * 5. Composition of squares and whiskering *)

V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄, C₅, C₆: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
E₅: enrichment C₅ V
E₆: enrichment C₆ V
F₁, F₂: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF₁: functor_enrichment F₁ E₁ E₂
EF₂: functor_enrichment F₂ E₁ E₂
τ: F₂ ⟹ F₁
Hτ: nat_trans_enrichment τ EF₂ EF₁
G: C₃ ⟶ C₄
EG: functor_enrichment G E₃ E₄
H: C₅ ⟶ C₆
EH: functor_enrichment H E₅ E₆
P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₃
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₅
Q₁: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₄
Q₂: enriched_profunctor E₄ E₆
θ₁: enriched_profunctor_square EF₂ EG P₁ Q₁
θ₂: enriched_profunctor_square EG EH P₂ Q₂
uwhisker_enriched_profunctor_square Hτ
  (comp_v_enriched_profunctor_square θ₁ θ₂) =
comp_v_enriched_profunctor_square
  (uwhisker_enriched_profunctor_square Hτ θ₁) θ₂


V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄, C₅, C₆: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
E₅: enrichment C₅ V
E₆: enrichment C₆ V
F₁, F₂: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF₁: functor_enrichment F₁ E₁ E₂
EF₂: functor_enrichment F₂ E₁ E₂
τ: F₂ ⟹ F₁
Hτ: nat_trans_enrichment τ EF₂ EF₁
G: C₃ ⟶ C₄
EG: functor_enrichment G E₃ E₄
H: C₅ ⟶ C₆
EH: functor_enrichment H E₅ E₆
P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₃
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₅
Q₁: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₄
Q₂: enriched_profunctor E₄ E₆
θ₁: enriched_profunctor_square EF₂ EG P₁ Q₁
θ₂: enriched_profunctor_square EG EH P₂ Q₂
uwhisker_enriched_profunctor_square Hτ
  (comp_v_enriched_profunctor_square θ₁ θ₂) =
comp_v_enriched_profunctor_square
  (uwhisker_enriched_profunctor_square Hτ θ₁) θ₂

  
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄, C₅, C₆: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
E₅: enrichment C₅ V
E₆: enrichment C₆ V
F₁, F₂: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF₁: functor_enrichment F₁ E₁ E₂
EF₂: functor_enrichment F₂ E₁ E₂
τ: F₂ ⟹ F₁
Hτ: nat_trans_enrichment τ EF₂ EF₁
G: C₃ ⟶ C₄
EG: functor_enrichment G E₃ E₄
H: C₅ ⟶ C₆
EH: functor_enrichment H E₅ E₆
P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₃
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₅
Q₁: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₄
Q₂: enriched_profunctor E₄ E₆
θ₁: enriched_profunctor_square EF₂ EG P₁ Q₁
θ₂: enriched_profunctor_square EG EH P₂ Q₂
z: C₅
v: C₁
comp_v_enriched_profunctor_square_mor θ₁ θ₂ z v
· mon_linvunitor
    (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob Q₁ Q₂ (H z) (F₂ v))
· enriched_from_arr E₂ (τ v)
  #⊗ identity
       (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob Q₁ Q₂ (H z) (F₂ v))
· (identity (E₂ ⦃ F₂ v, F₁ v ⦄)
   #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_rmap Q₁ Q₂ (H z) (F₂ v)
        (F₁ v)
   · sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ F₂ v, F₁ v ⦄)
       ((E₂ ⦃ F₂ v, F₁ v ⦄)
        ⊸ comp_enriched_profunctor_ob Q₁ Q₂ (H z)
            (F₁ v))
   · internal_eval (E₂ ⦃ F₂ v, F₁ v ⦄)
       (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob Q₁ Q₂ (H z) (F₁ v))) =
comp_v_enriched_profunctor_square_mor
  (uwhisker_enriched_profunctor_square Hτ θ₁) θ₂ z v

  
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄, C₅, C₆: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
E₅: enrichment C₅ V
E₆: enrichment C₆ V
F₁, F₂: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF₁: functor_enrichment F₁ E₁ E₂
EF₂: functor_enrichment F₂ E₁ E₂
τ: F₂ ⟹ F₁
Hτ: nat_trans_enrichment τ EF₂ EF₁
G: C₃ ⟶ C₄
EG: functor_enrichment G E₃ E₄
H: C₅ ⟶ C₆
EH: functor_enrichment H E₅ E₆
P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₃
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₅
Q₁: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₄
Q₂: enriched_profunctor E₄ E₆
θ₁: enriched_profunctor_square EF₂ EG P₁ Q₁
θ₂: enriched_profunctor_square EG EH P₂ Q₂
z: C₅
v: C₁
∏ y : C₃,
comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₁ P₂ z v y
· (comp_v_enriched_profunctor_square_mor θ₁ θ₂ z v
   · mon_linvunitor
       (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob Q₁ Q₂ (H z) (F₂ v))
   · enriched_from_arr E₂ (τ v)
     #⊗ identity
          (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob Q₁ Q₂ (H z)
             (F₂ v))
   · (identity (E₂ ⦃ F₂ v, F₁ v ⦄)
      #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_rmap Q₁ Q₂ (H z)
           (F₂ v) (F₁ v)
      · sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ F₂ v, F₁ v ⦄)
          ((E₂ ⦃ F₂ v, F₁ v ⦄)
           ⊸ comp_enriched_profunctor_ob Q₁ Q₂ (H z)
               (F₁ v))
      · internal_eval (E₂ ⦃ F₂ v, F₁ v ⦄)
          (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob Q₁ Q₂ (H z)
             (F₁ v)))) =
comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₁ P₂ z v y
· comp_v_enriched_profunctor_square_mor
    (uwhisker_enriched_profunctor_square Hτ θ₁) θ₂ z v

  
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄, C₅, C₆: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
E₅: enrichment C₅ V
E₆: enrichment C₆ V
F₁, F₂: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF₁: functor_enrichment F₁ E₁ E₂
EF₂: functor_enrichment F₂ E₁ E₂
τ: F₂ ⟹ F₁
Hτ: nat_trans_enrichment τ EF₂ EF₁
G: C₃ ⟶ C₄
EG: functor_enrichment G E₃ E₄
H: C₅ ⟶ C₆
EH: functor_enrichment H E₅ E₆
P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₃
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₅
Q₁: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₄
Q₂: enriched_profunctor E₄ E₆
θ₁: enriched_profunctor_square EF₂ EG P₁ Q₁
θ₂: enriched_profunctor_square EG EH P₂ Q₂
z: C₅
v: C₁
x: C₃
comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₁ P₂ z v x
· (comp_v_enriched_profunctor_square_mor θ₁ θ₂ z v
   · mon_linvunitor
       (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob Q₁ Q₂ (H z) (F₂ v))
   · enriched_from_arr E₂ (τ v)
     #⊗ identity
          (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob Q₁ Q₂ (H z)
             (F₂ v))
   · (identity (E₂ ⦃ F₂ v, F₁ v ⦄)
      #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_rmap Q₁ Q₂ (H z)
           (F₂ v) (F₁ v)
      · sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ F₂ v, F₁ v ⦄)
          ((E₂ ⦃ F₂ v, F₁ v ⦄)
           ⊸ comp_enriched_profunctor_ob Q₁ Q₂ (H z)
               (F₁ v))
      · internal_eval (E₂ ⦃ F₂ v, F₁ v ⦄)
          (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob Q₁ Q₂ (H z)
             (F₁ v)))) =
comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₁ P₂ z v x
· comp_v_enriched_profunctor_square_mor
    (uwhisker_enriched_profunctor_square Hτ θ₁) θ₂ z v

  
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄, C₅, C₆: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
E₅: enrichment C₅ V
E₆: enrichment C₆ V
F₁, F₂: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF₁: functor_enrichment F₁ E₁ E₂
EF₂: functor_enrichment F₂ E₁ E₂
τ: F₂ ⟹ F₁
Hτ: nat_trans_enrichment τ EF₂ EF₁
G: C₃ ⟶ C₄
EG: functor_enrichment G E₃ E₄
H: C₅ ⟶ C₆
EH: functor_enrichment H E₅ E₆
P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₃
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₅
Q₁: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₄
Q₂: enriched_profunctor E₄ E₆
θ₁: enriched_profunctor_square EF₂ EG P₁ Q₁
θ₂: enriched_profunctor_square EG EH P₂ Q₂
z: C₅
v: C₁
x: C₃
comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₁ P₂ z v x
· (comp_v_enriched_profunctor_square_mor θ₁ θ₂ z v
   · mon_linvunitor
       (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob Q₁ Q₂ (H z) (F₂ v))
   · enriched_from_arr E₂ (τ v)
     #⊗ identity
          (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob Q₁ Q₂ (H z)
             (F₂ v))
   · (identity (E₂ ⦃ F₂ v, F₁ v ⦄)
      #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_rmap Q₁ Q₂ (H z)
           (F₂ v) (F₁ v)
      · sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ F₂ v, F₁ v ⦄)
          ((E₂ ⦃ F₂ v, F₁ v ⦄)
           ⊸ comp_enriched_profunctor_ob Q₁ Q₂ (H z)
               (F₁ v))
      · internal_eval (E₂ ⦃ F₂ v, F₁ v ⦄)
          (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob Q₁ Q₂ (H z)
             (F₁ v)))) = ?b
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄, C₅, C₆: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
E₅: enrichment C₅ V
E₆: enrichment C₆ V
F₁, F₂: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF₁: functor_enrichment F₁ E₁ E₂
EF₂: functor_enrichment F₂ E₁ E₂
τ: F₂ ⟹ F₁
Hτ: nat_trans_enrichment τ EF₂ EF₁
G: C₃ ⟶ C₄
EG: functor_enrichment G E₃ E₄
H: C₅ ⟶ C₆
EH: functor_enrichment H E₅ E₆
P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₃
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₅
Q₁: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₄
Q₂: enriched_profunctor E₄ E₆
θ₁: enriched_profunctor_square EF₂ EG P₁ Q₁
θ₂: enriched_profunctor_square EG EH P₂ Q₂
z: C₅
v: C₁
x: C₃
?b =
comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₁ P₂ z v x
· comp_v_enriched_profunctor_square_mor
    (uwhisker_enriched_profunctor_square Hτ θ₁) θ₂ z v

  
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄, C₅, C₆: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
E₅: enrichment C₅ V
E₆: enrichment C₆ V
F₁, F₂: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF₁: functor_enrichment F₁ E₁ E₂
EF₂: functor_enrichment F₂ E₁ E₂
τ: F₂ ⟹ F₁
Hτ: nat_trans_enrichment τ EF₂ EF₁
G: C₃ ⟶ C₄
EG: functor_enrichment G E₃ E₄
H: C₅ ⟶ C₆
EH: functor_enrichment H E₅ E₆
P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₃
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₅
Q₁: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₄
Q₂: enriched_profunctor E₄ E₆
θ₁: enriched_profunctor_square EF₂ EG P₁ Q₁
θ₂: enriched_profunctor_square EG EH P₂ Q₂
z: C₅
v: C₁
x: C₃
comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₁ P₂ z v x
· (comp_v_enriched_profunctor_square_mor θ₁ θ₂ z v
   · mon_linvunitor
       (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob Q₁ Q₂ (H z) (F₂ v))
   · enriched_from_arr E₂ (τ v)
     #⊗ identity
          (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob Q₁ Q₂ (H z)
             (F₂ v))
   · (identity (E₂ ⦃ F₂ v, F₁ v ⦄)
      #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_rmap Q₁ Q₂ (H z)
           (F₂ v) (F₁ v)
      · sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ F₂ v, F₁ v ⦄)
          ((E₂ ⦃ F₂ v, F₁ v ⦄)
           ⊸ comp_enriched_profunctor_ob Q₁ Q₂ (H z)
               (F₁ v))
      · internal_eval (E₂ ⦃ F₂ v, F₁ v ⦄)
          (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob Q₁ Q₂ (H z)
             (F₁ v)))) = ?b

    
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄, C₅, C₆: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
E₅: enrichment C₅ V
E₆: enrichment C₆ V
F₁, F₂: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF₁: functor_enrichment F₁ E₁ E₂
EF₂: functor_enrichment F₂ E₁ E₂
τ: F₂ ⟹ F₁
Hτ: nat_trans_enrichment τ EF₂ EF₁
G: C₃ ⟶ C₄
EG: functor_enrichment G E₃ E₄
H: C₅ ⟶ C₆
EH: functor_enrichment H E₅ E₆
P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₃
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₅
Q₁: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₄
Q₂: enriched_profunctor E₄ E₆
θ₁: enriched_profunctor_square EF₂ EG P₁ Q₁
θ₂: enriched_profunctor_square EG EH P₂ Q₂
z: C₅
v: C₁
x: C₃
comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₁ P₂ z v x
· comp_v_enriched_profunctor_square_mor θ₁ θ₂ z v
· mon_linvunitor
    (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob Q₁ Q₂ (H z) (F₂ v))
· enriched_from_arr E₂ (τ v)
  #⊗ identity
       (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob Q₁ Q₂ (H z) (F₂ v))
· identity (E₂ ⦃ F₂ v, F₁ v ⦄)
  #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_rmap Q₁ Q₂ (H z) (F₂ v)
       (F₁ v)
· sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ F₂ v, F₁ v ⦄)
    ((E₂ ⦃ F₂ v, F₁ v ⦄)
     ⊸ comp_enriched_profunctor_ob Q₁ Q₂ (H z) (F₁ v))
· internal_eval (E₂ ⦃ F₂ v, F₁ v ⦄)
    (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob Q₁ Q₂ (H z) (F₁ v)) =
?b

v: C₁
x: C₃
comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₁ P₂ z v x
· comp_v_enriched_profunctor_square_mor θ₁ θ₂ z v =
?y'

    apply comp_v_enriched_profunctor_square_mor_comm.

θ₂: enriched_profunctor_square EG EH P₂ Q₂
z: C₅
v: C₁
x: C₃
θ₁ x v #⊗ θ₂ z x
· comp_enriched_profunctor_in Q₁ Q₂ (H z) (F₂ v) (G x)
· mon_linvunitor
    (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob Q₁ Q₂ (H z) (F₂ v))
· enriched_from_arr E₂ (τ v)
  #⊗ identity
       (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob Q₁ Q₂ (H z) (F₂ v))
· identity (E₂ ⦃ F₂ v, F₁ v ⦄)
  #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_rmap Q₁ Q₂ (H z) (F₂ v)
       (F₁ v)
· sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ F₂ v, F₁ v ⦄)
    ((E₂ ⦃ F₂ v, F₁ v ⦄)
     ⊸ comp_enriched_profunctor_ob Q₁ Q₂ (H z) (F₁ v))
· internal_eval (E₂ ⦃ F₂ v, F₁ v ⦄)
    (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob Q₁ Q₂ (H z) (F₁ v)) =
comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₁ P₂ z v x
· comp_v_enriched_profunctor_square_mor
    (uwhisker_enriched_profunctor_square Hτ θ₁) θ₂ z v

EF₂: functor_enrichment F₂ E₁ E₂
τ: F₂ ⟹ F₁
Hτ: nat_trans_enrichment τ EF₂ EF₁
G: C₃ ⟶ C₄
EG: functor_enrichment G E₃ E₄
H: C₅ ⟶ C₆
EH: functor_enrichment H E₅ E₆

P₂: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₅

Q₂: enriched_profunctor E₄ E₆

θ₂: enriched_profunctor_square EG EH P₂ Q₂
z: C₅
v: C₁
x: C₃
uwhisker_enriched_profunctor_square Hτ θ₁ x v
#⊗ θ₂ z x
· comp_enriched_profunctor_in Q₁ Q₂ (H z) (F₁ v) (G x) =
θ₁ x v #⊗ θ₂ z x
· comp_enriched_profunctor_in Q₁ Q₂ (H z) (F₂ v) (G x)
· mon_linvunitor
    (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob Q₁ Q₂ (H z) (F₂ v))
· enriched_from_arr E₂ (τ v)
  #⊗ identity
       (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob Q₁ Q₂ (H z) (F₂ v))
· identity (E₂ ⦃ F₂ v, F₁ v ⦄)
  #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_rmap Q₁ Q₂ (H z) (F₂ v)
       (F₁ v)
· sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ F₂ v, F₁ v ⦄)
    ((E₂ ⦃ F₂ v, F₁ v ⦄)
     ⊸ comp_enriched_profunctor_ob Q₁ Q₂ (H z) (F₁ v))
· internal_eval (E₂ ⦃ F₂ v, F₁ v ⦄)
    (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob Q₁ Q₂ (H z) (F₁ v))

EF₂: functor_enrichment F₂ E₁ E₂
τ: F₂ ⟹ F₁
Hτ: nat_trans_enrichment τ EF₂ EF₁
G: C₃ ⟶ C₄
EG: functor_enrichment G E₃ E₄
H: C₅ ⟶ C₆
EH: functor_enrichment H E₅ E₆

P₂: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₅
Q₁: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₄
Q₂: enriched_profunctor E₄ E₆
θ₁: enriched_profunctor_square EF₂ EG P₁ Q₁
θ₂: enriched_profunctor_square EG EH P₂ Q₂
z: C₅
v: C₁
x: C₃
(θ₁ x v · mon_linvunitor (Q₁ (G x) (F₂ v))
 · enriched_from_arr E₂ (τ v)
   #⊗ identity (Q₁ (G x) (F₂ v))
 · rmap_e Q₁ (G x) (F₂ v) (F₁ v)) #⊗ θ₂ z x
· comp_enriched_profunctor_in Q₁ Q₂ (H z) (F₁ v) (G x) =
θ₁ x v #⊗ θ₂ z x
· comp_enriched_profunctor_in Q₁ Q₂ (H z) (F₂ v) (G x)
· mon_linvunitor
    (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob Q₁ Q₂ (H z) (F₂ v))
· enriched_from_arr E₂ (τ v)
  #⊗ identity
       (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob Q₁ Q₂ (H z) (F₂ v))
· identity (E₂ ⦃ F₂ v, F₁ v ⦄)
  #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_rmap Q₁ Q₂ (H z) (F₂ v)
       (F₁ v)
· sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ F₂ v, F₁ v ⦄)
    ((E₂ ⦃ F₂ v, F₁ v ⦄)
     ⊸ comp_enriched_profunctor_ob Q₁ Q₂ (H z) (F₁ v))
· internal_eval (E₂ ⦃ F₂ v, F₁ v ⦄)
    (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob Q₁ Q₂ (H z) (F₁ v))

EF₂: functor_enrichment F₂ E₁ E₂
τ: F₂ ⟹ F₁
Hτ: nat_trans_enrichment τ EF₂ EF₁

EG: functor_enrichment G E₃ E₄
H: C₅ ⟶ C₆
EH: functor_enrichment H E₅ E₆

P₂: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₅

Q₂: enriched_profunctor E₄ E₆

θ₂: enriched_profunctor_square EG EH P₂ Q₂
z: C₅
v: C₁
x: C₃
(θ₁ x v
 · (mon_linvunitor (Q₁ (G x) (F₂ v))
    · (enriched_from_arr E₂ (τ v)
       #⊗ identity (Q₁ (G x) (F₂ v))
       · rmap_e Q₁ (G x) (F₂ v) (F₁ v)))) #⊗ θ₂ z x
· comp_enriched_profunctor_in Q₁ Q₂ (H z) (F₁ v) (G x) =
θ₁ x v #⊗ θ₂ z x
· (comp_enriched_profunctor_in Q₁ Q₂ (H z) (F₂ v)
     (G x)
   · (mon_linvunitor
        (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob Q₁ Q₂ (H z)
           (F₂ v))
      · (enriched_from_arr E₂ (τ v)
         #⊗ identity
              (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob Q₁ Q₂ (H z)
                 (F₂ v))
         · (identity (E₂ ⦃ F₂ v, F₁ v ⦄)
            #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_rmap Q₁ Q₂
                 (H z) (F₂ v) (F₁ v)
            · (sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ F₂ v, F₁ v ⦄)
                 ((E₂ ⦃ F₂ v, F₁ v ⦄)
                  ⊸ comp_enriched_profunctor_ob Q₁ Q₂
                      (H z) (F₁ v))
               · internal_eval (E₂ ⦃ F₂ v, F₁ v ⦄)
                   (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob Q₁ Q₂
                      (H z) (F₁ v)))))))

E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
E₅: enrichment C₅ V
E₆: enrichment C₆ V
F₁, F₂: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF₁: functor_enrichment F₁ E₁ E₂
EF₂: functor_enrichment F₂ E₁ E₂
τ: F₂ ⟹ F₁
Hτ: nat_trans_enrichment τ EF₂ EF₁
G: C₃ ⟶ C₄
EG: functor_enrichment G E₃ E₄
H: C₅ ⟶ C₆
EH: functor_enrichment H E₅ E₆
P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₃
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₅
Q₁: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₄
Q₂: enriched_profunctor E₄ E₆
θ₁: enriched_profunctor_square EF₂ EG P₁ Q₁
θ₂: enriched_profunctor_square EG EH P₂ Q₂
z: C₅
v: C₁
x: C₃
θ₁ x v #⊗ θ₂ z x
· ((mon_linvunitor (Q₁ (G x) (F₂ v))
    · (enriched_from_arr E₂ (τ v)
       #⊗ identity (Q₁ (G x) (F₂ v))
       · rmap_e Q₁ (G x) (F₂ v) (F₁ v)))
   #⊗ identity (Q₂ (H z) (G x))
   · comp_enriched_profunctor_in Q₁ Q₂ (H z) (F₁ v)
       (G x)) =
θ₁ x v #⊗ θ₂ z x
· (comp_enriched_profunctor_in Q₁ Q₂ (H z) (F₂ v)
     (G x)
   · (mon_linvunitor
        (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob Q₁ Q₂ (H z)
           (F₂ v))
      · (enriched_from_arr E₂ (τ v)
         #⊗ identity
              (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob Q₁ Q₂ (H z)
                 (F₂ v))
         · (identity (E₂ ⦃ F₂ v, F₁ v ⦄)
            #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_rmap Q₁ Q₂
                 (H z) (F₂ v) (F₁ v)
            · (sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ F₂ v, F₁ v ⦄)
                 ((E₂ ⦃ F₂ v, F₁ v ⦄)
                  ⊸ comp_enriched_profunctor_ob Q₁ Q₂
                      (H z) (F₁ v))
               · internal_eval (E₂ ⦃ F₂ v, F₁ v ⦄)
                   (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob Q₁ Q₂
                      (H z) (F₁ v)))))))

  
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄, C₅, C₆: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
E₅: enrichment C₅ V
E₆: enrichment C₆ V
F₁, F₂: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF₁: functor_enrichment F₁ E₁ E₂
EF₂: functor_enrichment F₂ E₁ E₂
τ: F₂ ⟹ F₁
Hτ: nat_trans_enrichment τ EF₂ EF₁
G: C₃ ⟶ C₄
EG: functor_enrichment G E₃ E₄
H: C₅ ⟶ C₆
EH: functor_enrichment H E₅ E₆
P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₃
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₅
Q₁: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₄
Q₂: enriched_profunctor E₄ E₆
θ₁: enriched_profunctor_square EF₂ EG P₁ Q₁
θ₂: enriched_profunctor_square EG EH P₂ Q₂
z: C₅
v: C₁
x: C₃
(mon_linvunitor (Q₁ (G x) (F₂ v))
 · (enriched_from_arr E₂ (τ v)
    #⊗ identity (Q₁ (G x) (F₂ v))
    · rmap_e Q₁ (G x) (F₂ v) (F₁ v)))
#⊗ identity (Q₂ (H z) (G x))
· comp_enriched_profunctor_in Q₁ Q₂ (H z) (F₁ v) (G x) =
comp_enriched_profunctor_in Q₁ Q₂ (H z) (F₂ v) (G x)
· (mon_linvunitor
     (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob Q₁ Q₂ (H z) (F₂ v))
   · (enriched_from_arr E₂ (τ v)
      #⊗ identity
           (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob Q₁ Q₂ (H z)
              (F₂ v))
      · (identity (E₂ ⦃ F₂ v, F₁ v ⦄)
         #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_rmap Q₁ Q₂ (H z)
              (F₂ v) (F₁ v)
         · (sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ F₂ v, F₁ v ⦄)
              ((E₂ ⦃ F₂ v, F₁ v ⦄)
               ⊸ comp_enriched_profunctor_ob Q₁ Q₂
                   (H z) (F₁ v))
            · internal_eval (E₂ ⦃ F₂ v, F₁ v ⦄)
                (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob Q₁ Q₂
                   (H z) (F₁ v))))))

  
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄, C₅, C₆: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
E₅: enrichment C₅ V
E₆: enrichment C₆ V
F₁, F₂: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF₁: functor_enrichment F₁ E₁ E₂
EF₂: functor_enrichment F₂ E₁ E₂
τ: F₂ ⟹ F₁
Hτ: nat_trans_enrichment τ EF₂ EF₁
G: C₃ ⟶ C₄
EG: functor_enrichment G E₃ E₄
H: C₅ ⟶ C₆
EH: functor_enrichment H E₅ E₆
P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₃
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₅
Q₁: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₄
Q₂: enriched_profunctor E₄ E₆
θ₁: enriched_profunctor_square EF₂ EG P₁ Q₁
θ₂: enriched_profunctor_square EG EH P₂ Q₂
z: C₅
v: C₁
x: C₃
comp_enriched_profunctor_in Q₁ Q₂ (H z) (F₂ v) (G x)
· (mon_linvunitor
     (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob Q₁ Q₂ (H z) (F₂ v))
   · (enriched_from_arr E₂ (τ v)
      #⊗ identity
           (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob Q₁ Q₂ (H z)
              (F₂ v))
      · (identity (E₂ ⦃ F₂ v, F₁ v ⦄)
         #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_rmap Q₁ Q₂ (H z)
              (F₂ v) (F₁ v)
         · (sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ F₂ v, F₁ v ⦄)
              ((E₂ ⦃ F₂ v, F₁ v ⦄)
               ⊸ comp_enriched_profunctor_ob Q₁ Q₂
                   (H z) (F₁ v))
            · internal_eval (E₂ ⦃ F₂ v, F₁ v ⦄)
                (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob Q₁ Q₂
                   (H z) (F₁ v)))))) =
(mon_linvunitor (Q₁ (G x) (F₂ v))
 · (enriched_from_arr E₂ (τ v)
    #⊗ identity (Q₁ (G x) (F₂ v))
    · rmap_e Q₁ (G x) (F₂ v) (F₁ v)))
#⊗ identity (Q₂ (H z) (G x))
· comp_enriched_profunctor_in Q₁ Q₂ (H z) (F₁ v) (G x)

EF₂: functor_enrichment F₂ E₁ E₂

EG: functor_enrichment G E₃ E₄
H: C₅ ⟶ C₆
EH: functor_enrichment H E₅ E₆
P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₃
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₅
Q₁: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₄
Q₂: enriched_profunctor E₄ E₆
θ₁: enriched_profunctor_square EF₂ EG P₁ Q₁
θ₂: enriched_profunctor_square EG EH P₂ Q₂
z: C₅
v: C₁
x: C₃
comp_enriched_profunctor_in Q₁ Q₂ (H z) (F₂ v) (G x)
· (mon_linvunitor
     (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob Q₁ Q₂ (H z) (F₂ v))
   · (enriched_from_arr E₂ (τ v)
      #⊗ identity
           (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob Q₁ Q₂ (H z)
              (F₂ v))
      · (identity (E₂ ⦃ F₂ v, F₁ v ⦄)
         #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_rmap Q₁ Q₂ (H z)
              (F₂ v) (F₁ v)
         · (sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ F₂ v, F₁ v ⦄)
              ((E₂ ⦃ F₂ v, F₁ v ⦄)
               ⊸ comp_enriched_profunctor_ob Q₁ Q₂
                   (H z) (F₁ v))
            · internal_eval (E₂ ⦃ F₂ v, F₁ v ⦄)
                (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob Q₁ Q₂
                   (H z) (F₁ v)))))) = ?b
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄, C₅, C₆: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
E₅: enrichment C₅ V
E₆: enrichment C₆ V
F₁, F₂: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF₁: functor_enrichment F₁ E₁ E₂
EF₂: functor_enrichment F₂ E₁ E₂
τ: F₂ ⟹ F₁
Hτ: nat_trans_enrichment τ EF₂ EF₁
G: C₃ ⟶ C₄
EG: functor_enrichment G E₃ E₄
H: C₅ ⟶ C₆
EH: functor_enrichment H E₅ E₆
P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₃
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₅
Q₁: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₄
Q₂: enriched_profunctor E₄ E₆
θ₁: enriched_profunctor_square EF₂ EG P₁ Q₁
θ₂: enriched_profunctor_square EG EH P₂ Q₂
z: C₅
v: C₁
x: C₃
?b =
(mon_linvunitor (Q₁ (G x) (F₂ v))
 · (enriched_from_arr E₂ (τ v)
    #⊗ identity (Q₁ (G x) (F₂ v))
    · rmap_e Q₁ (G x) (F₂ v) (F₁ v)))
#⊗ identity (Q₂ (H z) (G x))
· comp_enriched_profunctor_in Q₁ Q₂ (H z) (F₁ v) (G x)

EF₂: functor_enrichment F₂ E₁ E₂

H: C₅ ⟶ C₆

P₂: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₅

Q₂: enriched_profunctor E₄ E₆

θ₂: enriched_profunctor_square EG EH P₂ Q₂
z: C₅
v: C₁
x: C₃
comp_enriched_profunctor_in Q₁ Q₂ (H z) (F₂ v) (G x)
· (mon_linvunitor
     (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob Q₁ Q₂ (H z) (F₂ v))
   · (enriched_from_arr E₂ (τ v)
      #⊗ identity
           (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob Q₁ Q₂ (H z)
              (F₂ v))
      · (identity (E₂ ⦃ F₂ v, F₁ v ⦄)
         #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_rmap Q₁ Q₂ (H z)
              (F₂ v) (F₁ v)
         · (sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ F₂ v, F₁ v ⦄)
              ((E₂ ⦃ F₂ v, F₁ v ⦄)
               ⊸ comp_enriched_profunctor_ob Q₁ Q₂
                   (H z) (F₁ v))
            · internal_eval (E₂ ⦃ F₂ v, F₁ v ⦄)
                (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob Q₁ Q₂
                   (H z) (F₁ v)))))) = ?b

F₁, F₂: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF₁: functor_enrichment F₁ E₁ E₂
EF₂: functor_enrichment F₂ E₁ E₂
τ: F₂ ⟹ F₁
Hτ: nat_trans_enrichment τ EF₂ EF₁
G: C₃ ⟶ C₄
EG: functor_enrichment G E₃ E₄
H: C₅ ⟶ C₆
EH: functor_enrichment H E₅ E₆
P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₃
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₅
Q₁: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₄
Q₂: enriched_profunctor E₄ E₆
θ₁: enriched_profunctor_square EF₂ EG P₁ Q₁
θ₂: enriched_profunctor_square EG EH P₂ Q₂
z: C₅
v: C₁
x: C₃
comp_enriched_profunctor_in Q₁ Q₂ (H z) (F₂ v) (G x)
· mon_linvunitor
    (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob Q₁ Q₂ (H z) (F₂ v))
· enriched_from_arr E₂ (τ v)
  #⊗ identity
       (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob Q₁ Q₂ (H z) (F₂ v))
· identity (E₂ ⦃ F₂ v, F₁ v ⦄)
  #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_rmap Q₁ Q₂ (H z) (F₂ v)
       (F₁ v)
· sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ F₂ v, F₁ v ⦄)
    ((E₂ ⦃ F₂ v, F₁ v ⦄)
     ⊸ comp_enriched_profunctor_ob Q₁ Q₂ (H z) (F₁ v))
· internal_eval (E₂ ⦃ F₂ v, F₁ v ⦄)
    (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob Q₁ Q₂ (H z) (F₁ v)) =
?b

EF₂: functor_enrichment F₂ E₁ E₂

Hτ: nat_trans_enrichment τ EF₂ EF₁

H: C₅ ⟶ C₆

P₂: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₅

Q₂: enriched_profunctor E₄ E₆

θ₂: enriched_profunctor_square EG EH P₂ Q₂
z: C₅
v: C₁
x: C₃
mon_linvunitor (Q₁ (G x) (F₂ v) ⊗ Q₂ (H z) (G x))
· identity I_{ V}
  #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_in Q₁ Q₂ (H z) (F₂ v)
       (G x)
· enriched_from_arr E₂ (τ v)
  #⊗ identity
       (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob Q₁ Q₂ (H z) (F₂ v))
· identity (E₂ ⦃ F₂ v, F₁ v ⦄)
  #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_rmap Q₁ Q₂ (H z) (F₂ v)
       (F₁ v)
· sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ F₂ v, F₁ v ⦄)
    ((E₂ ⦃ F₂ v, F₁ v ⦄)
     ⊸ comp_enriched_profunctor_ob Q₁ Q₂ (H z) (F₁ v))
· internal_eval (E₂ ⦃ F₂ v, F₁ v ⦄)
    (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob Q₁ Q₂ (H z) (F₁ v)) =
?b

z: C₅
v: C₁
x: C₃
mon_linvunitor (Q₁ (G x) (F₂ v) ⊗ Q₂ (H z) (G x))
· (identity I_{ V}
   #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_in Q₁ Q₂ (H z) (F₂ v)
        (G x)
   · (enriched_from_arr E₂ (τ v)
      #⊗ identity
           (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob Q₁ Q₂ (H z)
              (F₂ v))
      · (identity (E₂ ⦃ F₂ v, F₁ v ⦄)
         #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_rmap Q₁ Q₂ (H z)
              (F₂ v) (F₁ v)
         · (sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ F₂ v, F₁ v ⦄)
              ((E₂ ⦃ F₂ v, F₁ v ⦄)
               ⊸ comp_enriched_profunctor_ob Q₁ Q₂
                   (H z) (F₁ v))
            · internal_eval (E₂ ⦃ F₂ v, F₁ v ⦄)

                   (H z) (F₁ v)))))) = ?b

θ₂: enriched_profunctor_square EG EH P₂ Q₂

v: C₁

identity I_{ V}
#⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_in Q₁ Q₂ (H z) (F₂ v)
     (G x)
· (enriched_from_arr E₂ (τ v)
   #⊗ identity

θ₂: enriched_profunctor_square EG EH P₂ Q₂
z: C₅
v: C₁
x: C₃
identity I_{ V}
#⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_in Q₁ Q₂ (H z) (F₂ v)
     (G x)
· enriched_from_arr E₂ (τ v)
  #⊗ identity
       (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob Q₁ Q₂ (H z) (F₂ v))
· identity (E₂ ⦃ F₂ v, F₁ v ⦄)
  #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_rmap Q₁ Q₂ (H z) (F₂ v)
       (F₁ v)
· sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ F₂ v, F₁ v ⦄)
    ((E₂ ⦃ F₂ v, F₁ v ⦄)
     ⊸ comp_enriched_profunctor_ob Q₁ Q₂ (H z) (F₁ v))
· internal_eval (E₂ ⦃ F₂ v, F₁ v ⦄)
    (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob Q₁ Q₂ (H z) (F₁ v)) =
?t2

EF₁: functor_enrichment F₁ E₁ E₂
EF₂: functor_enrichment F₂ E₁ E₂
τ: F₂ ⟹ F₁
Hτ: nat_trans_enrichment τ EF₂ EF₁
G: C₃ ⟶ C₄
EG: functor_enrichment G E₃ E₄
H: C₅ ⟶ C₆
EH: functor_enrichment H E₅ E₆
P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₃
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₅
Q₁: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₄
Q₂: enriched_profunctor E₄ E₆
θ₁: enriched_profunctor_square EF₂ EG P₁ Q₁
θ₂: enriched_profunctor_square EG EH P₂ Q₂
z: C₅
v: C₁
x: C₃
(comp_enriched_profunctor_in Q₁ Q₂ (H z) (F₂ v) (G x)
 · comp_enriched_profunctor_rmap Q₁ Q₂ (H z) (F₂ v)
     (F₁ v)) #⊗ identity (E₂ ⦃ F₂ v, F₁ v ⦄)
· internal_eval (E₂ ⦃ F₂ v, F₁ v ⦄)
    (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob Q₁ Q₂ (H z) (F₁ v)) =
?t2

    apply comp_enriched_profunctor_rmap_comm.
  
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄, C₅, C₆: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
E₅: enrichment C₅ V
E₆: enrichment C₆ V
F₁, F₂: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF₁: functor_enrichment F₁ E₁ E₂
EF₂: functor_enrichment F₂ E₁ E₂
τ: F₂ ⟹ F₁
Hτ: nat_trans_enrichment τ EF₂ EF₁
G: C₃ ⟶ C₄
EG: functor_enrichment G E₃ E₄
H: C₅ ⟶ C₆
EH: functor_enrichment H E₅ E₆
P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₃
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₅
Q₁: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₄
Q₂: enriched_profunctor E₄ E₆
θ₁: enriched_profunctor_square EF₂ EG P₁ Q₁
θ₂: enriched_profunctor_square EG EH P₂ Q₂
z: C₅
v: C₁
x: C₃
mon_linvunitor (Q₁ (G x) (F₂ v) ⊗ Q₂ (H z) (G x))
· (enriched_from_arr E₂ (τ v)
   #⊗ identity (Q₁ (G x) (F₂ v) ⊗ Q₂ (H z) (G x))
   · (sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ F₂ v, F₁ v ⦄)
        (Q₁ (G x) (F₂ v) ⊗ Q₂ (H z) (G x))
      · (sym_mon_braiding V
           (Q₁ (G x) (F₂ v) ⊗ Q₂ (H z) (G x))
           (E₂ ⦃ F₂ v, F₁ v ⦄)
         · comp_enriched_profunctor_rmap_mor Q₁ Q₂
             (H z) (F₂ v) (F₁ v) (G x)))) =
(mon_linvunitor (Q₁ (G x) (F₂ v))
 · (enriched_from_arr E₂ (τ v)
    #⊗ identity (Q₁ (G x) (F₂ v))
    · rmap_e Q₁ (G x) (F₂ v) (F₁ v)))
#⊗ identity (Q₂ (H z) (G x))
· comp_enriched_profunctor_in Q₁ Q₂ (H z) (F₁ v) (G x)

EF₂: functor_enrichment F₂ E₁ E₂

Hτ: nat_trans_enrichment τ EF₂ EF₁
G: C₃ ⟶ C₄
EG: functor_enrichment G E₃ E₄
H: C₅ ⟶ C₆
EH: functor_enrichment H E₅ E₆

P₂: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₅
Q₁: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₄
Q₂: enriched_profunctor E₄ E₆
θ₁: enriched_profunctor_square EF₂ EG P₁ Q₁
θ₂: enriched_profunctor_square EG EH P₂ Q₂
z: C₅
v: C₁
x: C₃
mon_linvunitor (Q₁ (G x) (F₂ v) ⊗ Q₂ (H z) (G x))
· (enriched_from_arr E₂ (τ v)
   #⊗ identity (Q₁ (G x) (F₂ v) ⊗ Q₂ (H z) (G x))
   · (sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ F₂ v, F₁ v ⦄)
        (Q₁ (G x) (F₂ v) ⊗ Q₂ (H z) (G x))
      · (sym_mon_braiding V
           (Q₁ (G x) (F₂ v) ⊗ Q₂ (H z) (G x))
           (E₂ ⦃ F₂ v, F₁ v ⦄)
         · comp_enriched_profunctor_rmap_mor Q₁ Q₂
             (H z) (F₂ v) (F₁ v) (G x)))) = ?b
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄, C₅, C₆: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
E₅: enrichment C₅ V
E₆: enrichment C₆ V
F₁, F₂: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF₁: functor_enrichment F₁ E₁ E₂
EF₂: functor_enrichment F₂ E₁ E₂
τ: F₂ ⟹ F₁
Hτ: nat_trans_enrichment τ EF₂ EF₁
G: C₃ ⟶ C₄
EG: functor_enrichment G E₃ E₄
H: C₅ ⟶ C₆
EH: functor_enrichment H E₅ E₆
P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₃
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₅
Q₁: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₄
Q₂: enriched_profunctor E₄ E₆
θ₁: enriched_profunctor_square EF₂ EG P₁ Q₁
θ₂: enriched_profunctor_square EG EH P₂ Q₂
z: C₅
v: C₁
x: C₃
?b =
(mon_linvunitor (Q₁ (G x) (F₂ v))
 · (enriched_from_arr E₂ (τ v)
    #⊗ identity (Q₁ (G x) (F₂ v))
    · rmap_e Q₁ (G x) (F₂ v) (F₁ v)))
#⊗ identity (Q₂ (H z) (G x))
· comp_enriched_profunctor_in Q₁ Q₂ (H z) (F₁ v) (G x)

C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄, C₅, C₆: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V

E₅: enrichment C₅ V
E₆: enrichment C₆ V
F₁, F₂: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF₁: functor_enrichment F₁ E₁ E₂
EF₂: functor_enrichment F₂ E₁ E₂
τ: F₂ ⟹ F₁
Hτ: nat_trans_enrichment τ EF₂ EF₁
G: C₃ ⟶ C₄
EG: functor_enrichment G E₃ E₄
H: C₅ ⟶ C₆
EH: functor_enrichment H E₅ E₆
P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₃
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₅
Q₁: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₄
Q₂: enriched_profunctor E₄ E₆
θ₁: enriched_profunctor_square EF₂ EG P₁ Q₁
θ₂: enriched_profunctor_square EG EH P₂ Q₂
z: C₅
v: C₁
x: C₃
mon_linvunitor (Q₁ (G x) (F₂ v) ⊗ Q₂ (H z) (G x))
· (enriched_from_arr E₂ (τ v)
   #⊗ identity (Q₁ (G x) (F₂ v) ⊗ Q₂ (H z) (G x))
   · (sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ F₂ v, F₁ v ⦄)
        (Q₁ (G x) (F₂ v) ⊗ Q₂ (H z) (G x))
      · (sym_mon_braiding V
           (Q₁ (G x) (F₂ v) ⊗ Q₂ (H z) (G x))
           (E₂ ⦃ F₂ v, F₁ v ⦄)
         · comp_enriched_profunctor_rmap_mor Q₁ Q₂
             (H z) (F₂ v) (F₁ v) (G x)))) = ?b

    
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄, C₅, C₆: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
E₅: enrichment C₅ V
E₆: enrichment C₆ V
F₁, F₂: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF₁: functor_enrichment F₁ E₁ E₂
EF₂: functor_enrichment F₂ E₁ E₂
τ: F₂ ⟹ F₁
Hτ: nat_trans_enrichment τ EF₂ EF₁
G: C₃ ⟶ C₄
EG: functor_enrichment G E₃ E₄
H: C₅ ⟶ C₆
EH: functor_enrichment H E₅ E₆
P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₃
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₅
Q₁: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₄
Q₂: enriched_profunctor E₄ E₆
θ₁: enriched_profunctor_square EF₂ EG P₁ Q₁
θ₂: enriched_profunctor_square EG EH P₂ Q₂
z: C₅
v: C₁
x: C₃
sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ F₂ v, F₁ v ⦄)
  (Q₁ (G x) (F₂ v) ⊗ Q₂ (H z) (G x))
· (sym_mon_braiding V
     (Q₁ (G x) (F₂ v) ⊗ Q₂ (H z) (G x))
     (E₂ ⦃ F₂ v, F₁ v ⦄)
   · comp_enriched_profunctor_rmap_mor Q₁ Q₂ (H z)
       (F₂ v) (F₁ v) (G x)) = ?t2

E₂: enrichment C₂ V

E₄: enrichment C₄ V
E₅: enrichment C₅ V

EF₁: functor_enrichment F₁ E₁ E₂
EF₂: functor_enrichment F₂ E₁ E₂
τ: F₂ ⟹ F₁
Hτ: nat_trans_enrichment τ EF₂ EF₁
G: C₃ ⟶ C₄
EG: functor_enrichment G E₃ E₄
H: C₅ ⟶ C₆
EH: functor_enrichment H E₅ E₆
P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₃
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₅
Q₁: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₄
Q₂: enriched_profunctor E₄ E₆
θ₁: enriched_profunctor_square EF₂ EG P₁ Q₁
θ₂: enriched_profunctor_square EG EH P₂ Q₂
z: C₅
v: C₁
x: C₃
sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ F₂ v, F₁ v ⦄)
  (Q₁ (G x) (F₂ v) ⊗ Q₂ (H z) (G x))
· sym_mon_braiding V
    (Q₁ (G x) (F₂ v) ⊗ Q₂ (H z) (G x))
    (E₂ ⦃ F₂ v, F₁ v ⦄)
· comp_enriched_profunctor_rmap_mor Q₁ Q₂ (H z) (F₂ v)
    (F₁ v) (G x) = ?t2

    
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄, C₅, C₆: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
E₅: enrichment C₅ V
E₆: enrichment C₆ V
F₁, F₂: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF₁: functor_enrichment F₁ E₁ E₂
EF₂: functor_enrichment F₂ E₁ E₂
τ: F₂ ⟹ F₁
Hτ: nat_trans_enrichment τ EF₂ EF₁
G: C₃ ⟶ C₄
EG: functor_enrichment G E₃ E₄
H: C₅ ⟶ C₆
EH: functor_enrichment H E₅ E₆
P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₃
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₅
Q₁: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₄
Q₂: enriched_profunctor E₄ E₆
θ₁: enriched_profunctor_square EF₂ EG P₁ Q₁
θ₂: enriched_profunctor_square EG EH P₂ Q₂
z: C₅
v: C₁
x: C₃
identity
  ((E₂ ⦃ F₂ v, F₁ v ⦄)
   ⊗ (Q₁ (G x) (F₂ v) ⊗ Q₂ (H z) (G x)))
· comp_enriched_profunctor_rmap_mor Q₁ Q₂ (H z) (F₂ v)
    (F₁ v) (G x) = ?t2

    
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄, C₅, C₆: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
E₅: enrichment C₅ V
E₆: enrichment C₆ V
F₁, F₂: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF₁: functor_enrichment F₁ E₁ E₂
EF₂: functor_enrichment F₂ E₁ E₂
τ: F₂ ⟹ F₁
Hτ: nat_trans_enrichment τ EF₂ EF₁
G: C₃ ⟶ C₄
EG: functor_enrichment G E₃ E₄
H: C₅ ⟶ C₆
EH: functor_enrichment H E₅ E₆
P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₃
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₅
Q₁: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₄
Q₂: enriched_profunctor E₄ E₆
θ₁: enriched_profunctor_square EF₂ EG P₁ Q₁
θ₂: enriched_profunctor_square EG EH P₂ Q₂
z: C₅
v: C₁
x: C₃
identity
  ((E₂ ⦃ F₂ v, F₁ v ⦄)
   ⊗ (Q₁ (G x) (F₂ v) ⊗ Q₂ (H z) (G x)))
· (mon_rassociator (E₂ ⦃ F₂ v, F₁ v ⦄)
     (Q₁ (G x) (F₂ v)) (Q₂ (H z) (G x))
   · rmap_e Q₁ (G x) (F₂ v) (F₁ v)
     #⊗ identity (Q₂ (H z) (G x))
   · comp_enriched_profunctor_in Q₁ Q₂ (H z) (F₁ v)
       (G x)) = ?t2

    apply id_left.
  
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄, C₅, C₆: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
E₅: enrichment C₅ V
E₆: enrichment C₆ V
F₁, F₂: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF₁: functor_enrichment F₁ E₁ E₂
EF₂: functor_enrichment F₂ E₁ E₂
τ: F₂ ⟹ F₁
Hτ: nat_trans_enrichment τ EF₂ EF₁
G: C₃ ⟶ C₄
EG: functor_enrichment G E₃ E₄
H: C₅ ⟶ C₆
EH: functor_enrichment H E₅ E₆
P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₃
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₅
Q₁: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₄
Q₂: enriched_profunctor E₄ E₆
θ₁: enriched_profunctor_square EF₂ EG P₁ Q₁
θ₂: enriched_profunctor_square EG EH P₂ Q₂
z: C₅
v: C₁
x: C₃
mon_linvunitor (Q₁ (G x) (F₂ v) ⊗ Q₂ (H z) (G x))
· (enriched_from_arr E₂ (τ v)
   #⊗ identity (Q₁ (G x) (F₂ v) ⊗ Q₂ (H z) (G x))
   · (mon_rassociator (E₂ ⦃ F₂ v, F₁ v ⦄)
        (Q₁ (G x) (F₂ v)) (Q₂ (H z) (G x))
      · rmap_e Q₁ (G x) (F₂ v) (F₁ v)
        #⊗ identity (Q₂ (H z) (G x))
      · comp_enriched_profunctor_in Q₁ Q₂ (H z) (F₁ v)
          (G x))) =
(mon_linvunitor (Q₁ (G x) (F₂ v))
 · (enriched_from_arr E₂ (τ v)
    #⊗ identity (Q₁ (G x) (F₂ v))
    · rmap_e Q₁ (G x) (F₂ v) (F₁ v)))
#⊗ identity (Q₂ (H z) (G x))
· comp_enriched_profunctor_in Q₁ Q₂ (H z) (F₁ v) (G x)

C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄, C₅, C₆: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
E₅: enrichment C₅ V
E₆: enrichment C₆ V
F₁, F₂: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF₁: functor_enrichment F₁ E₁ E₂
EF₂: functor_enrichment F₂ E₁ E₂
τ: F₂ ⟹ F₁
Hτ: nat_trans_enrichment τ EF₂ EF₁
G: C₃ ⟶ C₄
EG: functor_enrichment G E₃ E₄
H: C₅ ⟶ C₆
EH: functor_enrichment H E₅ E₆
P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₃
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₅
Q₁: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₄
Q₂: enriched_profunctor E₄ E₆
θ₁: enriched_profunctor_square EF₂ EG P₁ Q₁
θ₂: enriched_profunctor_square EG EH P₂ Q₂
z: C₅
v: C₁
x: C₃
mon_linvunitor (Q₁ (G x) (F₂ v) ⊗ Q₂ (H z) (G x))
· enriched_from_arr E₂ (τ v)
  #⊗ identity (Q₁ (G x) (F₂ v) ⊗ Q₂ (H z) (G x))
· mon_rassociator (E₂ ⦃ F₂ v, F₁ v ⦄)
    (Q₁ (G x) (F₂ v)) (Q₂ (H z) (G x))
· rmap_e Q₁ (G x) (F₂ v) (F₁ v)
  #⊗ identity (Q₂ (H z) (G x))
· comp_enriched_profunctor_in Q₁ Q₂ (H z) (F₁ v) (G x) =
(mon_linvunitor (Q₁ (G x) (F₂ v))
 · enriched_from_arr E₂ (τ v)
   #⊗ identity (Q₁ (G x) (F₂ v))
 · rmap_e Q₁ (G x) (F₂ v) (F₁ v))
#⊗ identity (Q₂ (H z) (G x))
· comp_enriched_profunctor_in Q₁ Q₂ (H z) (F₁ v) (G x)

C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄, C₅, C₆: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
E₅: enrichment C₅ V
E₆: enrichment C₆ V
F₁, F₂: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF₁: functor_enrichment F₁ E₁ E₂
EF₂: functor_enrichment F₂ E₁ E₂
τ: F₂ ⟹ F₁
Hτ: nat_trans_enrichment τ EF₂ EF₁
G: C₃ ⟶ C₄
EG: functor_enrichment G E₃ E₄
H: C₅ ⟶ C₆
EH: functor_enrichment H E₅ E₆
P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₃
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₅
Q₁: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₄
Q₂: enriched_profunctor E₄ E₆
θ₁: enriched_profunctor_square EF₂ EG P₁ Q₁
θ₂: enriched_profunctor_square EG EH P₂ Q₂
z: C₅
v: C₁
x: C₃
mon_linvunitor (Q₁ (G x) (F₂ v) ⊗ Q₂ (H z) (G x))
· enriched_from_arr E₂ (τ v)
  #⊗ identity (Q₁ (G x) (F₂ v) ⊗ Q₂ (H z) (G x))
· mon_rassociator (E₂ ⦃ F₂ v, F₁ v ⦄)
    (Q₁ (G x) (F₂ v)) (Q₂ (H z) (G x))
· rmap_e Q₁ (G x) (F₂ v) (F₁ v)
  #⊗ identity (Q₂ (H z) (G x)) =
(mon_linvunitor (Q₁ (G x) (F₂ v))
 · enriched_from_arr E₂ (τ v)
   #⊗ identity (Q₁ (G x) (F₂ v))
 · rmap_e Q₁ (G x) (F₂ v) (F₁ v))
#⊗ identity (Q₂ (H z) (G x))

mon_linvunitor (Q₁ (G x) (F₂ v) ⊗ Q₂ (H z) (G x))

· mon_rassociator (E₂ ⦃ F₂ v, F₁ v ⦄)
    (Q₁ (G x) (F₂ v)) (Q₂ (H z) (G x))
· rmap_e Q₁ (G x) (F₂ v) (F₁ v)

· mon_rassociator (E₂ ⦃ F₂ v, F₁ v ⦄)

   #⊗ identity (Q₁ (G x) (F₂ v) ⊗ Q₂ (H z) (G x))
   · mon_rassociator (E₂ ⦃ F₂ v, F₁ v ⦄)
       (Q₁ (G x) (F₂ v)) (Q₂ (H z) (G x))) =
(enriched_from_arr E₂ (τ v)
 #⊗ identity (Q₁ (G x) (F₂ v)))
#⊗ identity (Q₂ (H z) (G x))

  
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄, C₅, C₆: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
E₅: enrichment C₅ V
E₆: enrichment C₆ V
F₁, F₂: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF₁: functor_enrichment F₁ E₁ E₂
EF₂: functor_enrichment F₂ E₁ E₂
τ: F₂ ⟹ F₁
Hτ: nat_trans_enrichment τ EF₂ EF₁
G: C₃ ⟶ C₄
EG: functor_enrichment G E₃ E₄
H: C₅ ⟶ C₆
EH: functor_enrichment H E₅ E₆
P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₃
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₅
Q₁: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₄
Q₂: enriched_profunctor E₄ E₆
θ₁: enriched_profunctor_square EF₂ EG P₁ Q₁
θ₂: enriched_profunctor_square EG EH P₂ Q₂
z: C₅
v: C₁
x: C₃
mon_lassociator I_{ V} (Q₁ (G x) (F₂ v))
  (Q₂ (H z) (G x))
· (enriched_from_arr E₂ (τ v)
   #⊗ (identity (Q₁ (G x) (F₂ v))
       #⊗ identity (Q₂ (H z) (G x)))
   · mon_rassociator (E₂ ⦃ F₂ v, F₁ v ⦄)
       (Q₁ (G x) (F₂ v)) (Q₂ (H z) (G x))) =
(enriched_from_arr E₂ (τ v)
 #⊗ identity (Q₁ (G x) (F₂ v)))
#⊗ identity (Q₂ (H z) (G x))

  
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄, C₅, C₆: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
E₅: enrichment C₅ V
E₆: enrichment C₆ V
F₁, F₂: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF₁: functor_enrichment F₁ E₁ E₂
EF₂: functor_enrichment F₂ E₁ E₂
τ: F₂ ⟹ F₁
Hτ: nat_trans_enrichment τ EF₂ EF₁
G: C₃ ⟶ C₄
EG: functor_enrichment G E₃ E₄
H: C₅ ⟶ C₆
EH: functor_enrichment H E₅ E₆
P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₃
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₅
Q₁: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₄
Q₂: enriched_profunctor E₄ E₆
θ₁: enriched_profunctor_square EF₂ EG P₁ Q₁
θ₂: enriched_profunctor_square EG EH P₂ Q₂
z: C₅
v: C₁
x: C₃
mon_lassociator I_{ V} (Q₁ (G x) (F₂ v))
  (Q₂ (H z) (G x))
· (mon_rassociator I_{ V} (Q₁ (G x) (F₂ v))
     (Q₂ (H z) (G x))
   · (enriched_from_arr E₂ (τ v)
      #⊗ identity (Q₁ (G x) (F₂ v)))
     #⊗ identity (Q₂ (H z) (G x))) =
(enriched_from_arr E₂ (τ v)
 #⊗ identity (Q₁ (G x) (F₂ v)))
#⊗ identity (Q₂ (H z) (G x))

  
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄, C₅, C₆: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
E₅: enrichment C₅ V
E₆: enrichment C₆ V
F₁, F₂: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF₁: functor_enrichment F₁ E₁ E₂
EF₂: functor_enrichment F₂ E₁ E₂
τ: F₂ ⟹ F₁
Hτ: nat_trans_enrichment τ EF₂ EF₁
G: C₃ ⟶ C₄
EG: functor_enrichment G E₃ E₄
H: C₅ ⟶ C₆
EH: functor_enrichment H E₅ E₆
P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₃
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₅
Q₁: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₄
Q₂: enriched_profunctor E₄ E₆
θ₁: enriched_profunctor_square EF₂ EG P₁ Q₁
θ₂: enriched_profunctor_square EG EH P₂ Q₂
z: C₅
v: C₁
x: C₃
mon_lassociator I_{ V} (Q₁ (G x) (F₂ v))
  (Q₂ (H z) (G x))
· mon_rassociator I_{ V} (Q₁ (G x) (F₂ v))
    (Q₂ (H z) (G x))
· (enriched_from_arr E₂ (τ v)
   #⊗ identity (Q₁ (G x) (F₂ v)))
  #⊗ identity (Q₂ (H z) (G x)) =
(enriched_from_arr E₂ (τ v)
 #⊗ identity (Q₁ (G x) (F₂ v)))
#⊗ identity (Q₂ (H z) (G x))

  
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄, C₅, C₆: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
E₅: enrichment C₅ V
E₆: enrichment C₆ V
F₁, F₂: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF₁: functor_enrichment F₁ E₁ E₂
EF₂: functor_enrichment F₂ E₁ E₂
τ: F₂ ⟹ F₁
Hτ: nat_trans_enrichment τ EF₂ EF₁
G: C₃ ⟶ C₄
EG: functor_enrichment G E₃ E₄
H: C₅ ⟶ C₆
EH: functor_enrichment H E₅ E₆
P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₃
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₅
Q₁: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₄
Q₂: enriched_profunctor E₄ E₆
θ₁: enriched_profunctor_square EF₂ EG P₁ Q₁
θ₂: enriched_profunctor_square EG EH P₂ Q₂
z: C₅
v: C₁
x: C₃
identity (I_{ V} ⊗ Q₁ (G x) (F₂ v) ⊗ Q₂ (H z) (G x))
· (enriched_from_arr E₂ (τ v)
   #⊗ identity (Q₁ (G x) (F₂ v)))
  #⊗ identity (Q₂ (H z) (G x)) =
(enriched_from_arr E₂ (τ v)
 #⊗ identity (Q₁ (G x) (F₂ v)))
#⊗ identity (Q₂ (H z) (G x))

  apply id_left.
Qed.


V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄, C₅, C₆: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
E₅: enrichment C₅ V
E₆: enrichment C₆ V
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
G: C₃ ⟶ C₄
EG: functor_enrichment G E₃ E₄
H₁, H₂: C₅ ⟶ C₆
EH₁: functor_enrichment H₁ E₅ E₆
EH₂: functor_enrichment H₂ E₅ E₆
τ: H₂ ⟹ H₁
Hτ: nat_trans_enrichment τ EH₂ EH₁
P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₃
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₅
Q₁: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₄
Q₂: enriched_profunctor E₄ E₆
θ₁: enriched_profunctor_square EF EG P₁ Q₁
θ₂: enriched_profunctor_square EG EH₁ P₂ Q₂
dwhisker_enriched_profunctor_square Hτ
  (comp_v_enriched_profunctor_square θ₁ θ₂) =
comp_v_enriched_profunctor_square θ₁
  (dwhisker_enriched_profunctor_square Hτ θ₂)


V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄, C₅, C₆: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
E₅: enrichment C₅ V
E₆: enrichment C₆ V
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
G: C₃ ⟶ C₄
EG: functor_enrichment G E₃ E₄
H₁, H₂: C₅ ⟶ C₆
EH₁: functor_enrichment H₁ E₅ E₆
EH₂: functor_enrichment H₂ E₅ E₆
τ: H₂ ⟹ H₁
Hτ: nat_trans_enrichment τ EH₂ EH₁
P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₃
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₅
Q₁: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₄
Q₂: enriched_profunctor E₄ E₆
θ₁: enriched_profunctor_square EF EG P₁ Q₁
θ₂: enriched_profunctor_square EG EH₁ P₂ Q₂
dwhisker_enriched_profunctor_square Hτ
  (comp_v_enriched_profunctor_square θ₁ θ₂) =
comp_v_enriched_profunctor_square θ₁
  (dwhisker_enriched_profunctor_square Hτ θ₂)

  
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄, C₅, C₆: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
E₅: enrichment C₅ V
E₆: enrichment C₆ V
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
G: C₃ ⟶ C₄
EG: functor_enrichment G E₃ E₄
H₁, H₂: C₅ ⟶ C₆
EH₁: functor_enrichment H₁ E₅ E₆
EH₂: functor_enrichment H₂ E₅ E₆
τ: H₂ ⟹ H₁
Hτ: nat_trans_enrichment τ EH₂ EH₁
P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₃
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₅
Q₁: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₄
Q₂: enriched_profunctor E₄ E₆
θ₁: enriched_profunctor_square EF EG P₁ Q₁
θ₂: enriched_profunctor_square EG EH₁ P₂ Q₂
z: C₅
v: C₁
comp_v_enriched_profunctor_square_mor θ₁ θ₂ z v
· mon_linvunitor
    (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob Q₁ Q₂ (H₁ z) (F v))
· enriched_from_arr E₆ (τ z)
  #⊗ identity
       (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob Q₁ Q₂ (H₁ z) (F v))
· (identity (E₆ ⦃ H₂ z, H₁ z ⦄)
   #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_lmap Q₁ Q₂ (H₁ z)
        (H₂ z) (F v)
   · sym_mon_braiding V (E₆ ⦃ H₂ z, H₁ z ⦄)
       ((E₆ ⦃ H₂ z, H₁ z ⦄)
        ⊸ comp_enriched_profunctor_ob Q₁ Q₂ (H₂ z)
            (F v))
   · internal_eval (E₆ ⦃ H₂ z, H₁ z ⦄)
       (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob Q₁ Q₂ (H₂ z) (F v))) =
comp_v_enriched_profunctor_square_mor θ₁
  (dwhisker_enriched_profunctor_square Hτ θ₂) z v

  
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄, C₅, C₆: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
E₅: enrichment C₅ V
E₆: enrichment C₆ V
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
G: C₃ ⟶ C₄
EG: functor_enrichment G E₃ E₄
H₁, H₂: C₅ ⟶ C₆
EH₁: functor_enrichment H₁ E₅ E₆
EH₂: functor_enrichment H₂ E₅ E₆
τ: H₂ ⟹ H₁
Hτ: nat_trans_enrichment τ EH₂ EH₁
P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₃
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₅
Q₁: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₄
Q₂: enriched_profunctor E₄ E₆
θ₁: enriched_profunctor_square EF EG P₁ Q₁
θ₂: enriched_profunctor_square EG EH₁ P₂ Q₂
z: C₅
v: C₁
∏ y : C₃,
comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₁ P₂ z v y
· (comp_v_enriched_profunctor_square_mor θ₁ θ₂ z v
   · mon_linvunitor
       (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob Q₁ Q₂ (H₁ z) (F v))
   · enriched_from_arr E₆ (τ z)
     #⊗ identity
          (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob Q₁ Q₂ (H₁ z)
             (F v))
   · (identity (E₆ ⦃ H₂ z, H₁ z ⦄)
      #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_lmap Q₁ Q₂ (H₁ z)
           (H₂ z) (F v)
      · sym_mon_braiding V (E₆ ⦃ H₂ z, H₁ z ⦄)
          ((E₆ ⦃ H₂ z, H₁ z ⦄)
           ⊸ comp_enriched_profunctor_ob Q₁ Q₂ (H₂ z)
               (F v))
      · internal_eval (E₆ ⦃ H₂ z, H₁ z ⦄)
          (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob Q₁ Q₂ (H₂ z)
             (F v)))) =
comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₁ P₂ z v y
· comp_v_enriched_profunctor_square_mor θ₁
    (dwhisker_enriched_profunctor_square Hτ θ₂) z v

Q₂: enriched_profunctor E₄ E₆

θ₂: enriched_profunctor_square EG EH₁ P₂ Q₂
z: C₅
v: C₁
x: C₃
comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₁ P₂ z v x
· (comp_v_enriched_profunctor_square_mor θ₁ θ₂ z v
   · mon_linvunitor
       (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob Q₁ Q₂ (H₁ z) (F v))
   · enriched_from_arr E₆ (τ z)
     #⊗ identity
          (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob Q₁ Q₂ (H₁ z)
             (F v))
   · (identity (E₆ ⦃ H₂ z, H₁ z ⦄)
      #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_lmap Q₁ Q₂ (H₁ z)
           (H₂ z) (F v)
      · sym_mon_braiding V (E₆ ⦃ H₂ z, H₁ z ⦄)
          ((E₆ ⦃ H₂ z, H₁ z ⦄)
           ⊸ comp_enriched_profunctor_ob Q₁ Q₂ (H₂ z)
               (F v))
      · internal_eval (E₆ ⦃ H₂ z, H₁ z ⦄)
          (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob Q₁ Q₂ (H₂ z)
             (F v)))) =
comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₁ P₂ z v x
· comp_v_enriched_profunctor_square_mor θ₁
    (dwhisker_enriched_profunctor_square Hτ θ₂) z v

EH₂: functor_enrichment H₂ E₅ E₆

Q₂: enriched_profunctor E₄ E₆

θ₂: enriched_profunctor_square EG EH₁ P₂ Q₂
z: C₅
v: C₁
x: C₃
comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₁ P₂ z v x
· (comp_v_enriched_profunctor_square_mor θ₁ θ₂ z v
   · mon_linvunitor
       (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob Q₁ Q₂ (H₁ z) (F v))
   · enriched_from_arr E₆ (τ z)
     #⊗ identity
          (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob Q₁ Q₂ (H₁ z)
             (F v))
   · (identity (E₆ ⦃ H₂ z, H₁ z ⦄)
      #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_lmap Q₁ Q₂ (H₁ z)
           (H₂ z) (F v)
      · sym_mon_braiding V (E₆ ⦃ H₂ z, H₁ z ⦄)
          ((E₆ ⦃ H₂ z, H₁ z ⦄)
           ⊸ comp_enriched_profunctor_ob Q₁ Q₂ (H₂ z)
               (F v))
      · internal_eval (E₆ ⦃ H₂ z, H₁ z ⦄)
          (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob Q₁ Q₂ (H₂ z)
             (F v)))) = ?b
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄, C₅, C₆: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
E₅: enrichment C₅ V
E₆: enrichment C₆ V
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
G: C₃ ⟶ C₄
EG: functor_enrichment G E₃ E₄
H₁, H₂: C₅ ⟶ C₆
EH₁: functor_enrichment H₁ E₅ E₆
EH₂: functor_enrichment H₂ E₅ E₆
τ: H₂ ⟹ H₁
Hτ: nat_trans_enrichment τ EH₂ EH₁
P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₃
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₅
Q₁: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₄
Q₂: enriched_profunctor E₄ E₆
θ₁: enriched_profunctor_square EF EG P₁ Q₁
θ₂: enriched_profunctor_square EG EH₁ P₂ Q₂
z: C₅
v: C₁
x: C₃
?b =
comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₁ P₂ z v x
· comp_v_enriched_profunctor_square_mor θ₁
    (dwhisker_enriched_profunctor_square Hτ θ₂) z v

   · mon_linvunitor
       (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob Q₁ Q₂ (H₁ z) (F v))
   · enriched_from_arr E₆ (τ z)
     #⊗ identity
          (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob Q₁ Q₂ (H₁ z)

   · (identity (E₆ ⦃ H₂ z, H₁ z ⦄)
      #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_lmap Q₁ Q₂ (H₁ z)

      · sym_mon_braiding V (E₆ ⦃ H₂ z, H₁ z ⦄)
          ((E₆ ⦃ H₂ z, H₁ z ⦄)

H₁, H₂: C₅ ⟶ C₆
EH₁: functor_enrichment H₁ E₅ E₆
EH₂: functor_enrichment H₂ E₅ E₆
τ: H₂ ⟹ H₁
Hτ: nat_trans_enrichment τ EH₂ EH₁
P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₃
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₅
Q₁: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₄
Q₂: enriched_profunctor E₄ E₆
θ₁: enriched_profunctor_square EF EG P₁ Q₁
θ₂: enriched_profunctor_square EG EH₁ P₂ Q₂
z: C₅
v: C₁
x: C₃
comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₁ P₂ z v x
· comp_v_enriched_profunctor_square_mor θ₁ θ₂ z v
· mon_linvunitor
    (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob Q₁ Q₂ (H₁ z) (F v))
· enriched_from_arr E₆ (τ z)
  #⊗ identity
       (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob Q₁ Q₂ (H₁ z) (F v))
· identity (E₆ ⦃ H₂ z, H₁ z ⦄)
  #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_lmap Q₁ Q₂ (H₁ z) (H₂ z)
       (F v)
· sym_mon_braiding V (E₆ ⦃ H₂ z, H₁ z ⦄)
    ((E₆ ⦃ H₂ z, H₁ z ⦄)
     ⊸ comp_enriched_profunctor_ob Q₁ Q₂ (H₂ z) (F v))
· internal_eval (E₆ ⦃ H₂ z, H₁ z ⦄)
    (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob Q₁ Q₂ (H₂ z) (F v)) =
?b

θ₂: enriched_profunctor_square EG EH₁ P₂ Q₂

x: C₃
comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₁ P₂ z v x
· comp_v_enriched_profunctor_square_mor θ₁ θ₂ z v =

    apply comp_v_enriched_profunctor_square_mor_comm.

θ₁ x v #⊗ θ₂ z x
· comp_enriched_profunctor_in Q₁ Q₂ (H₁ z) (F v) (G x)
· mon_linvunitor
    (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob Q₁ Q₂ (H₁ z) (F v))
· enriched_from_arr E₆ (τ z)
  #⊗ identity
       (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob Q₁ Q₂ (H₁ z) (F v))
· identity (E₆ ⦃ H₂ z, H₁ z ⦄)
  #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_lmap Q₁ Q₂ (H₁ z) (H₂ z)

· sym_mon_braiding V (E₆ ⦃ H₂ z, H₁ z ⦄)

     ⊸ comp_enriched_profunctor_ob Q₁ Q₂ (H₂ z) (F v))

· mon_linvunitor

EH₂: functor_enrichment H₂ E₅ E₆

θ₂: enriched_profunctor_square EG EH₁ P₂ Q₂
z: C₅
v: C₁
x: C₃
θ₁ x v
#⊗ (θ₂ z x · mon_linvunitor (Q₂ (H₁ z) (G x))
    · enriched_from_arr E₆ (τ z)
      #⊗ identity (Q₂ (H₁ z) (G x))
    · lmap_e Q₂ (H₁ z) (H₂ z) (G x))
· comp_enriched_profunctor_in Q₁ Q₂ (H₂ z) (F v) (G x) =
θ₁ x v #⊗ θ₂ z x
· comp_enriched_profunctor_in Q₁ Q₂ (H₁ z) (F v) (G x)
· mon_linvunitor
    (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob Q₁ Q₂ (H₁ z) (F v))
· enriched_from_arr E₆ (τ z)
  #⊗ identity
       (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob Q₁ Q₂ (H₁ z) (F v))
· identity (E₆ ⦃ H₂ z, H₁ z ⦄)

       (F v)
· sym_mon_braiding V (E₆ ⦃ H₂ z, H₁ z ⦄)
    ((E₆ ⦃ H₂ z, H₁ z ⦄)
     ⊸ comp_enriched_profunctor_ob Q₁ Q₂ (H₂ z) (F v))

EH₂: functor_enrichment H₂ E₅ E₆

Q₂: enriched_profunctor E₄ E₆

θ₂: enriched_profunctor_square EG EH₁ P₂ Q₂
z: C₅
v: C₁
x: C₃
θ₁ x v
#⊗ (θ₂ z x
    · (mon_linvunitor (Q₂ (H₁ z) (G x))
       · (enriched_from_arr E₆ (τ z)
          #⊗ identity (Q₂ (H₁ z) (G x))
          · lmap_e Q₂ (H₁ z) (H₂ z) (G x))))
· comp_enriched_profunctor_in Q₁ Q₂ (H₂ z) (F v) (G x) =
θ₁ x v #⊗ θ₂ z x
· (comp_enriched_profunctor_in Q₁ Q₂ (H₁ z) (F v)
     (G x)
   · (mon_linvunitor
        (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob Q₁ Q₂ (H₁ z)
           (F v))
      · (enriched_from_arr E₆ (τ z)
         #⊗ identity
              (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob Q₁ Q₂
                 (H₁ z) (F v))
         · (identity (E₆ ⦃ H₂ z, H₁ z ⦄)
            #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_lmap Q₁ Q₂
                 (H₁ z) (H₂ z) (F v)
            · (sym_mon_braiding V (E₆ ⦃ H₂ z, H₁ z ⦄)
                 ((E₆ ⦃ H₂ z, H₁ z ⦄)
                  ⊸ comp_enriched_profunctor_ob Q₁ Q₂
                      (H₂ z) (F v))
               · internal_eval (E₆ ⦃ H₂ z, H₁ z ⦄)
                   (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob Q₁ Q₂
                      (H₂ z) (F v)))))))

       (G x)) =
θ₁ x v #⊗ θ₂ z x
· (comp_enriched_profunctor_in Q₁ Q₂ (H₁ z) (F v)
     (G x)
   · (mon_linvunitor
        (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob Q₁ Q₂ (H₁ z)
           (F v))
      · (enriched_from_arr E₆ (τ z)
         #⊗ identity
              (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob Q₁ Q₂
                 (H₁ z) (F v))
         · (identity (E₆ ⦃ H₂ z, H₁ z ⦄)
            #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_lmap Q₁ Q₂
                 (H₁ z) (H₂ z) (F v)
            · (sym_mon_braiding V (E₆ ⦃ H₂ z, H₁ z ⦄)
                 ((E₆ ⦃ H₂ z, H₁ z ⦄)
                  ⊸ comp_enriched_profunctor_ob Q₁ Q₂
                      (H₂ z) (F v))
               · internal_eval (E₆ ⦃ H₂ z, H₁ z ⦄)
                   (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob Q₁ Q₂
                      (H₂ z) (F v)))))))

  
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄, C₅, C₆: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
E₅: enrichment C₅ V
E₆: enrichment C₆ V
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
G: C₃ ⟶ C₄
EG: functor_enrichment G E₃ E₄
H₁, H₂: C₅ ⟶ C₆
EH₁: functor_enrichment H₁ E₅ E₆
EH₂: functor_enrichment H₂ E₅ E₆
τ: H₂ ⟹ H₁
Hτ: nat_trans_enrichment τ EH₂ EH₁
P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₃
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₅
Q₁: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₄
Q₂: enriched_profunctor E₄ E₆
θ₁: enriched_profunctor_square EF EG P₁ Q₁
θ₂: enriched_profunctor_square EG EH₁ P₂ Q₂
z: C₅
v: C₁
x: C₃
identity (Q₁ (G x) (F v))
#⊗ (mon_linvunitor (Q₂ (H₁ z) (G x))
    · (enriched_from_arr E₆ (τ z)
       #⊗ identity (Q₂ (H₁ z) (G x))
       · lmap_e Q₂ (H₁ z) (H₂ z) (G x)))
· comp_enriched_profunctor_in Q₁ Q₂ (H₂ z) (F v) (G x) =
comp_enriched_profunctor_in Q₁ Q₂ (H₁ z) (F v) (G x)
· (mon_linvunitor
     (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob Q₁ Q₂ (H₁ z) (F v))
   · (enriched_from_arr E₆ (τ z)
      #⊗ identity
           (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob Q₁ Q₂ (H₁ z)
              (F v))
      · (identity (E₆ ⦃ H₂ z, H₁ z ⦄)
         #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_lmap Q₁ Q₂ (H₁ z)
              (H₂ z) (F v)
         · (sym_mon_braiding V (E₆ ⦃ H₂ z, H₁ z ⦄)
              ((E₆ ⦃ H₂ z, H₁ z ⦄)
               ⊸ comp_enriched_profunctor_ob Q₁ Q₂
                   (H₂ z) (F v))
            · internal_eval (E₆ ⦃ H₂ z, H₁ z ⦄)
                (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob Q₁ Q₂
                   (H₂ z) (F v))))))

EH₂: functor_enrichment H₂ E₅ E₆

Q₂: enriched_profunctor E₄ E₆

θ₂: enriched_profunctor_square EG EH₁ P₂ Q₂
z: C₅
v: C₁
x: C₃
comp_enriched_profunctor_in Q₁ Q₂ (H₁ z) (F v) (G x)
· (mon_linvunitor
     (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob Q₁ Q₂ (H₁ z) (F v))
   · (enriched_from_arr E₆ (τ z)
      #⊗ identity
           (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob Q₁ Q₂ (H₁ z)
              (F v))
      · (identity (E₆ ⦃ H₂ z, H₁ z ⦄)
         #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_lmap Q₁ Q₂ (H₁ z)
              (H₂ z) (F v)
         · (sym_mon_braiding V (E₆ ⦃ H₂ z, H₁ z ⦄)
              ((E₆ ⦃ H₂ z, H₁ z ⦄)
               ⊸ comp_enriched_profunctor_ob Q₁ Q₂
                   (H₂ z) (F v))
            · internal_eval (E₆ ⦃ H₂ z, H₁ z ⦄)
                (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob Q₁ Q₂
                   (H₂ z) (F v)))))) =
identity (Q₁ (G x) (F v))
#⊗ (mon_linvunitor (Q₂ (H₁ z) (G x))
    · (enriched_from_arr E₆ (τ z)
       #⊗ identity (Q₂ (H₁ z) (G x))
       · lmap_e Q₂ (H₁ z) (H₂ z) (G x)))
· comp_enriched_profunctor_in Q₁ Q₂ (H₂ z) (F v) (G x)

comp_enriched_profunctor_in Q₁ Q₂ (H₁ z) (F v) (G x)
· (mon_linvunitor
     (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob Q₁ Q₂ (H₁ z) (F v))
   · (enriched_from_arr E₆ (τ z)
      #⊗ identity
           (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob Q₁ Q₂ (H₁ z)
              (F v))
      · (identity (E₆ ⦃ H₂ z, H₁ z ⦄)
         #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_lmap Q₁ Q₂ (H₁ z)

            · internal_eval (E₆ ⦃ H₂ z, H₁ z ⦄)
                (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob Q₁ Q₂
                   (H₂ z) (F v)))))) = ?b

θ₂: enriched_profunctor_square EG EH₁ P₂ Q₂
z: C₅
v: C₁
x: C₃
?b =
identity (Q₁ (G x) (F v))
#⊗ (mon_linvunitor (Q₂ (H₁ z) (G x))
    · (enriched_from_arr E₆ (τ z)
       #⊗ identity (Q₂ (H₁ z) (G x))
       · lmap_e Q₂ (H₁ z) (H₂ z) (G x)))
· comp_enriched_profunctor_in Q₁ Q₂ (H₂ z) (F v) (G x)

· (mon_linvunitor
     (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob Q₁ Q₂ (H₁ z) (F v))
   · (enriched_from_arr E₆ (τ z)
      #⊗ identity
           (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob Q₁ Q₂ (H₁ z)
              (F v))
      · (identity (E₆ ⦃ H₂ z, H₁ z ⦄)
         #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_lmap Q₁ Q₂ (H₁ z)

θ₂: enriched_profunctor_square EG EH₁ P₂ Q₂
z: C₅
v: C₁
x: C₃
comp_enriched_profunctor_in Q₁ Q₂ (H₁ z) (F v) (G x)
· mon_linvunitor
    (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob Q₁ Q₂ (H₁ z) (F v))
· enriched_from_arr E₆ (τ z)
  #⊗ identity
       (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob Q₁ Q₂ (H₁ z) (F v))
· identity (E₆ ⦃ H₂ z, H₁ z ⦄)
  #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_lmap Q₁ Q₂ (H₁ z) (H₂ z)
       (F v)
· sym_mon_braiding V (E₆ ⦃ H₂ z, H₁ z ⦄)

     ⊸ comp_enriched_profunctor_ob Q₁ Q₂ (H₂ z) (F v))

v: C₁
x: C₃
mon_linvunitor (Q₁ (G x) (F v) ⊗ Q₂ (H₁ z) (G x))
· identity I_{ V}
  #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_in Q₁ Q₂ (H₁ z) (F v)
       (G x)
· enriched_from_arr E₆ (τ z)
  #⊗ identity
       (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob Q₁ Q₂ (H₁ z) (F v))
· identity (E₆ ⦃ H₂ z, H₁ z ⦄)
  #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_lmap Q₁ Q₂ (H₁ z) (H₂ z)

· internal_eval (E₆ ⦃ H₂ z, H₁ z ⦄)
    (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob Q₁ Q₂ (H₂ z) (F v)) =
