z: C₅
v: C₁
x: C₃
enriched_from_arr E₆ (τ z)
#⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_in Q₁ Q₂ (H₁ z) (F v)
     (G x)
· identity (E₆ ⦃ H₂ z, H₁ z ⦄)
  #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_lmap Q₁ Q₂ (H₁ z) (H₂ z)
       (F v)
· sym_mon_braiding V (E₆ ⦃ H₂ z, H₁ z ⦄)
    ((E₆ ⦃ H₂ z, H₁ z ⦄)
     ⊸ comp_enriched_profunctor_ob Q₁ Q₂ (H₂ z) (F v))
· internal_eval (E₆ ⦃ H₂ z, H₁ z ⦄)
    (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob Q₁ Q₂ (H₂ z) (F v)) =
?t2

  (Q₁ (G x) (F v) ⊗ Q₂ (H₁ z) (G x))
· ((comp_enriched_profunctor_in Q₁ Q₂ (H₁ z) (F v)

EH₂: functor_enrichment H₂ E₅ E₆

P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₃
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₅

Q₂: enriched_profunctor E₄ E₆

θ₂: enriched_profunctor_square EG EH₁ P₂ Q₂
z: C₅
v: C₁
x: C₃
(comp_enriched_profunctor_in Q₁ Q₂ (H₁ z) (F v) (G x)
 · comp_enriched_profunctor_lmap Q₁ Q₂ (H₁ z) (H₂ z)
     (F v)) #⊗ identity (E₆ ⦃ H₂ z, H₁ z ⦄)
· internal_eval (E₆ ⦃ H₂ z, H₁ z ⦄)
    (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob Q₁ Q₂ (H₂ z) (F v)) =
?t2

    apply comp_enriched_profunctor_lmap_comm.
  
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄, C₅, C₆: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
E₅: enrichment C₅ V
E₆: enrichment C₆ V
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
G: C₃ ⟶ C₄
EG: functor_enrichment G E₃ E₄
H₁, H₂: C₅ ⟶ C₆
EH₁: functor_enrichment H₁ E₅ E₆
EH₂: functor_enrichment H₂ E₅ E₆
τ: H₂ ⟹ H₁
Hτ: nat_trans_enrichment τ EH₂ EH₁
P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₃
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₅
Q₁: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₄
Q₂: enriched_profunctor E₄ E₆
θ₁: enriched_profunctor_square EF EG P₁ Q₁
θ₂: enriched_profunctor_square EG EH₁ P₂ Q₂
z: C₅
v: C₁
x: C₃
mon_linvunitor (Q₁ (G x) (F v) ⊗ Q₂ (H₁ z) (G x))
· (enriched_from_arr E₆ (τ z)
   #⊗ identity (Q₁ (G x) (F v) ⊗ Q₂ (H₁ z) (G x))
   · (sym_mon_braiding V (E₆ ⦃ H₂ z, H₁ z ⦄)
        (Q₁ (G x) (F v) ⊗ Q₂ (H₁ z) (G x))
      · (sym_mon_braiding V
           (Q₁ (G x) (F v) ⊗ Q₂ (H₁ z) (G x))
           (E₆ ⦃ H₂ z, H₁ z ⦄)
         · comp_enriched_profunctor_lmap_mor Q₁ Q₂
             (H₁ z) (H₂ z) (F v) (G x)))) =
identity (Q₁ (G x) (F v))
#⊗ (mon_linvunitor (Q₂ (H₁ z) (G x))
    · (enriched_from_arr E₆ (τ z)
       #⊗ identity (Q₂ (H₁ z) (G x))
       · lmap_e Q₂ (H₁ z) (H₂ z) (G x)))
· comp_enriched_profunctor_in Q₁ Q₂ (H₂ z) (F v) (G x)

G: C₃ ⟶ C₄

EH₂: functor_enrichment H₂ E₅ E₆
τ: H₂ ⟹ H₁
Hτ: nat_trans_enrichment τ EH₂ EH₁

P₂: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₅
Q₁: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₄
Q₂: enriched_profunctor E₄ E₆
θ₁: enriched_profunctor_square EF EG P₁ Q₁
θ₂: enriched_profunctor_square EG EH₁ P₂ Q₂
z: C₅
v: C₁
x: C₃
mon_linvunitor (Q₁ (G x) (F v) ⊗ Q₂ (H₁ z) (G x))
· (enriched_from_arr E₆ (τ z)
   #⊗ identity (Q₁ (G x) (F v) ⊗ Q₂ (H₁ z) (G x))
   · (sym_mon_braiding V (E₆ ⦃ H₂ z, H₁ z ⦄)
        (Q₁ (G x) (F v) ⊗ Q₂ (H₁ z) (G x))
      · (sym_mon_braiding V
           (Q₁ (G x) (F v) ⊗ Q₂ (H₁ z) (G x))
           (E₆ ⦃ H₂ z, H₁ z ⦄)
         · comp_enriched_profunctor_lmap_mor Q₁ Q₂
             (H₁ z) (H₂ z) (F v) (G x)))) = ?b
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄, C₅, C₆: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
E₅: enrichment C₅ V
E₆: enrichment C₆ V
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
G: C₃ ⟶ C₄
EG: functor_enrichment G E₃ E₄
H₁, H₂: C₅ ⟶ C₆
EH₁: functor_enrichment H₁ E₅ E₆
EH₂: functor_enrichment H₂ E₅ E₆
τ: H₂ ⟹ H₁
Hτ: nat_trans_enrichment τ EH₂ EH₁
P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₃
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₅
Q₁: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₄
Q₂: enriched_profunctor E₄ E₆
θ₁: enriched_profunctor_square EF EG P₁ Q₁
θ₂: enriched_profunctor_square EG EH₁ P₂ Q₂
z: C₅
v: C₁
x: C₃
?b =
identity (Q₁ (G x) (F v))
#⊗ (mon_linvunitor (Q₂ (H₁ z) (G x))
    · (enriched_from_arr E₆ (τ z)
       #⊗ identity (Q₂ (H₁ z) (G x))
       · lmap_e Q₂ (H₁ z) (H₂ z) (G x)))
· comp_enriched_profunctor_in Q₁ Q₂ (H₂ z) (F v) (G x)

· (enriched_from_arr E₆ (τ z)
   #⊗ identity (Q₁ (G x) (F v) ⊗ Q₂ (H₁ z) (G x))
   · (sym_mon_braiding V (E₆ ⦃ H₂ z, H₁ z ⦄)

      · (sym_mon_braiding V

           (E₆ ⦃ H₂ z, H₁ z ⦄)
         · comp_enriched_profunctor_lmap_mor Q₁ Q₂
             (H₁ z) (H₂ z) (F v) (G x)))) = ?b

    
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄, C₅, C₆: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
E₅: enrichment C₅ V
E₆: enrichment C₆ V
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
G: C₃ ⟶ C₄
EG: functor_enrichment G E₃ E₄
H₁, H₂: C₅ ⟶ C₆
EH₁: functor_enrichment H₁ E₅ E₆
EH₂: functor_enrichment H₂ E₅ E₆
τ: H₂ ⟹ H₁
Hτ: nat_trans_enrichment τ EH₂ EH₁
P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₃
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₅
Q₁: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₄
Q₂: enriched_profunctor E₄ E₆
θ₁: enriched_profunctor_square EF EG P₁ Q₁
θ₂: enriched_profunctor_square EG EH₁ P₂ Q₂
z: C₅
v: C₁
x: C₃
sym_mon_braiding V (E₆ ⦃ H₂ z, H₁ z ⦄)
  (Q₁ (G x) (F v) ⊗ Q₂ (H₁ z) (G x))
· (sym_mon_braiding V
     (Q₁ (G x) (F v) ⊗ Q₂ (H₁ z) (G x))
     (E₆ ⦃ H₂ z, H₁ z ⦄)
   · comp_enriched_profunctor_lmap_mor Q₁ Q₂ (H₁ z)
       (H₂ z) (F v) (G x)) = ?t2

E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V

E₆: enrichment C₆ V
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
G: C₃ ⟶ C₄
EG: functor_enrichment G E₃ E₄

EH₁: functor_enrichment H₁ E₅ E₆
EH₂: functor_enrichment H₂ E₅ E₆
τ: H₂ ⟹ H₁
Hτ: nat_trans_enrichment τ EH₂ EH₁
P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₃
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₅
Q₁: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₄
Q₂: enriched_profunctor E₄ E₆
θ₁: enriched_profunctor_square EF EG P₁ Q₁
θ₂: enriched_profunctor_square EG EH₁ P₂ Q₂
z: C₅
v: C₁
x: C₃
sym_mon_braiding V (E₆ ⦃ H₂ z, H₁ z ⦄)
  (Q₁ (G x) (F v) ⊗ Q₂ (H₁ z) (G x))
· sym_mon_braiding V
    (Q₁ (G x) (F v) ⊗ Q₂ (H₁ z) (G x))
    (E₆ ⦃ H₂ z, H₁ z ⦄)
· comp_enriched_profunctor_lmap_mor Q₁ Q₂ (H₁ z)
    (H₂ z) (F v) (G x) = ?t2

    
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄, C₅, C₆: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
E₅: enrichment C₅ V
E₆: enrichment C₆ V
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
G: C₃ ⟶ C₄
EG: functor_enrichment G E₃ E₄
H₁, H₂: C₅ ⟶ C₆
EH₁: functor_enrichment H₁ E₅ E₆
EH₂: functor_enrichment H₂ E₅ E₆
τ: H₂ ⟹ H₁
Hτ: nat_trans_enrichment τ EH₂ EH₁
P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₃
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₅
Q₁: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₄
Q₂: enriched_profunctor E₄ E₆
θ₁: enriched_profunctor_square EF EG P₁ Q₁
θ₂: enriched_profunctor_square EG EH₁ P₂ Q₂
z: C₅
v: C₁
x: C₃
identity
  ((E₆ ⦃ H₂ z, H₁ z ⦄)
   ⊗ (Q₁ (G x) (F v) ⊗ Q₂ (H₁ z) (G x)))
· comp_enriched_profunctor_lmap_mor Q₁ Q₂ (H₁ z)
    (H₂ z) (F v) (G x) = ?t2

    
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄, C₅, C₆: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
E₅: enrichment C₅ V
E₆: enrichment C₆ V
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
G: C₃ ⟶ C₄
EG: functor_enrichment G E₃ E₄
H₁, H₂: C₅ ⟶ C₆
EH₁: functor_enrichment H₁ E₅ E₆
EH₂: functor_enrichment H₂ E₅ E₆
τ: H₂ ⟹ H₁
Hτ: nat_trans_enrichment τ EH₂ EH₁
P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₃
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₅
Q₁: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₄
Q₂: enriched_profunctor E₄ E₆
θ₁: enriched_profunctor_square EF EG P₁ Q₁
θ₂: enriched_profunctor_square EG EH₁ P₂ Q₂
z: C₅
v: C₁
x: C₃
identity
  ((E₆ ⦃ H₂ z, H₁ z ⦄)
   ⊗ (Q₁ (G x) (F v) ⊗ Q₂ (H₁ z) (G x)))
· (sym_mon_braiding V (E₆ ⦃ H₂ z, H₁ z ⦄)
     (Q₁ (G x) (F v) ⊗ Q₂ (H₁ z) (G x))
   · mon_lassociator (Q₁ (G x) (F v))
       (Q₂ (H₁ z) (G x)) (E₆ ⦃ H₂ z, H₁ z ⦄)
   · identity (Q₁ (G x) (F v))
     #⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V (Q₂ (H₁ z) (G x))
           (E₆ ⦃ H₂ z, H₁ z ⦄)
         · lmap_e Q₂ (H₁ z) (H₂ z) (G x))
   · comp_enriched_profunctor_in Q₁ Q₂ (H₂ z) (F v)
       (G x)) = ?t2

    apply id_left.
  
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄, C₅, C₆: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
E₅: enrichment C₅ V
E₆: enrichment C₆ V
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
G: C₃ ⟶ C₄
EG: functor_enrichment G E₃ E₄
H₁, H₂: C₅ ⟶ C₆
EH₁: functor_enrichment H₁ E₅ E₆
EH₂: functor_enrichment H₂ E₅ E₆
τ: H₂ ⟹ H₁
Hτ: nat_trans_enrichment τ EH₂ EH₁
P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₃
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₅
Q₁: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₄
Q₂: enriched_profunctor E₄ E₆
θ₁: enriched_profunctor_square EF EG P₁ Q₁
θ₂: enriched_profunctor_square EG EH₁ P₂ Q₂
z: C₅
v: C₁
x: C₃
mon_linvunitor (Q₁ (G x) (F v) ⊗ Q₂ (H₁ z) (G x))
· (enriched_from_arr E₆ (τ z)
   #⊗ identity (Q₁ (G x) (F v) ⊗ Q₂ (H₁ z) (G x))
   · (sym_mon_braiding V (E₆ ⦃ H₂ z, H₁ z ⦄)
        (Q₁ (G x) (F v) ⊗ Q₂ (H₁ z) (G x))
      · mon_lassociator (Q₁ (G x) (F v))
          (Q₂ (H₁ z) (G x)) (E₆ ⦃ H₂ z, H₁ z ⦄)
      · identity (Q₁ (G x) (F v))
        #⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V (Q₂ (H₁ z) (G x))
              (E₆ ⦃ H₂ z, H₁ z ⦄)
            · lmap_e Q₂ (H₁ z) (H₂ z) (G x))
      · comp_enriched_profunctor_in Q₁ Q₂ (H₂ z) (F v)
          (G x))) =
identity (Q₁ (G x) (F v))
#⊗ (mon_linvunitor (Q₂ (H₁ z) (G x))
    · (enriched_from_arr E₆ (τ z)
       #⊗ identity (Q₂ (H₁ z) (G x))
       · lmap_e Q₂ (H₁ z) (H₂ z) (G x)))
· comp_enriched_profunctor_in Q₁ Q₂ (H₂ z) (F v) (G x)

EH₂: functor_enrichment H₂ E₅ E₆
τ: H₂ ⟹ H₁

P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₃
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₅
Q₁: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₄
Q₂: enriched_profunctor E₄ E₆
θ₁: enriched_profunctor_square EF EG P₁ Q₁
θ₂: enriched_profunctor_square EG EH₁ P₂ Q₂
z: C₅
v: C₁
x: C₃
mon_linvunitor (Q₁ (G x) (F v) ⊗ Q₂ (H₁ z) (G x))
· (enriched_from_arr E₆ (τ z)
   #⊗ identity (Q₁ (G x) (F v) ⊗ Q₂ (H₁ z) (G x))
   · (sym_mon_braiding V (E₆ ⦃ H₂ z, H₁ z ⦄)
        (Q₁ (G x) (F v) ⊗ Q₂ (H₁ z) (G x))
      · mon_lassociator (Q₁ (G x) (F v))
          (Q₂ (H₁ z) (G x)) (E₆ ⦃ H₂ z, H₁ z ⦄)
      · (identity (Q₁ (G x) (F v))
         #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (Q₂ (H₁ z) (G x))
              (E₆ ⦃ H₂ z, H₁ z ⦄)
         · identity (Q₁ (G x) (F v))
           #⊗ lmap_e Q₂ (H₁ z) (H₂ z) (G x))
      · comp_enriched_profunctor_in Q₁ Q₂ (H₂ z) (F v)
          (G x))) =
identity (Q₁ (G x) (F v))
#⊗ mon_linvunitor (Q₂ (H₁ z) (G x))
· (identity (Q₁ (G x) (F v))
   #⊗ (enriched_from_arr E₆ (τ z)
       #⊗ identity (Q₂ (H₁ z) (G x)))
   · identity (Q₁ (G x) (F v))
     #⊗ lmap_e Q₂ (H₁ z) (H₂ z) (G x))
· comp_enriched_profunctor_in Q₁ Q₂ (H₂ z) (F v) (G x)

EH₂: functor_enrichment H₂ E₅ E₆

P₂: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₅

θ₂: enriched_profunctor_square EG EH₁ P₂ Q₂
z: C₅
v: C₁
x: C₃
mon_linvunitor (Q₁ (G x) (F v) ⊗ Q₂ (H₁ z) (G x))
· enriched_from_arr E₆ (τ z)
  #⊗ identity (Q₁ (G x) (F v) ⊗ Q₂ (H₁ z) (G x))
· sym_mon_braiding V (E₆ ⦃ H₂ z, H₁ z ⦄)
    (Q₁ (G x) (F v) ⊗ Q₂ (H₁ z) (G x))
· mon_lassociator (Q₁ (G x) (F v)) (Q₂ (H₁ z) (G x))
    (E₆ ⦃ H₂ z, H₁ z ⦄)
· identity (Q₁ (G x) (F v))
  #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (Q₂ (H₁ z) (G x))
       (E₆ ⦃ H₂ z, H₁ z ⦄)
· identity (Q₁ (G x) (F v))
  #⊗ lmap_e Q₂ (H₁ z) (H₂ z) (G x)
· comp_enriched_profunctor_in Q₁ Q₂ (H₂ z) (F v) (G x) =
identity (Q₁ (G x) (F v))
#⊗ mon_linvunitor (Q₂ (H₁ z) (G x))
· identity (Q₁ (G x) (F v))
  #⊗ (enriched_from_arr E₆ (τ z)
      #⊗ identity (Q₂ (H₁ z) (G x)))
· identity (Q₁ (G x) (F v))
  #⊗ lmap_e Q₂ (H₁ z) (H₂ z) (G x)
· comp_enriched_profunctor_in Q₁ Q₂ (H₂ z) (F v) (G x)

EH₂: functor_enrichment H₂ E₅ E₆

θ₂: enriched_profunctor_square EG EH₁ P₂ Q₂
z: C₅
v: C₁
x: C₃
mon_linvunitor (Q₁ (G x) (F v) ⊗ Q₂ (H₁ z) (G x))
· enriched_from_arr E₆ (τ z)
  #⊗ identity (Q₁ (G x) (F v) ⊗ Q₂ (H₁ z) (G x))
· sym_mon_braiding V (E₆ ⦃ H₂ z, H₁ z ⦄)
    (Q₁ (G x) (F v) ⊗ Q₂ (H₁ z) (G x))
· mon_lassociator (Q₁ (G x) (F v)) (Q₂ (H₁ z) (G x))
    (E₆ ⦃ H₂ z, H₁ z ⦄)
· identity (Q₁ (G x) (F v))
  #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (Q₂ (H₁ z) (G x))
       (E₆ ⦃ H₂ z, H₁ z ⦄) =
identity (Q₁ (G x) (F v))
#⊗ mon_linvunitor (Q₂ (H₁ z) (G x))
· identity (Q₁ (G x) (F v))
  #⊗ (enriched_from_arr E₆ (τ z)
      #⊗ identity (Q₂ (H₁ z) (G x)))

C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄, C₅, C₆: category

F: C₁ ⟶ C₂

EH₂: functor_enrichment H₂ E₅ E₆
τ: H₂ ⟹ H₁
Hτ: nat_trans_enrichment τ EH₂ EH₁

P₂: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₅
Q₁: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₄
Q₂: enriched_profunctor E₄ E₆
θ₁: enriched_profunctor_square EF EG P₁ Q₁
θ₂: enriched_profunctor_square EG EH₁ P₂ Q₂
z: C₅
v: C₁
x: C₃
mon_linvunitor (Q₁ (G x) (F v))
#⊗ identity (Q₂ (H₁ z) (G x))
· mon_lassociator I_{ V} (Q₁ (G x) (F v))
    (Q₂ (H₁ z) (G x))
· enriched_from_arr E₆ (τ z)
  #⊗ identity (Q₁ (G x) (F v) ⊗ Q₂ (H₁ z) (G x))
· sym_mon_braiding V (E₆ ⦃ H₂ z, H₁ z ⦄)
    (Q₁ (G x) (F v) ⊗ Q₂ (H₁ z) (G x))
· mon_lassociator (Q₁ (G x) (F v)) (Q₂ (H₁ z) (G x))
    (E₆ ⦃ H₂ z, H₁ z ⦄)
· identity (Q₁ (G x) (F v))
  #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (Q₂ (H₁ z) (G x))
       (E₆ ⦃ H₂ z, H₁ z ⦄) =
identity (Q₁ (G x) (F v))
#⊗ mon_linvunitor (Q₂ (H₁ z) (G x))
· identity (Q₁ (G x) (F v))
  #⊗ (enriched_from_arr E₆ (τ z)
      #⊗ identity (Q₂ (H₁ z) (G x)))

F: C₁ ⟶ C₂

EH₁: functor_enrichment H₁ E₅ E₆
EH₂: functor_enrichment H₂ E₅ E₆

P₂: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₅
Q₁: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₄
Q₂: enriched_profunctor E₄ E₆
θ₁: enriched_profunctor_square EF EG P₁ Q₁
θ₂: enriched_profunctor_square EG EH₁ P₂ Q₂
z: C₅
v: C₁
x: C₃
mon_linvunitor (Q₁ (G x) (F v))
#⊗ identity (Q₂ (H₁ z) (G x))
· mon_lassociator I_{ V} (Q₁ (G x) (F v))
    (Q₂ (H₁ z) (G x))
· enriched_from_arr E₆ (τ z)
  #⊗ identity (Q₁ (G x) (F v) ⊗ Q₂ (H₁ z) (G x))
· sym_mon_braiding V (E₆ ⦃ H₂ z, H₁ z ⦄)
    (Q₁ (G x) (F v) ⊗ Q₂ (H₁ z) (G x))
· mon_lassociator (Q₁ (G x) (F v)) (Q₂ (H₁ z) (G x))
    (E₆ ⦃ H₂ z, H₁ z ⦄)
· identity (Q₁ (G x) (F v))
  #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (Q₂ (H₁ z) (G x))
       (E₆ ⦃ H₂ z, H₁ z ⦄) = ?b
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄, C₅, C₆: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
E₅: enrichment C₅ V
E₆: enrichment C₆ V
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
G: C₃ ⟶ C₄
EG: functor_enrichment G E₃ E₄
H₁, H₂: C₅ ⟶ C₆
EH₁: functor_enrichment H₁ E₅ E₆
EH₂: functor_enrichment H₂ E₅ E₆
τ: H₂ ⟹ H₁
Hτ: nat_trans_enrichment τ EH₂ EH₁

P₂: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₅
Q₁: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₄
Q₂: enriched_profunctor E₄ E₆
θ₁: enriched_profunctor_square EF EG P₁ Q₁
θ₂: enriched_profunctor_square EG EH₁ P₂ Q₂
z: C₅
v: C₁
x: C₃
?b =
identity (Q₁ (G x) (F v))
#⊗ mon_linvunitor (Q₂ (H₁ z) (G x))
· identity (Q₁ (G x) (F v))
  #⊗ (enriched_from_arr E₆ (τ z)
      #⊗ identity (Q₂ (H₁ z) (G x)))

τ: H₂ ⟹ H₁
Hτ: nat_trans_enrichment τ EH₂ EH₁
P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₃
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₅
Q₁: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₄
Q₂: enriched_profunctor E₄ E₆
θ₁: enriched_profunctor_square EF EG P₁ Q₁
θ₂: enriched_profunctor_square EG EH₁ P₂ Q₂
z: C₅
v: C₁
x: C₃
mon_linvunitor (Q₁ (G x) (F v))
#⊗ identity (Q₂ (H₁ z) (G x))
· mon_lassociator I_{ V} (Q₁ (G x) (F v))
    (Q₂ (H₁ z) (G x))
· enriched_from_arr E₆ (τ z)
  #⊗ identity (Q₁ (G x) (F v) ⊗ Q₂ (H₁ z) (G x))
· sym_mon_braiding V (E₆ ⦃ H₂ z, H₁ z ⦄)
    (Q₁ (G x) (F v) ⊗ Q₂ (H₁ z) (G x))
· mon_lassociator (Q₁ (G x) (F v)) (Q₂ (H₁ z) (G x))
    (E₆ ⦃ H₂ z, H₁ z ⦄)
· identity (Q₁ (G x) (F v))
  #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (Q₂ (H₁ z) (G x))
       (E₆ ⦃ H₂ z, H₁ z ⦄) = ?b

z: C₅

mon_linvunitor (Q₁ (G x) (F v))
#⊗ identity (Q₂ (H₁ z) (G x))
· (mon_lassociator I_{ V} (Q₁ (G x) (F v))
     (Q₂ (H₁ z) (G x))
   · (enriched_from_arr E₆ (τ z)
      #⊗ identity (Q₁ (G x) (F v) ⊗ Q₂ (H₁ z) (G x))
      · (sym_mon_braiding V (E₆ ⦃ H₂ z, H₁ z ⦄)

         · (mon_lassociator (Q₁ (G x) (F v))

            · identity (Q₁ (G x) (F v))

                   (E₆ ⦃ H₂ z, H₁ z ⦄))))) = ?b

θ₂: enriched_profunctor_square EG EH₁ P₂ Q₂
z: C₅
v: C₁
x: C₃
sym_mon_braiding V (E₆ ⦃ H₂ z, H₁ z ⦄)
  (Q₁ (G x) (F v)) #⊗ identity (Q₂ (H₁ z) (G x))
· (mon_lassociator (Q₁ (G x) (F v))
     (E₆ ⦃ H₂ z, H₁ z ⦄) (Q₂ (H₁ z) (G x))
   · identity (Q₁ (G x) (F v))
     #⊗ identity
          ((E₆ ⦃ H₂ z, H₁ z ⦄) ⊗ Q₂ (H₁ z) (G x))) =
?t2

  (Q₁ (G x) (F v)) #⊗ identity (Q₂ (H₁ z) (G x))
· (mon_lassociator (Q₁ (G x) (F v))

   · identity
       (Q₁ (G x) (F v)

v: C₁

  (Q₁ (G x) (F v)) #⊗ identity (Q₂ (H₁ z) (G x))

    (Q₂ (H₁ z) (G x)) = ?t2

C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄, C₅, C₆: category

E₂: enrichment C₂ V

G: C₃ ⟶ C₄

EH₂: functor_enrichment H₂ E₅ E₆

P₂: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₅

Q₂: enriched_profunctor E₄ E₆

θ₂: enriched_profunctor_square EG EH₁ P₂ Q₂
z: C₅
v: C₁
x: C₃
mon_linvunitor (Q₁ (G x) (F v))
#⊗ identity (Q₂ (H₁ z) (G x))
· ((enriched_from_arr E₆ (τ z)
    #⊗ identity (Q₁ (G x) (F v)))
   #⊗ identity (Q₂ (H₁ z) (G x))
   · (sym_mon_braiding V (E₆ ⦃ H₂ z, H₁ z ⦄)
        (Q₁ (G x) (F v)) #⊗ identity (Q₂ (H₁ z) (G x))
      · mon_lassociator (Q₁ (G x) (F v))
          (E₆ ⦃ H₂ z, H₁ z ⦄) (Q₂ (H₁ z) (G x)))) =
identity (Q₁ (G x) (F v))
#⊗ mon_linvunitor (Q₂ (H₁ z) (G x))
· identity (Q₁ (G x) (F v))
  #⊗ (enriched_from_arr E₆ (τ z)
      #⊗ identity (Q₂ (H₁ z) (G x)))

E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
E₅: enrichment C₅ V
E₆: enrichment C₆ V
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
G: C₃ ⟶ C₄
EG: functor_enrichment G E₃ E₄
H₁, H₂: C₅ ⟶ C₆
EH₁: functor_enrichment H₁ E₅ E₆
EH₂: functor_enrichment H₂ E₅ E₆
τ: H₂ ⟹ H₁
Hτ: nat_trans_enrichment τ EH₂ EH₁
P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₃
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₅
Q₁: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₄
Q₂: enriched_profunctor E₄ E₆
θ₁: enriched_profunctor_square EF EG P₁ Q₁
θ₂: enriched_profunctor_square EG EH₁ P₂ Q₂
z: C₅
v: C₁
x: C₃
(mon_linvunitor (Q₁ (G x) (F v))
 · sym_mon_braiding V I_{ V} (Q₁ (G x) (F v)))
#⊗ identity (Q₂ (H₁ z) (G x))
· mon_lassociator (Q₁ (G x) (F v)) I_{ V}
    (Q₂ (H₁ z) (G x)) =
identity (Q₁ (G x) (F v))
#⊗ mon_linvunitor (Q₂ (H₁ z) (G x))

  
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄, C₅, C₆: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
E₅: enrichment C₅ V
E₆: enrichment C₆ V
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
G: C₃ ⟶ C₄
EG: functor_enrichment G E₃ E₄
H₁, H₂: C₅ ⟶ C₆
EH₁: functor_enrichment H₁ E₅ E₆
EH₂: functor_enrichment H₂ E₅ E₆
τ: H₂ ⟹ H₁
Hτ: nat_trans_enrichment τ EH₂ EH₁
P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₃
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₅
Q₁: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₄
Q₂: enriched_profunctor E₄ E₆
θ₁: enriched_profunctor_square EF EG P₁ Q₁
θ₂: enriched_profunctor_square EG EH₁ P₂ Q₂
z: C₅
v: C₁
x: C₃
mon_rinvunitor (Q₁ (G x) (F v))
#⊗ identity (Q₂ (H₁ z) (G x))
· mon_lassociator (Q₁ (G x) (F v)) I_{ V}
    (Q₂ (H₁ z) (G x)) =
identity (Q₁ (G x) (F v))
#⊗ mon_linvunitor (Q₂ (H₁ z) (G x))

  
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄, C₅, C₆: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
E₅: enrichment C₅ V
E₆: enrichment C₆ V
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
G: C₃ ⟶ C₄
EG: functor_enrichment G E₃ E₄
H₁, H₂: C₅ ⟶ C₆
EH₁: functor_enrichment H₁ E₅ E₆
EH₂: functor_enrichment H₂ E₅ E₆
τ: H₂ ⟹ H₁
Hτ: nat_trans_enrichment τ EH₂ EH₁
P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₃
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₅
Q₁: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₄
Q₂: enriched_profunctor E₄ E₆
θ₁: enriched_profunctor_square EF EG P₁ Q₁
θ₂: enriched_profunctor_square EG EH₁ P₂ Q₂
z: C₅
v: C₁
x: C₃
mon_rinvunitor (Q₁ (G x) (F v))
#⊗ identity (Q₂ (H₁ z) (G x))
· mon_lassociator (Q₁ (G x) (F v)) I_{ V}
    (Q₂ (H₁ z) (G x)) =
mon_rinvunitor (Q₁ (G x) (F v))
#⊗ identity (Q₂ (H₁ z) (G x))
· mon_lassociator (Q₁ (G x) (F v)) I_{ V}
    (Q₂ (H₁ z) (G x))

  apply idpath.
Qed.


V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄, C₅, C₆: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
E₅: enrichment C₅ V
E₆: enrichment C₆ V
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
G₁, G₂: C₃ ⟶ C₄
EG₁: functor_enrichment G₁ E₃ E₄
EG₂: functor_enrichment G₂ E₃ E₄
τ: G₂ ⟹ G₁
Hτ: nat_trans_enrichment τ EG₂ EG₁
H: C₅ ⟶ C₆
EH: functor_enrichment H E₅ E₆
P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₃
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₅
Q₁: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₄
Q₂: enriched_profunctor E₄ E₆
θ₁: enriched_profunctor_square EF EG₁ P₁ Q₁
θ₂: enriched_profunctor_square EG₂ EH P₂ Q₂
comp_v_enriched_profunctor_square θ₁
  (uwhisker_enriched_profunctor_square Hτ θ₂) =
comp_v_enriched_profunctor_square
  (dwhisker_enriched_profunctor_square Hτ θ₁) θ₂


V: benabou_cosmos

EG₂: functor_enrichment G₂ E₃ E₄
τ: G₂ ⟹ G₁
Hτ: nat_trans_enrichment τ EG₂ EG₁

P₂: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₅

θ₂: enriched_profunctor_square EG₂ EH P₂ Q₂
comp_v_enriched_profunctor_square θ₁
  (uwhisker_enriched_profunctor_square Hτ θ₂) =
comp_v_enriched_profunctor_square
  (dwhisker_enriched_profunctor_square Hτ θ₁) θ₂

C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄, C₅, C₆: category

E₂: enrichment C₂ V

E₆: enrichment C₆ V
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
G₁, G₂: C₃ ⟶ C₄
EG₁: functor_enrichment G₁ E₃ E₄
EG₂: functor_enrichment G₂ E₃ E₄
τ: G₂ ⟹ G₁
Hτ: nat_trans_enrichment τ EG₂ EG₁

EH: functor_enrichment H E₅ E₆

P₂: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₅

Q₂: enriched_profunctor E₄ E₆
θ₁: enriched_profunctor_square EF EG₁ P₁ Q₁
θ₂: enriched_profunctor_square EG₂ EH P₂ Q₂
z: C₅
v: C₁
comp_v_enriched_profunctor_square_mor θ₁
  (uwhisker_enriched_profunctor_square Hτ θ₂) z v =
comp_v_enriched_profunctor_square_mor
  (dwhisker_enriched_profunctor_square Hτ θ₁) θ₂ z v

  
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄, C₅, C₆: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
E₅: enrichment C₅ V
E₆: enrichment C₆ V
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
G₁, G₂: C₃ ⟶ C₄
EG₁: functor_enrichment G₁ E₃ E₄
EG₂: functor_enrichment G₂ E₃ E₄
τ: G₂ ⟹ G₁
Hτ: nat_trans_enrichment τ EG₂ EG₁
H: C₅ ⟶ C₆
EH: functor_enrichment H E₅ E₆
P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₃
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₅

Q₂: enriched_profunctor E₄ E₆
θ₁: enriched_profunctor_square EF EG₁ P₁ Q₁
θ₂: enriched_profunctor_square EG₂ EH P₂ Q₂
z: C₅
v: C₁
∏ y : C₃,
comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₁ P₂ z v y
· comp_v_enriched_profunctor_square_mor θ₁
    (uwhisker_enriched_profunctor_square Hτ θ₂) z v =
comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₁ P₂ z v y
· comp_v_enriched_profunctor_square_mor
    (dwhisker_enriched_profunctor_square Hτ θ₁) θ₂ z v

C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄, C₅, C₆: category

Hτ: nat_trans_enrichment τ EG₂ EG₁
H: C₅ ⟶ C₆

P₂: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₅

v: C₁
x: C₃
θ₁ x v
#⊗ uwhisker_enriched_profunctor_square Hτ θ₂ z x
· comp_enriched_profunctor_in Q₁ Q₂ (H z) (F v) (G₁ x) =
comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₁ P₂ z v x
· comp_v_enriched_profunctor_square_mor
    (dwhisker_enriched_profunctor_square Hτ θ₁) θ₂ z v

Q₂: enriched_profunctor E₄ E₆
θ₁: enriched_profunctor_square EF EG₁ P₁ Q₁
θ₂: enriched_profunctor_square EG₂ EH P₂ Q₂
z: C₅
v: C₁
x: C₃
dwhisker_enriched_profunctor_square Hτ θ₁ x v
#⊗ θ₂ z x
· comp_enriched_profunctor_in Q₁ Q₂ (H z) (F v) (G₂ x) =
θ₁ x v
#⊗ uwhisker_enriched_profunctor_square Hτ θ₂ z x
· comp_enriched_profunctor_in Q₁ Q₂ (H z) (F v) (G₁ x)

  
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄, C₅, C₆: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
E₅: enrichment C₅ V
E₆: enrichment C₆ V
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
G₁, G₂: C₃ ⟶ C₄
EG₁: functor_enrichment G₁ E₃ E₄
EG₂: functor_enrichment G₂ E₃ E₄
τ: G₂ ⟹ G₁
Hτ: nat_trans_enrichment τ EG₂ EG₁
H: C₅ ⟶ C₆
EH: functor_enrichment H E₅ E₆
P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₃
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₅
Q₁: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₄
Q₂: enriched_profunctor E₄ E₆
θ₁: enriched_profunctor_square EF EG₁ P₁ Q₁
θ₂: enriched_profunctor_square EG₂ EH P₂ Q₂
z: C₅
v: C₁
x: C₃
(θ₁ x v · mon_linvunitor (Q₁ (G₁ x) (F v))
 · enriched_from_arr E₄ (τ x)
   #⊗ identity (Q₁ (G₁ x) (F v))
 · lmap_e Q₁ (G₁ x) (G₂ x) (F v)) #⊗ θ₂ z x
· comp_enriched_profunctor_in Q₁ Q₂ (H z) (F v) (G₂ x) =
θ₁ x v
#⊗ (θ₂ z x · mon_linvunitor (Q₂ (H z) (G₂ x))
    · enriched_from_arr E₄ (τ x)
      #⊗ identity (Q₂ (H z) (G₂ x))
    · rmap_e Q₂ (H z) (G₂ x) (G₁ x))
· comp_enriched_profunctor_in Q₁ Q₂ (H z) (F v) (G₁ x)

θ₁ x v #⊗ θ₂ z x
· mon_linvunitor (Q₁ (G₁ x) (F v))
  #⊗ identity (Q₂ (H z) (G₂ x))
· (enriched_from_arr E₄ (τ x)
   #⊗ identity (Q₁ (G₁ x) (F v)))
  #⊗ identity (Q₂ (H z) (G₂ x))
· lmap_e Q₁ (G₁ x) (G₂ x) (F v)
  #⊗ identity (Q₂ (H z) (G₂ x))
· comp_enriched_profunctor_in Q₁ Q₂ (H z) (F v) (G₂ x) =
θ₁ x v
#⊗ (θ₂ z x · mon_linvunitor (Q₂ (H z) (G₂ x))
    · enriched_from_arr E₄ (τ x)
      #⊗ identity (Q₂ (H z) (G₂ x))
    · rmap_e Q₂ (H z) (G₂ x) (G₁ x))
· comp_enriched_profunctor_in Q₁ Q₂ (H z) (F v) (G₁ x)

z: C₅
v: C₁
x: C₃
θ₁ x v #⊗ θ₂ z x
· mon_linvunitor (Q₁ (G₁ x) (F v))
  #⊗ identity (Q₂ (H z) (G₂ x))
· (enriched_from_arr E₄ (τ x)
   #⊗ identity (Q₁ (G₁ x) (F v)))
  #⊗ identity (Q₂ (H z) (G₂ x))
· lmap_e Q₁ (G₁ x) (G₂ x) (F v)
  #⊗ identity (Q₂ (H z) (G₂ x))
· comp_enriched_profunctor_in Q₁ Q₂ (H z) (F v) (G₂ x) =

· identity (Q₁ (G₁ x) (F v))
  #⊗ mon_linvunitor (Q₂ (H z) (G₂ x))
· identity (Q₁ (G₁ x) (F v))
  #⊗ (enriched_from_arr E₄ (τ x)
      #⊗ identity (Q₂ (H z) (G₂ x)))
· identity (Q₁ (G₁ x) (F v))
  #⊗ rmap_e Q₂ (H z) (G₂ x) (G₁ x)
· comp_enriched_profunctor_in Q₁ Q₂ (H z) (F v) (G₁ x)

E₆: enrichment C₆ V
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
G₁, G₂: C₃ ⟶ C₄
EG₁: functor_enrichment G₁ E₃ E₄
EG₂: functor_enrichment G₂ E₃ E₄
τ: G₂ ⟹ G₁
Hτ: nat_trans_enrichment τ EG₂ EG₁
H: C₅ ⟶ C₆
EH: functor_enrichment H E₅ E₆
P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₃
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₅

θ₁: enriched_profunctor_square EF EG₁ P₁ Q₁
θ₂: enriched_profunctor_square EG₂ EH P₂ Q₂
z: C₅
v: C₁
x: C₃
θ₁ x v #⊗ θ₂ z x
· (mon_linvunitor (Q₁ (G₁ x) (F v))
   #⊗ identity (Q₂ (H z) (G₂ x))
   · ((enriched_from_arr E₄ (τ x)
       #⊗ identity (Q₁ (G₁ x) (F v)))
      #⊗ identity (Q₂ (H z) (G₂ x))
      · (lmap_e Q₁ (G₁ x) (G₂ x) (F v)
         #⊗ identity (Q₂ (H z) (G₂ x))
         · comp_enriched_profunctor_in Q₁ Q₂ (H z)
             (F v) (G₂ x)))) =
θ₁ x v #⊗ θ₂ z x
· (identity (Q₁ (G₁ x) (F v))
   #⊗ mon_linvunitor (Q₂ (H z) (G₂ x))
   · (identity (Q₁ (G₁ x) (F v))
      #⊗ (enriched_from_arr E₄ (τ x)
          #⊗ identity (Q₂ (H z) (G₂ x)))
      · (identity (Q₁ (G₁ x) (F v))
         #⊗ rmap_e Q₂ (H z) (G₂ x) (G₁ x)
         · comp_enriched_profunctor_in Q₁ Q₂ (H z)
             (F v) (G₁ x))))

v: C₁
x: C₃
mon_linvunitor (Q₁ (G₁ x) (F v))
#⊗ identity (Q₂ (H z) (G₂ x))
· ((enriched_from_arr E₄ (τ x)
    #⊗ identity (Q₁ (G₁ x) (F v)))
   #⊗ identity (Q₂ (H z) (G₂ x))
   · (lmap_e Q₁ (G₁ x) (G₂ x) (F v)
      #⊗ identity (Q₂ (H z) (G₂ x))
      · comp_enriched_profunctor_in Q₁ Q₂ (H z) (F v)

#⊗ mon_linvunitor (Q₂ (H z) (G₂ x))
· (identity (Q₁ (G₁ x) (F v))
   #⊗ (enriched_from_arr E₄ (τ x)
       #⊗ identity (Q₂ (H z) (G₂ x)))
   · (identity (Q₁ (G₁ x) (F v))
      #⊗ rmap_e Q₂ (H z) (G₂ x) (G₁ x)

E₆: enrichment C₆ V
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
G₁, G₂: C₃ ⟶ C₄
EG₁: functor_enrichment G₁ E₃ E₄
EG₂: functor_enrichment G₂ E₃ E₄
τ: G₂ ⟹ G₁
Hτ: nat_trans_enrichment τ EG₂ EG₁
H: C₅ ⟶ C₆
EH: functor_enrichment H E₅ E₆
P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₃
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₅
Q₁: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₄
Q₂: enriched_profunctor E₄ E₆

θ₂: enriched_profunctor_square EG₂ EH P₂ Q₂
z: C₅
v: C₁
x: C₃
mon_linvunitor (Q₁ (G₁ x) (F v))
#⊗ identity (Q₂ (H z) (G₂ x))
· ((enriched_from_arr E₄ (τ x)
    #⊗ identity (Q₁ (G₁ x) (F v)))
   #⊗ identity (Q₂ (H z) (G₂ x))
   · (mon_lassociator (E₄ ⦃ G₂ x, G₁ x ⦄)
        (Q₁ (G₁ x) (F v)) (Q₂ (H z) (G₂ x))
      · sym_mon_braiding V (E₄ ⦃ G₂ x, G₁ x ⦄)
          (Q₁ (G₁ x) (F v) ⊗ Q₂ (H z) (G₂ x))
      · mon_lassociator (Q₁ (G₁ x) (F v))
          (Q₂ (H z) (G₂ x)) (E₄ ⦃ G₂ x, G₁ x ⦄)
      · identity (Q₁ (G₁ x) (F v))
        #⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V (Q₂ (H z) (G₂ x))
              (E₄ ⦃ G₂ x, G₁ x ⦄)
            · rmap_e Q₂ (H z) (G₂ x) (G₁ x))
      · comp_enriched_profunctor_in Q₁ Q₂ (H z) (F v)
          (G₁ x))) =
identity (Q₁ (G₁ x) (F v))
#⊗ mon_linvunitor (Q₂ (H z) (G₂ x))
· (identity (Q₁ (G₁ x) (F v))
   #⊗ (enriched_from_arr E₄ (τ x)
       #⊗ identity (Q₂ (H z) (G₂ x)))
   · (identity (Q₁ (G₁ x) (F v))
      #⊗ rmap_e Q₂ (H z) (G₂ x) (G₁ x)
      · comp_enriched_profunctor_in Q₁ Q₂ (H z) (F v)
          (G₁ x)))

#⊗ identity (Q₂ (H z) (G₂ x))

· mon_lassociator (E₄ ⦃ G₂ x, G₁ x ⦄)

· identity (Q₁ (G₁ x) (F v))
  #⊗ (enriched_from_arr E₄ (τ x)
      #⊗ identity (Q₂ (H z) (G₂ x)))
· identity (Q₁ (G₁ x) (F v))
  #⊗ rmap_e Q₂ (H z) (G₂ x) (G₁ x)

Q₁: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₄
Q₂: enriched_profunctor E₄ E₆
θ₁: enriched_profunctor_square EF EG₁ P₁ Q₁
θ₂: enriched_profunctor_square EG₂ EH P₂ Q₂
z: C₅
v: C₁
x: C₃
mon_linvunitor (Q₁ (G₁ x) (F v))
#⊗ identity (Q₂ (H z) (G₂ x))
· (enriched_from_arr E₄ (τ x)
   #⊗ identity (Q₁ (G₁ x) (F v)))
  #⊗ identity (Q₂ (H z) (G₂ x))
· mon_lassociator (E₄ ⦃ G₂ x, G₁ x ⦄)
    (Q₁ (G₁ x) (F v)) (Q₂ (H z) (G₂ x))
· sym_mon_braiding V (E₄ ⦃ G₂ x, G₁ x ⦄)
    (Q₁ (G₁ x) (F v) ⊗ Q₂ (H z) (G₂ x))
· mon_lassociator (Q₁ (G₁ x) (F v)) (Q₂ (H z) (G₂ x))
    (E₄ ⦃ G₂ x, G₁ x ⦄)
· identity (Q₁ (G₁ x) (F v))
  #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (Q₂ (H z) (G₂ x))
       (E₄ ⦃ G₂ x, G₁ x ⦄)
· identity (Q₁ (G₁ x) (F v))
  #⊗ rmap_e Q₂ (H z) (G₂ x) (G₁ x) =
identity (Q₁ (G₁ x) (F v))
#⊗ mon_linvunitor (Q₂ (H z) (G₂ x))
· identity (Q₁ (G₁ x) (F v))
  #⊗ (enriched_from_arr E₄ (τ x)
      #⊗ identity (Q₂ (H z) (G₂ x)))
· identity (Q₁ (G₁ x) (F v))
  #⊗ rmap_e Q₂ (H z) (G₂ x) (G₁ x)

  
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄, C₅, C₆: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
E₅: enrichment C₅ V
E₆: enrichment C₆ V
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
G₁, G₂: C₃ ⟶ C₄
EG₁: functor_enrichment G₁ E₃ E₄
EG₂: functor_enrichment G₂ E₃ E₄
τ: G₂ ⟹ G₁
Hτ: nat_trans_enrichment τ EG₂ EG₁
H: C₅ ⟶ C₆
EH: functor_enrichment H E₅ E₆
P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₃
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₅
Q₁: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₄
Q₂: enriched_profunctor E₄ E₆
θ₁: enriched_profunctor_square EF EG₁ P₁ Q₁
θ₂: enriched_profunctor_square EG₂ EH P₂ Q₂
z: C₅
v: C₁
x: C₃
mon_linvunitor (Q₁ (G₁ x) (F v))
#⊗ identity (Q₂ (H z) (G₂ x))
· (enriched_from_arr E₄ (τ x)
   #⊗ identity (Q₁ (G₁ x) (F v)))
  #⊗ identity (Q₂ (H z) (G₂ x))
· mon_lassociator (E₄ ⦃ G₂ x, G₁ x ⦄)
    (Q₁ (G₁ x) (F v)) (Q₂ (H z) (G₂ x))
· sym_mon_braiding V (E₄ ⦃ G₂ x, G₁ x ⦄)
    (Q₁ (G₁ x) (F v) ⊗ Q₂ (H z) (G₂ x))
· mon_lassociator (Q₁ (G₁ x) (F v)) (Q₂ (H z) (G₂ x))
    (E₄ ⦃ G₂ x, G₁ x ⦄)
· identity (Q₁ (G₁ x) (F v))
  #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (Q₂ (H z) (G₂ x))
       (E₄ ⦃ G₂ x, G₁ x ⦄) =
identity (Q₁ (G₁ x) (F v))
#⊗ mon_linvunitor (Q₂ (H z) (G₂ x))
· identity (Q₁ (G₁ x) (F v))
  #⊗ (enriched_from_arr E₄ (τ x)
      #⊗ identity (Q₂ (H z) (G₂ x)))

mon_linvunitor (Q₁ (G₁ x) (F v))
#⊗ identity (Q₂ (H z) (G₂ x))
· (enriched_from_arr E₄ (τ x)
   #⊗ identity (Q₁ (G₁ x) (F v)))
  #⊗ identity (Q₂ (H z) (G₂ x))
· mon_lassociator (E₄ ⦃ G₂ x, G₁ x ⦄)
    (Q₁ (G₁ x) (F v)) (Q₂ (H z) (G₂ x))
· sym_mon_braiding V (E₄ ⦃ G₂ x, G₁ x ⦄)
    (Q₁ (G₁ x) (F v) ⊗ Q₂ (H z) (G₂ x))
· mon_lassociator (Q₁ (G₁ x) (F v)) (Q₂ (H z) (G₂ x))
    (E₄ ⦃ G₂ x, G₁ x ⦄)
· identity (Q₁ (G₁ x) (F v))
  #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (Q₂ (H z) (G₂ x))
       (E₄ ⦃ G₂ x, G₁ x ⦄) = ?b

identity (Q₁ (G₁ x) (F v))
#⊗ mon_linvunitor (Q₂ (H z) (G₂ x))
· identity (Q₁ (G₁ x) (F v))
  #⊗ (enriched_from_arr E₄ (τ x)
      #⊗ identity (Q₂ (H z) (G₂ x)))

#⊗ identity (Q₂ (H z) (G₂ x))
· ((enriched_from_arr E₄ (τ x)
    #⊗ identity (Q₁ (G₁ x) (F v)))
   #⊗ identity (Q₂ (H z) (G₂ x))
   · (mon_lassociator (E₄ ⦃ G₂ x, G₁ x ⦄)
        (Q₁ (G₁ x) (F v)) (Q₂ (H z) (G₂ x))
      · (sym_mon_braiding V (E₄ ⦃ G₂ x, G₁ x ⦄)
           (Q₁ (G₁ x) (F v) ⊗ Q₂ (H z) (G₂ x))
         · (mon_lassociator (Q₁ (G₁ x) (F v))
              (Q₂ (H z) (G₂ x)) (E₄ ⦃ G₂ x, G₁ x ⦄)
            · identity (Q₁ (G₁ x) (F v))

v: C₁
x: C₃
(enriched_from_arr E₄ (τ x)
 #⊗ identity (Q₁ (G₁ x) (F v)))
#⊗ identity (Q₂ (H z) (G₂ x))
· (mon_lassociator (E₄ ⦃ G₂ x, G₁ x ⦄)
     (Q₁ (G₁ x) (F v)) (Q₂ (H z) (G₂ x))
   · (sym_mon_braiding V (E₄ ⦃ G₂ x, G₁ x ⦄)
        (Q₁ (G₁ x) (F v) ⊗ Q₂ (H z) (G₂ x))
      · (mon_lassociator (Q₁ (G₁ x) (F v))
           (Q₂ (H z) (G₂ x)) (E₄ ⦃ G₂ x, G₁ x ⦄)
         · identity (Q₁ (G₁ x) (F v))
           #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (Q₂ (H z) (G₂ x))
                (E₄ ⦃ G₂ x, G₁ x ⦄)))) = ?t2

· sym_mon_braiding V (E₄ ⦃ G₂ x, G₁ x ⦄)

    #⊗ identity (Q₂ (H z) (G₂ x)))
· sym_mon_braiding V (E₄ ⦃ G₂ x, G₁ x ⦄)
    (Q₁ (G₁ x) (F v) ⊗ Q₂ (H z) (G₂ x))
· mon_lassociator (Q₁ (G₁ x) (F v)) (Q₂ (H z) (G₂ x))
    (E₄ ⦃ G₂ x, G₁ x ⦄)
· identity (Q₁ (G₁ x) (F v))
  #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (Q₂ (H z) (G₂ x))
       (E₄ ⦃ G₂ x, G₁ x ⦄) = ?t2

    
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄, C₅, C₆: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
E₅: enrichment C₅ V
E₆: enrichment C₆ V
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
G₁, G₂: C₃ ⟶ C₄
EG₁: functor_enrichment G₁ E₃ E₄
EG₂: functor_enrichment G₂ E₃ E₄
τ: G₂ ⟹ G₁
Hτ: nat_trans_enrichment τ EG₂ EG₁
H: C₅ ⟶ C₆
EH: functor_enrichment H E₅ E₆
P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₃
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₅
Q₁: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₄
Q₂: enriched_profunctor E₄ E₆
θ₁: enriched_profunctor_square EF EG₁ P₁ Q₁
θ₂: enriched_profunctor_square EG₂ EH P₂ Q₂
z: C₅
v: C₁
x: C₃
sym_mon_braiding V I_{ V}
  (Q₁ (G₁ x) (F v) ⊗ Q₂ (H z) (G₂ x))
· (identity (Q₁ (G₁ x) (F v))
   #⊗ identity (Q₂ (H z) (G₂ x)))
  #⊗ enriched_from_arr E₄ (τ x)
· mon_lassociator (Q₁ (G₁ x) (F v)) (Q₂ (H z) (G₂ x))
    (E₄ ⦃ G₂ x, G₁ x ⦄)
· identity (Q₁ (G₁ x) (F v))
  #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (Q₂ (H z) (G₂ x))
       (E₄ ⦃ G₂ x, G₁ x ⦄) = ?t2

· ((identity (Q₁ (G₁ x) (F v))
    #⊗ identity (Q₂ (H z) (G₂ x)))
   #⊗ enriched_from_arr E₄ (τ x)
   · (mon_lassociator (Q₁ (G₁ x) (F v))
        (Q₂ (H z) (G₂ x)) (E₄ ⦃ G₂ x, G₁ x ⦄)
      · identity (Q₁ (G₁ x) (F v))
        #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (Q₂ (H z) (G₂ x))
             (E₄ ⦃ G₂ x, G₁ x ⦄))) = ?t2

τ: G₂ ⟹ G₁

V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄, C₅, C₆: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
E₅: enrichment C₅ V
E₆: enrichment C₆ V
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
G₁, G₂: C₃ ⟶ C₄
EG₁: functor_enrichment G₁ E₃ E₄
EG₂: functor_enrichment G₂ E₃ E₄
τ: G₂ ⟹ G₁
Hτ: nat_trans_enrichment τ EG₂ EG₁
H: C₅ ⟶ C₆
EH: functor_enrichment H E₅ E₆
P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₃
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₅
Q₁: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₄
Q₂: enriched_profunctor E₄ E₆
θ₁: enriched_profunctor_square EF EG₁ P₁ Q₁
θ₂: enriched_profunctor_square EG₂ EH P₂ Q₂
z: C₅
v: C₁
x: C₃
mon_lassociator (Q₁ (G₁ x) (F v)) (Q₂ (H z) (G₂ x))
  I_{ V}
· identity (Q₁ (G₁ x) (F v))
  #⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V (Q₂ (H z) (G₂ x)) I_{ V}
      · enriched_from_arr E₄ (τ x)
        #⊗ identity (Q₂ (H z) (G₂ x))) = ?t2

    
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄, C₅, C₆: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
E₅: enrichment C₅ V
E₆: enrichment C₆ V
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
G₁, G₂: C₃ ⟶ C₄
EG₁: functor_enrichment G₁ E₃ E₄
EG₂: functor_enrichment G₂ E₃ E₄
τ: G₂ ⟹ G₁
Hτ: nat_trans_enrichment τ EG₂ EG₁
H: C₅ ⟶ C₆
EH: functor_enrichment H E₅ E₆
P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₃
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₅
Q₁: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₄
Q₂: enriched_profunctor E₄ E₆
θ₁: enriched_profunctor_square EF EG₁ P₁ Q₁
θ₂: enriched_profunctor_square EG₂ EH P₂ Q₂
z: C₅
v: C₁
x: C₃
mon_lassociator (Q₁ (G₁ x) (F v)) (Q₂ (H z) (G₂ x))
  I_{ V}
· (identity (Q₁ (G₁ x) (F v))
   #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (Q₂ (H z) (G₂ x)) I_{ V}
   · identity (Q₁ (G₁ x) (F v))
     #⊗ (enriched_from_arr E₄ (τ x)
         #⊗ identity (Q₂ (H z) (G₂ x)))) = ?t2

    apply idpath.
  
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄, C₅, C₆: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
E₅: enrichment C₅ V
E₆: enrichment C₆ V
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
G₁, G₂: C₃ ⟶ C₄
EG₁: functor_enrichment G₁ E₃ E₄
EG₂: functor_enrichment G₂ E₃ E₄
τ: G₂ ⟹ G₁
Hτ: nat_trans_enrichment τ EG₂ EG₁
H: C₅ ⟶ C₆
EH: functor_enrichment H E₅ E₆
P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₃
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₅
Q₁: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₄
Q₂: enriched_profunctor E₄ E₆
θ₁: enriched_profunctor_square EF EG₁ P₁ Q₁
θ₂: enriched_profunctor_square EG₂ EH P₂ Q₂
z: C₅
v: C₁
x: C₃
mon_linvunitor (Q₁ (G₁ x) (F v))
#⊗ identity (Q₂ (H z) (G₂ x))
· (mon_lassociator I_{ V} (Q₁ (G₁ x) (F v))
     (Q₂ (H z) (G₂ x))
   · (sym_mon_braiding V I_{ V}
        (Q₁ (G₁ x) (F v) ⊗ Q₂ (H z) (G₂ x))
      · (mon_lassociator (Q₁ (G₁ x) (F v))
           (Q₂ (H z) (G₂ x)) I_{ V}
         · (identity (Q₁ (G₁ x) (F v))
            #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (Q₂ (H z) (G₂ x))
                 I_{ V}
            · identity (Q₁ (G₁ x) (F v))
              #⊗ (enriched_from_arr E₄ (τ x)
                  #⊗ identity (Q₂ (H z) (G₂ x))))))) =
identity (Q₁ (G₁ x) (F v))
#⊗ mon_linvunitor (Q₂ (H z) (G₂ x))
· identity (Q₁ (G₁ x) (F v))
  #⊗ (enriched_from_arr E₄ (τ x)
      #⊗ identity (Q₂ (H z) (G₂ x)))

  
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄, C₅, C₆: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
E₅: enrichment C₅ V
E₆: enrichment C₆ V
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
G₁, G₂: C₃ ⟶ C₄
EG₁: functor_enrichment G₁ E₃ E₄
EG₂: functor_enrichment G₂ E₃ E₄
τ: G₂ ⟹ G₁
Hτ: nat_trans_enrichment τ EG₂ EG₁
H: C₅ ⟶ C₆
EH: functor_enrichment H E₅ E₆
P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₃
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₅
Q₁: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₄
Q₂: enriched_profunctor E₄ E₆
θ₁: enriched_profunctor_square EF EG₁ P₁ Q₁
θ₂: enriched_profunctor_square EG₂ EH P₂ Q₂
z: C₅
v: C₁
x: C₃
mon_linvunitor (Q₁ (G₁ x) (F v))
#⊗ identity (Q₂ (H z) (G₂ x))
· mon_lassociator I_{ V} (Q₁ (G₁ x) (F v))
    (Q₂ (H z) (G₂ x))
· sym_mon_braiding V I_{ V}
    (Q₁ (G₁ x) (F v) ⊗ Q₂ (H z) (G₂ x))
· mon_lassociator (Q₁ (G₁ x) (F v)) (Q₂ (H z) (G₂ x))
    I_{ V}
· identity (Q₁ (G₁ x) (F v))
  #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (Q₂ (H z) (G₂ x)) I_{ V}
· identity (Q₁ (G₁ x) (F v))
  #⊗ (enriched_from_arr E₄ (τ x)
      #⊗ identity (Q₂ (H z) (G₂ x))) =
identity (Q₁ (G₁ x) (F v))
#⊗ mon_linvunitor (Q₂ (H z) (G₂ x))
· identity (Q₁ (G₁ x) (F v))
  #⊗ (enriched_from_arr E₄ (τ x)
      #⊗ identity (Q₂ (H z) (G₂ x)))

  
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄, C₅, C₆: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
E₅: enrichment C₅ V
E₆: enrichment C₆ V
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
G₁, G₂: C₃ ⟶ C₄
EG₁: functor_enrichment G₁ E₃ E₄
EG₂: functor_enrichment G₂ E₃ E₄
τ: G₂ ⟹ G₁
Hτ: nat_trans_enrichment τ EG₂ EG₁
H: C₅ ⟶ C₆
EH: functor_enrichment H E₅ E₆
P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₃
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₅
Q₁: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₄
Q₂: enriched_profunctor E₄ E₆
θ₁: enriched_profunctor_square EF EG₁ P₁ Q₁
θ₂: enriched_profunctor_square EG₂ EH P₂ Q₂
z: C₅
v: C₁
x: C₃
mon_linvunitor (Q₁ (G₁ x) (F v))
#⊗ identity (Q₂ (H z) (G₂ x))
· mon_lassociator I_{ V} (Q₁ (G₁ x) (F v))
    (Q₂ (H z) (G₂ x))
· sym_mon_braiding V I_{ V}
    (Q₁ (G₁ x) (F v) ⊗ Q₂ (H z) (G₂ x))
· mon_lassociator (Q₁ (G₁ x) (F v)) (Q₂ (H z) (G₂ x))
    I_{ V}
· identity (Q₁ (G₁ x) (F v))
  #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (Q₂ (H z) (G₂ x)) I_{ V} =
identity (Q₁ (G₁ x) (F v))
#⊗ mon_linvunitor (Q₂ (H z) (G₂ x))

EG₂: functor_enrichment G₂ E₃ E₄

P₂: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₅

θ₂: enriched_profunctor_square EG₂ EH P₂ Q₂
z: C₅
v: C₁
x: C₃
mon_linvunitor (Q₁ (G₁ x) (F v))
#⊗ identity (Q₂ (H z) (G₂ x))
· mon_lassociator I_{ V} (Q₁ (G₁ x) (F v))
    (Q₂ (H z) (G₂ x))
· sym_mon_braiding V I_{ V}
    (Q₁ (G₁ x) (F v) ⊗ Q₂ (H z) (G₂ x))
· mon_lassociator (Q₁ (G₁ x) (F v)) (Q₂ (H z) (G₂ x))
    I_{ V}
· identity (Q₁ (G₁ x) (F v))
  #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (Q₂ (H z) (G₂ x)) I_{ V} = 
?b
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄, C₅, C₆: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
E₅: enrichment C₅ V
E₆: enrichment C₆ V
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
G₁, G₂: C₃ ⟶ C₄
EG₁: functor_enrichment G₁ E₃ E₄
EG₂: functor_enrichment G₂ E₃ E₄
τ: G₂ ⟹ G₁
Hτ: nat_trans_enrichment τ EG₂ EG₁
H: C₅ ⟶ C₆
EH: functor_enrichment H E₅ E₆
P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₃
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₅
Q₁: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₄
Q₂: enriched_profunctor E₄ E₆
θ₁: enriched_profunctor_square EF EG₁ P₁ Q₁
θ₂: enriched_profunctor_square EG₂ EH P₂ Q₂
z: C₅
v: C₁
x: C₃
?b =
identity (Q₁ (G₁ x) (F v))
#⊗ mon_linvunitor (Q₂ (H z) (G₂ x))

v: C₁

mon_linvunitor (Q₁ (G₁ x) (F v))
#⊗ identity (Q₂ (H z) (G₂ x))
· mon_lassociator I_{ V} (Q₁ (G₁ x) (F v))
    (Q₂ (H z) (G₂ x))
· sym_mon_braiding V I_{ V}
    (Q₁ (G₁ x) (F v) ⊗ Q₂ (H z) (G₂ x))
· mon_lassociator (Q₁ (G₁ x) (F v)) (Q₂ (H z) (G₂ x))
    I_{ V}
· identity (Q₁ (G₁ x) (F v))
  #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (Q₂ (H z) (G₂ x)) I_{ V} =

#⊗ identity (Q₂ (H z) (G₂ x))
· (mon_lassociator I_{ V} (Q₁ (G₁ x) (F v))
     (Q₂ (H z) (G₂ x))
   · (sym_mon_braiding V I_{ V}
        (Q₁ (G₁ x) (F v) ⊗ Q₂ (H z) (G₂ x))
      · (mon_lassociator (Q₁ (G₁ x) (F v))
           (Q₂ (H z) (G₂ x)) I_{ V}
         · identity (Q₁ (G₁ x) (F v))
           #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (Q₂ (H z) (G₂ x))

EG₂: functor_enrichment G₂ E₃ E₄
τ: G₂ ⟹ G₁
Hτ: nat_trans_enrichment τ EG₂ EG₁
H: C₅ ⟶ C₆
EH: functor_enrichment H E₅ E₆
P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₃
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₅
Q₁: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₄
Q₂: enriched_profunctor E₄ E₆
θ₁: enriched_profunctor_square EF EG₁ P₁ Q₁
θ₂: enriched_profunctor_square EG₂ EH P₂ Q₂
z: C₅
v: C₁
x: C₃
mon_rinvunitor (Q₁ (G₁ x) (F v))
#⊗ identity (Q₂ (H z) (G₂ x))
· mon_lassociator (Q₁ (G₁ x) (F v)) I_{ V}
    (Q₂ (H z) (G₂ x)) =
identity (Q₁ (G₁ x) (F v))
#⊗ mon_linvunitor (Q₂ (H z) (G₂ x))

  
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄, C₅, C₆: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
E₅: enrichment C₅ V
E₆: enrichment C₆ V
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
G₁, G₂: C₃ ⟶ C₄
EG₁: functor_enrichment G₁ E₃ E₄
EG₂: functor_enrichment G₂ E₃ E₄
τ: G₂ ⟹ G₁
Hτ: nat_trans_enrichment τ EG₂ EG₁
H: C₅ ⟶ C₆
EH: functor_enrichment H E₅ E₆
P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₃
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₅
Q₁: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₄
Q₂: enriched_profunctor E₄ E₆
θ₁: enriched_profunctor_square EF EG₁ P₁ Q₁
θ₂: enriched_profunctor_square EG₂ EH P₂ Q₂
z: C₅
v: C₁
x: C₃
mon_rinvunitor (Q₁ (G₁ x) (F v))
#⊗ identity (Q₂ (H z) (G₂ x))
· mon_lassociator (Q₁ (G₁ x) (F v)) I_{ V}
    (Q₂ (H z) (G₂ x)) =
mon_rinvunitor (Q₁ (G₁ x) (F v))
#⊗ identity (Q₂ (H z) (G₂ x))
· mon_lassociator (Q₁ (G₁ x) (F v)) I_{ V}
    (Q₂ (H z) (G₂ x))

  apply idpath.
Qed.
